the variable count_2320 upon activation.</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="variableID">66</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="11824" FP="_AP" N="a"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="1355" N="JavaScript_LineAjuducationInformation_Input" T="JScript"><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">//Get recordset values
var Line_PayerCheck = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;Line_PayerCheck&quot;);
var resArr = new Array();
var lineNum = ec_DataHelper.GetValueByIndex(4);
var payerId = ec_DataHelper.GetValueByIndex(3);
var myRSLine_Payer = lineNum + &quot;-&quot; + payerId;
myRS = ec_VariableHelper.GetRecordSet(&quot;Service_2430Details&quot;);
myRS.first();
var arrayLinePayer = &quot;&quot;;
var found_payer = 0;
if(Line_PayerCheck.length &gt; 0)
{
var splitRes = Line_PayerCheck.split(&quot;|&quot;);
for(var j=0;j&lt;splitRes.length;j++)
{
if (splitRes[j] == myRSLine_Payer)
{
found_payer = 1;
}
}
}
if (found_payer == 0)
{	//Update the recordset with the values of array &quot;resArr&quot;
for (var i = 0; i &lt; 7; i++) resArr [i] = ec_DataHelper.GetValueByIndex(i);
myRS.insertRow();
myRS.updateRow(resArr);
ec_VariableHelper.SetRecordSet(&quot;Service_2430Details&quot;, myRS, true);
}
else
{
//Update/Add to existing row:
var RS1 = myRS.getRow();
var netPaid = ec_DataHelper.GetValueByIndex(0);
var memberResponsibility = ec_DataHelper.GetValueByIndex(2);
var remitDate = ec_DataHelper.GetValueByIndex(1);
while(RS1&gt;0)
{
Fields = myRS.getFields();
arrayLinePayer = Fields[4] + &quot;-&quot; + Fields[3];
if(myRSLine_Payer == arrayLinePayer)
{
Fields[0] = +Fields[0] + +netPaid;
if(memberResponsibility!=&quot;&quot;)
{
Fields[2] = +Fields[2] + +memberResponsibility;
}
if (Fields[1] == &quot;&quot;)
{
Fields[1] = remitDate;
}
myRS.updateRow(Fields);
}
myRS.next();
RS1 = myRS.getRow();
}
ec_VariableHelper.SetRecordSet(&quot;Service_2430Details&quot;, myRS, true);
}</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="11855" FP="A" P="0" N="value1"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="11857" FP="A" P="1" N="value2"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="11858" FP="A" P="2" N="value3"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="11975" FP="A" P="3" N="value4"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="14461" FP="A" P="4" N="value5" DirectValue="{67}"/><CP ID="14462" FP="A" P="5" N="value6" DirectValue="{70}"/><CP ID="14594" FP="A" P="6" N="value7" DirectValue="&quot;false&quot;"/><CP ID="11856" FP="X" P="0" N="result1"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="1365" T="ChangeVariable"><Ps C="S"><P N="variableID">67</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="11977" FP="A" N="v"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="1367" T="ChangeVariable"><Ps C="S"><P N="variableID">67</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="11980" FP="_AP" N="a"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="11979" FP="A" N="v"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="1368" T="ChangeVariable"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{a2e970b9-d1eb-4551-9d3b-55c439527346}">Store the value of the element SVD01.</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="variableID">68</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="11981" FP="A" N="v"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="1370" T="ChangeVariable"><Ps C="S"><P N="variableID">68</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="11984" FP="_AP" N="a"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="11983" FP="A" N="v"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="1371" T="ChangeVariable"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{a2e970b9-d1eb-4551-9d3b-55c439527346}">Stores the value CLM02 to the variable BilledAmt.</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="variableID">69</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="11988" FP="A" N="v"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="1372" T="ChangeVariable"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{a2e970b9-d1eb-4551-9d3b-55c439527346}">Store the value of the element SV203.</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="variableID">70</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="11992" FP="A" N="v"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="1377" N="ServiceAdjustmentInput" T="JScript"><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">//Record Set &quot;ServiceAdjustment&quot; has information from 2430\CAS(Line Adjustment).
var GroupCode = ec_DataHelper.GetValueByIndex(0);
//Gets the recordset &quot;ServiceAdjustment&quot;
myRS = ec_VariableHelper.GetRecordSet(&quot;ServiceAdjustment&quot;);
var resArr = new Array();
//Assign the input values to the array &quot;resArr&quot;
for (var i = 0; i &lt; 19; i++) resArr [i] = ec_DataHelper.GetValueByIndex(i);
// Update the recordset with the input values
myRS.insertRow();
myRS.updateRow(resArr);
ec_VariableHelper.SetRecordSet(&quot;ServiceAdjustment&quot;, myRS, true);
</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="12016" FP="A" P="0" N="value1"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="12017" FP="A" P="1" N="value2"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="12018" FP="A" P="2" N="value3"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="12019" FP="A" P="3" N="value4"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="12020" FP="A" P="4" N="value5"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="12021" FP="A" P="5" N="value6"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="12022" FP="A" P="6" N="value7"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="12023" FP="A" P="7" N="value8"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="12024" FP="A" P="8" N="value9"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="12025" FP="A" P="9" N="value10"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="12026" FP="A" P="10" N="value11"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="12027" FP="A" P="11" N="value12"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="12028" FP="A" P="12" N="value13"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="12029" FP="A" P="13" N="value14"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="12030" FP="A" P="14" N="value15"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="12031" FP="A" P="15" N="value16"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="12032" FP="A" P="16" N="value17"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="12033" FP="A" P="17" N="value18"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="12034" FP="A" P="18" N="value19"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="12015" FP="X" P="0" N="no output"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="1379" N="ServiceLineCAScodes_Output" T="JScript"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{a2e970b9-d1eb-4551-9d3b-55c439527346}">Trigger the recordset based on activation.</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">//Retrieve the recordset values
myRS3 = ec_VariableHelper.GetRecordSet(&quot;LineCAS_CO_PR&quot;);//CO PR
lineNum = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;LineNumber&quot;);
myRS3.last();
var RS3 = myRS3.getRow();
while (RS3&gt;0)
{
//Assign the recordset values to the array &quot;Fields3&quot;
Fields3 = myRS3.getFields();
if(Fields3[19] == lineNum)
{
for (var i=0; i&lt;6; i++)
{
if((Fields3[i*3+1] != &quot;&quot;) &amp;&amp; (Fields3[i*3+1] != &quot;undefined&quot;))
{
var CASamount = parseFloat(Fields3[i*3+2]);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0, Fields3[i*3+1]);//Cascode
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(1, Fields3[0]);//Groupcode
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(2, CASamount.toFixed(2));//Amount
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(3, Fields3[i*3+3]);//Quantity
ec_ResultHelper.Send();
}
}
}
myRS3.previous();
RS3 = myRS3.getRow();
}</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="12050" FP="_AP" N="a"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="12051" FP="A" P="0" N="value0"/><CP ID="12046" FP="X" P="0" N="2430_CAS02,05,08,11,14,17"/><CP ID="12047" FP="X" P="1" N="2430_CAS01"/><CP ID="12048" FP="X" P="2" N="2430_CAS03,06,09,12,15,18"/><CP ID="12049" FP="X" P="3" N="2430_CAS04,07,10,13,16,19"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="1380" N="JavaScript_EOBDate" T="JScript"><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">var date2430 = ec_DataHelper.GetValueByIndex(0);
var firstinstance2430 = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;FirstInstance_2430Date&quot;);
if(firstinstance2430 == &quot;&quot;){
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0, date2430);
}</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="12071" FP="A" P="0" N="value1"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="12070" FP="X" P="0" N="result1"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="1381" T="LookAhead"><Ps C="S"><P N="lookupUPath">/Transaction(ID = '837', Instance = 'current()')/Loop(ID = '2000B', Instance = 'current()')/Loop(ID = '2300', Instance = 'current()')/Loop(ID = '2400', Instance = 'current()')/Loop(ID = '2430', Instance = 'current()')/Segment(ID = 'DTP', Instance = 'current()')/Element(ID = '1251')</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="12073" FP="_AP" N="a"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="12072" FP="X" N="r"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="1382" T="ChangeVariable"><Ps C="S"><P N="variableID">71</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="12074" FP="A" N="v"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="1389" N="JavaScript_ServiceAdjustmentOutput" T="JScript"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{a2e970b9-d1eb-4551-9d3b-55c439527346}">Trigger the recordsets based on activation.</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">
//Gets the recordset &quot;ServiceAdjustment&quot;
myRS = ec_VariableHelper.GetRecordSet(&quot;ServiceAdjustment&quot;);//CO PR
myRS.last();
var RS = myRS.getRow();
var arrayResult = [0,0,0,0,0,0,0,0,0];//Initialize array
allowedAmt_Line = 0;
var netPaidAmt = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;SVD02_SumAmt_2000B_2430&quot;);//NetPaidAmount
var billedAmount = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;SV203_billedAmount_2400&quot;);//BilledAmount
var Loop2430_Present = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;Flag_2430Present&quot;);
if(netPaidAmt!= &quot;&quot;)
{
allowedAmt_Line = netPaidAmt;
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(9, netPaidAmt);//netPaidAmount
}
while (RS&gt;0)
{
Fields = myRS.getFields();
for (var i=0; i&lt;6; i++)
{
if (Fields[0] == &quot;PR&quot;)//Enters if ClaimAdjustmentGroupCode is &quot;PR&quot;
{
switch (Fields[i*3+1])//ClaimAdjustmentReasonCode
{
case &quot;1&quot;:
arrayResult[0] = +arrayResult[0] + +Fields[i*3+2];// Assign sum of monetary amounts when ClaimAdjustmentReasonCode is '1' to array index '0'
break;
case &quot;2&quot;:
arrayResult[1] = +arrayResult[1] + +Fields[i*3+2];// Assign sum of monetary amounts when ClaimAdjustmentReasonCode is '2' to array index '1'
break;
case &quot;225&quot;:
arrayResult[2] = +arrayResult[2] + +Fields[i*3+2];
break;
case &quot;237&quot;:
arrayResult[2] = +arrayResult[2] + +Fields[i*3+2];
break;
case &quot;B4&quot;:
arrayResult[2] = +arrayResult[2] + +Fields[i*3+2];
break;
// Assign sum of monetary amounts when ClaimAdjustmentReasonCode is '225', '237', and 'B4'  to array index '2'
case &quot;3&quot;:
arrayResult[3] = +arrayResult[3] + +Fields[i*3+2];// Assign sum of monetary amounts when ClaimAdjustmentReasonCode is '3' to array index '3'
break;
default:
arrayResult[6] = +arrayResult[6] + +Fields[i*3+2];// Sum of monetary amounts for other values of ClaimAdjustmentReasonCode
}
allowedAmt_Line = +allowedAmt_Line + +Fields[i*3+2];//monetary amount + NetPaidAmount
}
else
{
if (Fields[0] == &quot;CO&quot;)//Enters when ClaimAdjustmentGroupCode is &quot;CO&quot;
{
switch (Fields[i*3+1])// ClaimAdjustmentReasonCode
{
case &quot;225&quot;:
arrayResult[4] = +arrayResult[4] + +Fields[i*3+2];
break;
case &quot;237&quot;:
arrayResult[4] = +arrayResult[4] + +Fields[i*3+2];
break;
case &quot;B4&quot;:
arrayResult[4] = +arrayResult[4] + +Fields[i*3+2];
break;
// Assign sum of monetary amounts when ClaimAdjustmentReasonCode is '225', '237', and 'B4'  to array index '4'
case &quot;45&quot;:
arrayResult[5] = +arrayResult[5] + +Fields[i*3+2];// Assign the sum of monetary amounts when ClaimAdjustmentReasonCode is '45' to array index '5'
break;
case &quot;105&quot;:
arrayResult[8] = +arrayResult[8] + +Fields[i*3+2];
break;
default:
arrayResult[7] = +arrayResult[7] + +Fields[i*3+2];//Sum of monetary amounts for other values of ClaimAdjustmentReasonCode
}
}
}
}
ec_ResultHelper.Send();
myRS.previous();
RS = myRS.getRow();
}
arrayResult[9] = +arrayResult[6]+ +arrayResult[7];
// Report the elemnts of the array &quot;arrayResult&quot;
for (var i=0; i&lt;6; i++)
{
if (arrayResult[i] != 0 &amp;&amp; arrayResult[i]!= &quot;&quot; &amp;&amp; arrayResult[i]!= undefined)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(i, arrayResult[i].toFixed(2));
}
}
if (arrayResult[8] != 0 &amp;&amp; arrayResult[8]!=&quot;&quot; &amp;&amp; arrayResult[8]!= undefined)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(12, arrayResult[8].toFixed(2));
}
if (arrayResult[9] != 0 &amp;&amp; arrayResult[9]!= &quot;&quot; &amp;&amp; arrayResult[9]!= undefined)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(6, arrayResult[9].toFixed(2));
}
if(Loop2430_Present == &quot;1&quot;)
{
if(allowedAmt_Line!=0 &amp;&amp; allowedAmt_Line!= &quot;&quot; &amp;&amp; allowedAmt_Line!= undefined )
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(7, parseFloat(allowedAmt_Line).toFixed(2));//Allowed amount
}
else
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(7, &quot;0.00&quot;);
}
}
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(8, billedAmount)//billedAmount
var amt = ec_DataHelper.GetValueByIndex(0);
if ((amt != &quot;&quot;)) ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(11,amt);//MemberResponsibilityAmount</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="12092" FP="_AP" N="a"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="14257" FP="A" P="0" N="value2" DirectValue="{87}"/><CP ID="12091" FP="X" P="0" N="CAS03,06,09,12,15,18_Deductible"/><CP ID="12093" FP="X" P="1" N="CAS03,06,09,12,15,18_CoInsurance"/><CP ID="12094" FP="X" P="2" N="CAS03,06,09,12,15,18_MemberPenalty"/><CP ID="12095" FP="X" P="3" N="CAS03,06,09,12,15,18_Copay"/><CP ID="12096" FP="X" P="4" N="CAS03,06,09,12,15,18_ProviderPenalty"/><CP ID="12097" FP="X" P="5" N="CAS03,06,09,12,15,18_DiscountAmt"/><CP ID="12098" FP="X" P="6" N="CAS03,06,09,12,15,18_NonCoveredAmt"/><CP ID="12099" FP="X" P="7" N="2430_SVD02"/><CP ID="12101" FP="X" P="8" N="2400_SV203"/><CP ID="12107" FP="X" P="9" N="2430_SVD02_NetPaidAmt"/><CP ID="12486" FP="X" P="10" N="noOutput"/><CP ID="14258" FP="X" P="11" N="2430_AMT02"/><CP ID="14583" FP="X" P="12" N="taxAmount"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="1390" N="JavaScript_RecordSetClear" T="JScript"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{a2e970b9-d1eb-4551-9d3b-55c439527346}">Clears the recordset ServiceAdjustment.</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">// Clear the junk values
myRS = ec_VariableHelper.GetRecordSet(&quot;ServiceAdjustment&quot;);
myRS.clear();</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="12111" FP="_AP" N="a"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="12109" FP="A" P="0" N="value1"/><CP ID="12110" FP="X" P="0" N="result1"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="1398" N="System Date/Time_EntryDate" T="SystemDateTime"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{a2e970b9-d1eb-4551-9d3b-55c439527346}">Passes the system date in specified format on activation, to the target map.</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="format">yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="12145" FP="_AP" N="a"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="12144" FP="X" N="r"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="1400" N="System Date/Time_EntryDate_PatientClaim" T="SystemDateTime"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{a2e970b9-d1eb-4551-9d3b-55c439527346}">Maps the system date in specified format upon activation.</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="format">yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="12150" FP="_AP" N="a"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="12149" FP="X" N="r"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="1402" N="JavaScript_CAS2320Input" T="JScript"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{a2e970b9-d1eb-4551-9d3b-55c439527346}">Takes the input from the segments of 2320 loop and forms a recordset.</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">//Record Set &quot;Claim_2320CAS&quot; has information from 2320\CAS(Claim Level Adjustment).
//Retrieve the recordset values
myRS = ec_VariableHelper.GetRecordSet(&quot;Claim_2320CAS_2000C&quot;);
var resArr = new Array();
//Get the input values to the array 'resArr'
for (var i = 0; i &lt; 20; i++) resArr [i] = ec_DataHelper.GetValueByIndex(i);
//Update the recordset with the values of the array 'resArr'
myRS.insertRow();
myRS.updateRow(resArr);
ec_VariableHelper.SetRecordSet(&quot;Claim_2320CAS_2000C&quot;, myRS, true);</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="12174" FP="A" P="0" N="value1"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="12175" FP="A" P="1" C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="1418" N="SubString_2330B_ZipCode" T="Substring"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{a2e970b9-d1eb-4551-9d3b-55c439527346}">Take the frist 5 characters of the input value.</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="start">0</P><P N="length">5</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="12332" FP="A" N="v"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="12331" FP="X" N="r"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="1419" N="SubString_2330B_ZipCodeSuffix" T="Substring"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{a2e970b9-d1eb-4551-9d3b-55c439527346}">Take 4 characters starting from the 5th character.</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="start">5</P><P N="length">4</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="12334" FP="A" N="v"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="12333" FP="X" N="r"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="1424" T="LookAhead"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{a2e970b9-d1eb-4551-9d3b-55c439527346}">Takes the value of the element DTP03, of 2430 loop.</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="lookupUPath">/Transaction(ID = '837', Instance = 'current()')/Loop(ID = '2000C', Instance = 'current()')/Loop(ID = '2300', Instance = 'current()')/Loop(ID = '2400', Instance = 'current()')/Loop(ID = '2430', Instance = 'current()')/Segment(ID = 'DTP', Instance = 'current()')/Element(ID = '1251')</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="12375" FP="_AP" N="a"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="12374" FP="X" N="r"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="1425" N="JavaScript_EOBDate" T="JScript"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{a2e970b9-d1eb-4551-9d3b-55c439527346}">Performs null check for the variable FirstInstance_2430Date_2000C, maps if it is null.</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">var date2430 = ec_DataHelper.GetValueByIndex(0);
var firstinstance2430 = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;FirstInstance_2430Date_2000C&quot;);
if(firstinstance2430 == &quot;&quot;){
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0, date2430);
}</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="12377" FP="A" P="0" N="value1"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="12376" FP="X" P="0" N="result1"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="1426" T="ChangeVariable"><Ps C="S"><P N="variableID">77</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="12378" FP="A" N="v"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="1427" T="ChangeVariable"><Ps C="S"><P N="variableID">78</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="12379" FP="A" N="v"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="1428" T="ChangeVariable"><Ps C="S"><P N="variableID">78</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="12380" FP="_AP" N="a"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="12381" FP="A" N="v"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="1429" T="Increment"><Ps C="S"><P N="variableID">75</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="12382" FP="_AP" N="a"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="1430" T="ChangeVariable"><Ps C="S"><P N="variableID">80</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="12383" FP="A" N="v"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="1431" N="ServiceAdjustmentInput" T="JScript"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{a2e970b9-d1eb-4551-9d3b-55c439527346}">Takes the input value and forms recordset.</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">//Record Set &quot;ServiceAdjustment&quot; has information from 2430\CAS(Line Adjustment).
var GroupCode = ec_DataHelper.GetValueByIndex(0);
//Retrieve the recordset values
myRS = ec_VariableHelper.GetRecordSet(&quot;ServiceAdjustment_2000C&quot;);
var resArr = new Array();
//Get the input values to the array &quot;resArr&quot;
for (var i = 0; i &lt; 19; i++) resArr [i] = ec_DataHelper.GetValueByIndex(i);
//Update the recorset with elements of the array &quot;resArr&quot;
myRS.insertRow();
myRS.updateRow(resArr);
ec_VariableHelper.SetRecordSet(&quot;ServiceAdjustment_2000C&quot;, myRS, true);
</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="12386" FP="A" P="0" N="value1"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="12387" FP="A" P="1" N="value2"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="12388" FP="A" P="2" N="value3"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="12389" FP="A" P="3" N="value4"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="12390" FP="A" P="4" N="value5"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="12391" FP="A" P="5" N="value6"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="12392" FP="A" P="6" N="value7"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="12393" FP="A" P="7" N="value8"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="12394" FP="A" P="8" N="value9"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="12395" FP="A" P="9" N="value10"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="12396" FP="A" P="10" N="value11"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="12397" FP="A" P="11" N="value12"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="12398" FP="A" P="12" N="value13"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="12399" FP="A" P="13" N="value14"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="12400" FP="A" P="14" N="value15"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="12401" FP="A" P="15" N="value16"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="12402" FP="A" P="16" N="value17"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="12403" FP="A" P="17" N="value18"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="12404" FP="A" P="18" N="value19"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="12385" FP="X" P="0" N="no output"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="1432" N="JavaScript_RecordSetClear" T="JScript"><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">myRS = ec_VariableHelper.GetRecordSet(&quot;ServiceAdjustment_2000C&quot;);
myRS.clear();</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="12406" FP="_AP" N="a"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="12407" FP="A" P="0" N="value1"/><CP ID="12405" FP="X" P="0" N="result1"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="1433" N="JavaScript_ServiceAdjustmentOutput" T="JScript"><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">//Gets the recordset &quot;ServiceAdjustment_2000C&quot;
myRS = ec_VariableHelper.GetRecordSet(&quot;ServiceAdjustment_2000C&quot;);//CO PR
myRS.last();
var RS = myRS.getRow();
var arrayResult = [0,0,0,0,0,0,0,0,0];//Initialize array
allowedAmt_Line = 0;
var netPaidAmt = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;SVD02_SumAmt_2000C_2430&quot;);//NetPaidAmount
var billedAmount = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;SV203_billedAmount_2400_2000C&quot;);//BilledAmount
var Loop2430_Present = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;Flag_2430Present_2000C&quot;);
if(netPaidAmt!= &quot;&quot;)
{
allowedAmt_Line = netPaidAmt;
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(9, netPaidAmt);//netPaidAmount
}
while (RS&gt;0)
{
Fields = myRS.getFields();
for (var i=0; i&lt;6; i++)
{
if (Fields[0] == &quot;PR&quot;)//Enters if ClaimAdjustmentGroupCode is &quot;PR&quot;
{
switch (Fields[i*3+1])
{
case &quot;1&quot;:
arrayResult[0] = +arrayResult[0] + +Fields[i*3+2];// Assign sum of monetary amounts when ClaimAdjustmentReasonCode is '1' to array index '0'
break;
case &quot;2&quot;:
arrayResult[1] = +arrayResult[1] + +Fields[i*3+2];//Assign sum of monetary amounts when ClaimAdjustmentReasonCode is '2' to array index '1'
break;
case &quot;225&quot;:
arrayResult[2] = +arrayResult[2] + +Fields[i*3+2];
break;
case &quot;237&quot;:
arrayResult[2] = +arrayResult[2] + +Fields[i*3+2];
break;
case &quot;B4&quot;:
arrayResult[2] = +arrayResult[2] + +Fields[i*3+2];
break;
// Assign sum of monetary amounts when ClaimAdjustmentReasonCode is '225', '237', and 'B4'  to array index '2'
case &quot;3&quot;:
arrayResult[3] = +arrayResult[3] + +Fields[i*3+2];// Assign sum of monetary amounts when ClaimAdjustmentReasonCode is '3' to array index '3'
break;
default:
arrayResult[6] = +arrayResult[6] + +Fields[i*3+2];// Sum of monetary amounts for other values of ClaimAdjustmentReasonCode
}
allowedAmt_Line = +allowedAmt_Line + +Fields[i*3+2];//monetary amount + NetPaidAmount
}
else
{
if (Fields[0] == &quot;CO&quot;)//Enters when ClaimAdjustmentGroupCode is &quot;CO&quot;
{
switch (Fields[i*3+1])// ClaimAdjustmentReasonCode
{
case &quot;225&quot;:
arrayResult[4] = +arrayResult[4] + +Fields[i*3+2];
break;
case &quot;237&quot;:
arrayResult[4] = +arrayResult[4] + +Fields[i*3+2];
break;
case &quot;B4&quot;:
arrayResult[4] = +arrayResult[4] + +Fields[i*3+2];
break;
// Assign sum of monetary amounts when ClaimAdjustmentReasonCode is '225', '237', and 'B4'  to array index '4'
case &quot;45&quot;:
arrayResult[5] = +arrayResult[5] + +Fields[i*3+2];// Assign the sum of monetary amounts when ClaimAdjustmentReasonCode is '45' to array index '5'
break;
case &quot;105&quot;:
arrayResult[8] = +arrayResult[8] + +Fields[i*3+2];
break;
default:
arrayResult[7] = +arrayResult[7] + +Fields[i*3+2];//Sum of monetary amounts for other values of ClaimAdjustmentReasonCode
}
}
}
}
ec_ResultHelper.Send();
myRS.previous();
RS = myRS.getRow();
}
arrayResult[6] = +arrayResult[6]+ +arrayResult[7];
// Report the elemnts of the array &quot;arrayResult&quot;
for (var i=0; i&lt;7; i++)
{
if (arrayResult[i] != 0 &amp;&amp; arrayResult[i]!= &quot;&quot; &amp;&amp; arrayResult[i]!= undefined)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(i, parseFloat(arrayResult[i]).toFixed(2));
}
}
if (arrayResult[8] != 0)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(12, arrayResult[8]);
}
if(Loop2430_Present == &quot;1&quot;)
{
if(allowedAmt_Line!=0 &amp;&amp; allowedAmt_Line !=&quot;&quot; &amp;&amp; allowedAmt_Line!= undefined)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(7,parseFloat(allowedAmt_Line).toFixed(2));//Allowed amount
}
else
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(7, &quot;0.00&quot;);
}
}
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(8, billedAmount)//billedAmount
var amt = ec_DataHelper.GetValueByIndex(0);
if ((amt != &quot;&quot;)) ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(11,amt);//MemberResponsibilityAmount
</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="12418" FP="_AP" N="a"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="14260" FP="A" P="0" N="value1" DirectValue="{88}"/><CP ID="12408" FP="X" P="0" N="CAS03,06,09,12,15,18_DeductibleAmt"/><CP ID="12409" FP="X" P="1" N="CAS03,06,09,12,15,18_CoInsurance"/><CP ID="12410" FP="X" P="2" N="CAS03,06,09,12,15,18_MemberPenality"/><CP ID="12411" FP="X" P="3" N="CAS03,06,09,12,15,18_CoPay"/><CP ID="12412" FP="X" P="4" N="CAS03,06,09,12,15,18_ProviderPenality"/><CP ID="12413" FP="X" P="5" N="CAS03,06,09,12,15,18_DiscountAmt"/><CP ID="12414" FP="X" P="6" N="CAS03,06,09,12,15,18_NonCoveredAmount"/><CP ID="12415" FP="X" P="7" N="2430_SVD02"/><CP ID="12416" FP="X" P="8" N="2400_SV203"/><CP ID="12417" FP="X" P="9" N="2430_SVD02_NetPaidAmt"/><CP ID="12493" FP="X" P="10" N="noOutput"/><CP ID="14261" FP="X" P="11" N="2430_AMT02"/><CP ID="14582" FP="X" P="12" N="taxAmount"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="1435" N="JavaScript_2430_CAS_Input" T="JScript"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{a2e970b9-d1eb-4551-9d3b-55c439527346}">Take the input from 2430 loop segments and forms a recordset.</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">var Line_PayerCheck = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;Line_PayerCheck_2000C&quot;);
var resArr = new Array();
var lineNum = ec_DataHelper.GetValueByIndex(19);
var payerId = ec_DataHelper.GetValueByIndex(20);
var myRSLine_Payer = lineNum + &quot;-&quot; + payerId;
myRS = ec_VariableHelper.GetRecordSet(&quot;LineCAS_CO_PR_2000C&quot;);
myRS.first();
var arrayLinePayer = &quot;&quot;;
var found_payer = 0;
if(Line_PayerCheck.length &gt; 0)
{
var splitRes = Line_PayerCheck.split(&quot;|&quot;);
for(var j=0;j&lt;splitRes.length;j++)
{
if (splitRes[j] == myRSLine_Payer)
{
found_payer = 1;
}
}
}
if (found_payer == 0)
{
for (var i = 0; i &lt; 21; i++) resArr [i] = ec_DataHelper.GetValueByIndex(i);
myRS.insertRow();
myRS.updateRow(resArr);
ec_VariableHelper.SetRecordSet(&quot;LineCAS_CO_PR_2000C&quot;, myRS, true);
}
else
{
//Update/Add to existing row:
var casArray_Temp = new Array();//create new array
for (var i = 0; i &lt; 21; i++) casArray_Temp [i] = ec_DataHelper.GetValueByIndex(i); //casArray_Temp[19]-linenum,casArray_Temp[20]-svd01
var counter = 0;
var newCASArray = new Array(21); //creating array with length 21
for(var j=1; j&lt;casArray_Temp.length-2; j=j+3)
{
var found_CAS = 0;
myRS = ec_VariableHelper.GetRecordSet(&quot;LineCAS_CO_PR_2000C&quot;);
myRS.first();
var RS1 = myRS.getRow();
while(RS1&gt;0)
{
Fields = myRS.getFields();
arrayLinePayer = Fields[19] + &quot;-&quot; + Fields[20];
if(myRSLine_Payer == arrayLinePayer)
{
if(casArray_Temp[0] == Fields[0])
{
switch (casArray_Temp[j])
{
case Fields[1]:
Fields[2] = +Fields[2] + +casArray_Temp[j+1];
if(casArray_Temp[j+2] != &quot;&quot;)
{
Fields[3] = +Fields[3] + +casArray_Temp[j+2];
}
found_CAS = 1;
break;
case Fields[4]:
Fields[5] = +Fields[5] + +casArray_Temp[j+1];
if(casArray_Temp[j+2] != &quot;&quot;)
{
Fields[6] = +Fields[6] + +casArray_Temp[j+2];
}
found_CAS = 1;
break;
case Fields[7]:
Fields[8] = +Fields[8] + +casArray_Temp[j+1];
if(casArray_Temp[j+2] != &quot;&quot;)
{
Fields[9] = +Fields[9] + +casArray_Temp[j+2];
}
found_CAS = 1;
break;
case Fields[10]:
Fields[11] = +Fields[11] + +casArray_Temp[j+1];
if(casArray_Temp[j+2] != &quot;&quot;)
{
Fields[12] = +Fields[12] + +casArray_Temp[j+2];
}
found_CAS = 1;
break;
case Fields[13]:
Fields[14] = +Fields[14] + +casArray_Temp[j+1];
if(casArray_Temp[j+2] != &quot;&quot;)
{
Fields[15] = +Fields[15] + +casArray_Temp[j+2];
}
found_CAS = 1;
break;
case Fields[16]:
Fields[17] = +Fields[17] + +casArray_Temp[j+1];
if(casArray_Temp[j+2] != &quot;&quot;)
{
Fields[18] = +Fields[18] + +casArray_Temp[j+2];
}
found_CAS = 1;
break;
}
myRS.updateRow(Fields);
ec_VariableHelper.SetRecordSet(&quot;LineCAS_CO_PR_2000C&quot;, myRS, true);
}
}
myRS.next();
RS1 = myRS.getRow();
}
if ((found_CAS == 0) &amp;&amp; (casArray_Temp[j]!=&quot;undefined&quot;) &amp;&amp; (casArray_Temp[j]!=&quot;&quot;))
{
if (counter == 0)
{
newCASArray[19] = casArray_Temp[19];
newCASArray[20] = casArray_Temp[20];
newCASArray[0] = casArray_Temp[0];
}
counter = counter + 1;
newCASArray[counter] = casArray_Temp[j];
newCASArray[counter+1] = casArray_Temp[j+1];
newCASArray[counter+2] = casArray_Temp[j+2];
}
}
if (newCASArray.length &gt; 0)
{
myRS.insertRow();
myRS.updateRow(newCASArray);
ec_VariableHelper.SetRecordSet(&quot;LineCAS_CO_PR_2000C&quot;, myRS, true);
}
}
</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="12422" FP="A" P="0" N="value1"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="12423" FP="A" P="1" N="value2"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="12424" FP="A" P="2" N="value3"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="12425" FP="A" P="3" N="value4"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="12426" FP="A" P="4" N="value5"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="12427" FP="A" P="5" N="value6"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="12428" FP="A" P="6" N="value7"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="12429" FP="A" P="7" N="value8"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="12430" FP="A" P="8" N="value9"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="12431" FP="A" P="9" N="value10"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="12432" FP="A" P="10" N="value11"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="12433" FP="A" P="11" N="value12"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="12434" FP="A" P="12" N="value13"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="12435" FP="A" P="13" N="value14"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="12436" FP="A" P="14" N="value15"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="12437" FP="A" P="15" N="value16"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="12438" FP="A" P="16" N="value17"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="12439" FP="A" P="17" N="value18"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="12440" FP="A" P="18" N="value19"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="12441" FP="A" P="19" N="value20" DirectValue="{78}"/><CP ID="12442" FP="A" P="20" N="value21" DirectValue="{80}"/><CP ID="12421" FP="X" P="0" N="result1"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="1436" N="ServiceLineCAScodes_Output" T="JScript"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{a2e970b9-d1eb-4551-9d3b-55c439527346}">Trigger the recordset based on activation.</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">myRS3 = ec_VariableHelper.GetRecordSet(&quot;LineCAS_CO_PR_2000C&quot;);//CO PR
lineNum = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;LineNumber_2000C&quot;);
myRS3.last();
var RS3 = myRS3.getRow();
while (RS3&gt;0)
{
Fields3 = myRS3.getFields();
if(Fields3[19] == lineNum)
{
for (var i=0; i&lt;6; i++)
{
if((Fields3[i*3+1] != &quot;&quot;) &amp;&amp; (Fields3[i*3+1] != &quot;undefined&quot;))
{
var CASamount = parseFloat(Fields3[i*3+2]);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0, Fields3[i*3+1]);//Cascode
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(1, Fields3[0]);//Groupcode
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(2, CASamount.toFixed(2));//Amount
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(3, Fields3[i*3+3]);//Quantity
ec_ResultHelper.Send();
}
}
}
myRS3.previous();
RS3 = myRS3.getRow();
}</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="12447" FP="_AP" N="a"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="12448" FP="A" P="0" N="value0"/><CP ID="12443" FP="X" P="0" N="2430_CAS02,05,08,11,14,17"/><CP ID="12444" FP="X" P="1" N="2430_CAS01"/><CP ID="12445" FP="X" P="2" N="2430_CAS03,06,09,12,15,18"/><CP ID="12446" FP="X" P="3" N="2430_CAS04,07,10,13,16,19"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="1437" T="ChangeVariable"><Ps C="S"><P N="variableID">80</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="12449" FP="_AP" N="a"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="12450" FP="A" N="v"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="1438" T="ChangeVariable"><Ps C="S"><P N="variableID">82</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="12451" FP="_AP" N="a"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="12452" FP="A" N="v" DirectValue="1"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="1440" T="ChangeVariable"><Ps C="S"><P N="variableID">82</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="12455" FP="_AP" N="a"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="12456" FP="A" N="v" DirectValue="0"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="1441" N="JavaScript_LineAjuducationInformation_Input" T="JScript"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{a2e970b9-d1eb-4551-9d3b-55c439527346}">Takes the input and forms recordset.</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">//Get recordset values
var Line_PayerCheck = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;Line_PayerCheck_2000C&quot;);
var resArr = new Array();
var lineNum = ec_DataHelper.GetValueByIndex(4);
var payerId = ec_DataHelper.GetValueByIndex(3);
var myRSLine_Payer = lineNum + &quot;-&quot; + payerId;
myRS = ec_VariableHelper.GetRecordSet(&quot;Service_2430Details_2000C&quot;);
myRS.first();
var arrayLinePayer = &quot;&quot;;
var found_payer = 0;
if(Line_PayerCheck.length &gt; 0)
{
var splitRes = Line_PayerCheck.split(&quot;|&quot;);
for(var j=0;j&lt;splitRes.length;j++)
{
if (splitRes[j] == myRSLine_Payer)
{
found_payer = 1;
}
}
}
if (found_payer == 0)
{	//Update the recordset with the values of array &quot;resArr&quot;
for (var i = 0; i &lt; 7; i++) resArr [i] = ec_DataHelper.GetValueByIndex(i);
myRS.insertRow();
myRS.updateRow(resArr);
ec_VariableHelper.SetRecordSet(&quot;Service_2430Details_2000C&quot;, myRS, true);
}
else
{
//Update/Add to existing row:
var RS1 = myRS.getRow();
var netPaid = ec_DataHelper.GetValueByIndex(0);
var memberResponsibility = ec_DataHelper.GetValueByIndex(2);
var remitDate = ec_DataHelper.GetValueByIndex(1);
while(RS1&gt;0)
{
Fields = myRS.getFields();
arrayLinePayer = Fields[4] + &quot;-&quot; + Fields[3];
if(myRSLine_Payer == arrayLinePayer)
{
Fields[0] = +Fields[0] + +netPaid;
if(memberResponsibility!=&quot;&quot;)
{
Fields[2] = +Fields[2] + +memberResponsibility;
}
if (Fields[1] &lt; remitDate)
{
Fields[1] = remitDate;
}
myRS.updateRow(Fields);
}
myRS.next();
RS1 = myRS.getRow();
}
ec_VariableHelper.SetRecordSet(&quot;Service_2430Details_2000C&quot;, myRS, true);
}</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="12458" FP="A" P="0" N="value1"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="12459" FP="A" P="1" N="value2"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="12460" FP="A" P="2" N="value3"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="12461" FP="A" P="3" N="value4"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="14459" FP="A" P="4" N="value5" DirectValue="{78}"/><CP ID="14460" FP="A" P="5" N="value6" DirectValue="{83}"/><CP ID="14595" FP="A" P="6" N="value7" DirectValue="&quot;false&quot;"/><CP ID="12457" FP="X" P="0" N="result1"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="1446" N="JavaScript-2000B-2300_DateFormatConversion" T="JScript"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{a2e970b9-d1eb-4551-9d3b-55c439527346}">Converts date from yyyymmd to yyyy-mm-dd.</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">
//Change date to format yyy-mm-dd
var date = ec_DataHelper.GetValueByIndex(0);
var date1 = date.substring(0,4);
var date2 = date.substring(4,6);
var date3 = date.substring(6,8);
//Report the result to the zeroth index
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0,date1+&quot;-&quot;+date2+&quot;-&quot;+date3);
</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="12477" FP="A" P="0" N="value1"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="12476" FP="X" P="0" N="result1"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="1448" N="JavaScript-2000C-2300_DateFormatConversion" T="JScript"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{a2e970b9-d1eb-4551-9d3b-55c439527346}">Converts date from yyyymmd to yyyy-mm-dd.</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">

var date3 = date.substring(6,8);
//Report the result to the zeroth index
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0,date1+&quot;-&quot;+date2+&quot;-&quot;+date3);
</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="12481" FP="A" P="0" N="value1"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="12480" FP="X" P="0" N="result1"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="1449" T="ChangeVariable"><Ps C="S"><P N="{a2e970b9-d1eb-4551-9d3b-55c439527346}">Removing extra space from the value</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="paddings">{Space}</P><P N="type">0</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="12520" FP="A" N="v"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="12519" FP="X" N="r"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="1464" N="JavaScript-2000B-ST/BHT" T="JScript"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{a2e970b9-d1eb-4551-9d3b-55c439527346}">Get the variable from the respective variables and maps to the target guideline for subscriber claims</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">//Retrieve the values from chnage varibales and assigns to the respectives variables
var ST02 = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;ST02_TransactionControlNumber&quot;);
var BHT03 = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;BHT03_ReferenceIdentification&quot;);
var BHT04 = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;BHT04_Date&quot;);
var ISA06 = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;ISA06_SenderId&quot;);
var RecordID = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;uniqueId&quot;);
var ClaimSource = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;ClaimSource&quot;);
var ClaimDeliveryType = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;ClaimDeliveryType&quot;);
//Check for &quot;empty&quot; and &quot;NULL&quot; values
if(ST02 !=&quot;&quot; &amp;&amp; ST02 !=&quot;NULL&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0,ST02);
}
//Check for &quot;empty&quot; and &quot;NULL&quot; values
if(BHT03 !=&quot;&quot; &amp;&amp; BHT03 !=&quot;NULL&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(1,BHT03);
}
//Check for &quot;empty&quot; and &quot;NULL&quot; values
if(BHT04 !=&quot;&quot; &amp;&amp; BHT04 !=&quot;NULL&quot;)
{
//Converts date to YYYY-MM-DD format
var date1 = BHT04.substring(0,4);
var date2 = BHT04.substring(4,6);
var date3 = BHT04.substring(6,8);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(2,date1+&quot;-&quot;+date2+&quot;-&quot;+date3);
}
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(3,&quot;1&quot;);
if(ClaimDeliveryType != &quot;&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(4,ClaimDeliveryType);
}
if(ClaimSource != &quot;&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(5,ClaimSource);
}
//ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(5,ISA06.trim());
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(6,&quot;Supplier&quot;);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(7,&quot;1&quot;);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(8,&quot;Submitted Claim Key&quot;);// mapped to ClaimUDT
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(9,RecordID);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(10,&quot;Internal Claim Identifiers&quot;);
</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="12531" FP="_AP" N="a"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="12532" FP="A" P="0" N="value1"/><CP ID="12524" FP="X" P="0" N="ST02"/><CP ID="12525" FP="X" P="1" N="BHT03"/><CP ID="12526" FP="X" P="2" N="BHT04"/><CP ID="12527" FP="X" P="3" N="Medical(1)"/><CP ID="12528" FP="X" P="4" N="ISA06-S/E"/><CP ID="12529" FP="X" P="5" N="ISA06"/><CP ID="12530" FP="X" P="6" N="Supplier"/><CP ID="12534" FP="X" P="7" N="claimPayorType-1"/><CP ID="14658" FP="X" P="8" N="Submitted Claim Key"/><CP ID="14659" FP="X" P="9" N="UniqueID"/><CP ID="14676" FP="X" P="10" N="Internal Claim Identifiers"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="1466" N="JavaScript-2000C-ST/BHT" T="JScript"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{a2e970b9-d1eb-4551-9d3b-55c439527346}">Retrieves the varibale values and maps to the target XML tags for patient claims.</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">//Retrieve the values from chnage varibales and assigns to the respectives variables

var BHT03 = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;BHT03_ReferenceIdentification&quot;);
var BHT04 = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;BHT04_Date&quot;);

var RecordID = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;uniqueId&quot;);
var ClaimSource = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;ClaimSource&quot;);
var ClaimDeliveryType = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;ClaimDeliveryType&quot;);
//Check for &quot;empty&quot; and &quot;NULL&quot; values
if(ST02 !=&quot;&quot; &amp;&amp; ST02 !=&quot;NULL&quot;)
{

}
//Check for &quot;empty&quot; and &quot;NULL&quot; values
if(BHT03 !=&quot;&quot; &amp;&amp; BHT03 !=&quot;NULL&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(1,BHT03);
}
//Check for &quot;empty&quot; and &quot;NULL&quot; values
if(BHT04 !=&quot;&quot; &amp;&amp; BHT04 !=&quot;NULL&quot;)
{
//Converts date to YYYY-MM-DD format
var date1 = BHT04.substring(0,4);
var date2 = BHT04.substring(4,6);
var date3 = BHT04.substring(6,8);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(2,date1+&quot;-&quot;+date2+&quot;-&quot;+date3);
}
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(3,&quot;1&quot;);
if(ClaimDeliveryType != &quot;&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(4,ClaimDeliveryType);
}
if(ClaimSource != &quot;&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(5,ClaimSource);
}
//ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(5,ISA06.trim());
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(6,&quot;Supplier&quot;);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(7,&quot;1&quot;);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(8,&quot;Submitted Claim Key&quot;);// mapped to ClaimUDT
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(9,RecordID);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(10,&quot;Internal Claim Identifiers&quot;);
</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="12553" FP="_AP" N="a"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="12554" FP="A" P="0" N="value1"/><CP ID="12545" FP="X" P="0" N="ST02"/><CP ID="12546" FP="X" P="1" N="BHT03"/><CP ID="12547" FP="X" P="2" N="BHT04"/><CP ID="12548" FP="X" P="3" N="Medical(1)"/><CP ID="12549" FP="X" P="4" N="ISA06-S/E"/><CP ID="12550" FP="X" P="5" N="ISA06"/><CP ID="12551" FP="X" P="6" N="Supplier"/><CP ID="12552" FP="X" P="7" N="claimPayorType-1"/><CP ID="14660" FP="X" P="8" N="Submitted Claim Key"/><CP ID="14661" FP="X" P="9" N="uniqueId"/><CP ID="14677" FP="X" P="10" N="Internal Claim Identifiers"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="1468" N="JavaScript_SubmitterName_SubscriberClaim" T="JScript"><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">//Retrieves the values from change variables and assign it to the corresponding variable
var NM103 = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;NM103_1000A&quot;).trim();
var NM109 = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;NM109_1000A&quot;).trim();
//Checks for empty and &quot;NULL&quot; values

{

}
//Checks for empty and &quot;NULL&quot; values
if(NM109 !=&quot;&quot; &amp;&amp; NM103 !=&quot;NULL&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(1,NM109);
}</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="12562" FP="_AP" N="a"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="12560" FP="A" P="0" N="value1"/><CP ID="12561" FP="X" P="0" N="NM103"/><CP ID="12563" FP="X" P="1" N="NM109"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="1470" N="JavaScript_SubmitterName_PatientClaim" T="JScript"><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">//Retrieves the values from change variables and assign it to the corresponding variable
var NM103 = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;NM103_1000A&quot;).trim();
var NM109 = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;NM109_1000A&quot;).trim();
//Checks for empty and &quot;NULL&quot; values
if(NM103 !=&quot;&quot; &amp;&amp; NM103 !=&quot;NULL&quot;)
{

}

ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(1,NM109);
}</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="12570" FP="_AP" N="a"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="12571" FP="A" P="0" N="value1"/><CP ID="12568" FP="X" P="0" N="NM103"/><CP ID="12569" FP="X" P="1" N="NM109"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="1472" N="JavaScript_SubscriberName_SubscriberClaim" T="JScript"><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">//Get the values from the change variable and assign to the respective variables
var N301 = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;N301_2010BA&quot;).trim();
var N401 = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;N401_2010BA&quot;).trim();
var N402 = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;N402_2010BA&quot;).trim();
var N403 = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;N403_2010BA&quot;).trim();
var N404 = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;N404_2010BA&quot;).trim();
var NM109 = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;NM109_2010BA&quot;).trim();
var DMG02 = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;DMG02_2010BA&quot;).trim();
var DMG03 = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;DMG03_2010BA&quot;).trim();
var NM103 = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;NM103_2010BA&quot;).trim();
var NM104 = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;NM104_2010BA&quot;).trim();
var NM105 = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;NM105_2010BA&quot;).trim();
var NM107 = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;NM107_2010BA&quot;).trim();
//Report the result if the value is not empty
if(N301 !=&quot;&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0,N301);
}
//Report the result if the value is not empty
if(N401 !=&quot;&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(1,N401);
}
//Report the result if the value is not empty
if(N402 !=&quot;&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(2,N402);
}
//Report the result if the value is not empty
if(N403 !=&quot;&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(3,N403);
}
//Report the result if the value is not empty
if(N404 !=&quot;&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(4,N404);
}
else
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(4,&quot;US&quot;);
//Report the result if the value is not empty
if(NM109 !=&quot;&quot;)
{
//NM109 = NM109.replace(/[^\w ]/g, '');//Replace special characters
NM109 = NM109.replace(/[^\w\-]/g, '');
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(5,NM109);
}
//Report the result if the value is not empty
if(DMG02 !=&quot;&quot;)
{
//Change the date format to yyyy-mm-dd
var date1 = DMG02.substring(0,4);
var date2 = DMG02.substring(4,6);
var date3 = DMG02.substring(6,8);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(6,date1+&quot;-&quot;+date2+&quot;-&quot;+date3);
}
//Report the result if the value is not empty
if(DMG03 !=&quot;&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(7,DMG03);
}
//Report the result if the value is not empty
if(NM103 !=&quot;&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(8,NM103);
}
//Report the result if the value is not empty
if(NM104 !=&quot;&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(9,NM104);
}
//Report the result if the value is not empty
if(NM105 !=&quot;&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(10,NM105);
}
//Report the result if the value is not empty
if(NM107 !=&quot;&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(11,NM107);
}
var subName ;//declare the variable to store the subscriber full name
//Check whether corresponding names are present, concatenates add spaces only if required
/*if (NM104) {

}

} else {

}
}
if (NM107) {

subName += &quot;,&quot; + NM107;
} else {
subName = NM107;
}
}*/
subName=NM103+&quot;,&quot;+NM105+&quot;,&quot;+NM104+&quot;,&quot;+NM107;
//Trim and report the result
if(subName!=undefined)
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(12,subName.trim());
ec_ResultHelper.Send();</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="12579" FP="_AP" N="a"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="12577" FP="A" P="0" N="value1"/><CP ID="12578" FP="X" P="0" N="N301"/><CP ID="12580" FP="X" P="1" N="N401"/><CP ID="12581" FP="X" P="2" N="N402"/><CP ID="12582" FP="X" P="3" N="N403"/><CP ID="12583" FP="X" P="4" N="N404"/><CP ID="12584" FP="X" P="5" N="NM109"/><CP ID="12585" FP="X" P="6" N="DMG02"/><CP ID="12586" FP="X" P="7" N="DMG03"/><CP ID="12594" FP="X" P="8" N="NM103"/><CP ID="12595" FP="X" P="9" N="NM104"/><CP ID="12596" FP="X" P="10" N="NM105"/><CP ID="12597" FP="X" P="11" N="NM107"/><CP ID="12598" FP="X" P="12" N="Full Name"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="1473" T="ChangeVariable"><Ps C="S"><P N="variableID">1</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="12587" FP="A" N="v"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="1475" T="ChangeVariable"><Ps C="S"><P N="variableID">2</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="12589" FP="A" N="v"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="1477" T="ChangeVariable"><Ps C="S"><P N="variableID">3</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="12591" FP="A" N="v"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="1479" T="ChangeVariable"><Ps C="S"><P N="variableID">4</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="12593" FP="A" N="v"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="1481" N="JavaScript_SubscriberName_PatientClaim" T="JScript"><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">//Get the values from the change variable and assign to the respective variables
var N301 = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;N301_2010BA&quot;).trim();
var N401 = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;N401_2010BA&quot;).trim();
var N402 = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;N402_2010BA&quot;).trim();

}
}

{

</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">//Retrieve the recordset values
myRS1 = ec_VariableHelper.GetRecordSet(&quot;RS_OtherProcedureInfo&quot;);
//Get the recordset values to the array &quot;Fields1&quot;
Fields1 = myRS1.getFields();
for(var i = 0; i &lt; 6; i++)
{
if(Fields1[(2*i)+1]!='')//Changes format of DateTimePeriod to YYYY-MM-DD
{
var date = Fields1[(2*i)+1];
var date1 = date.substring(0,4);
var date2 = date.substring(4,6);
var date3 = date.substring(6,8);
Fields1[(2*i)+1] = date1+&quot;-&quot;+date2+&quot;-&quot;+date3;
}
}
//Report result from array &quot;Fields1&quot; to indexes
for(var i = 0; i &lt; 12; i++)
{  if(Fields1[i]!=undefined)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(i,Fields1[i]);

</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">//Retrieve the recordset values
myRS1 = ec_VariableHelper.GetRecordSet(&quot;RS_OccurrenceInfo&quot;);
//Get the recordset values to the array &quot;Fields1&quot;
Fields1 = myRS1.getFields();
for(var i = 0; i &lt; 6; i++)
{
if(Fields1[(2*i)+1]!='')//Changes format of DateTimePeriod to YYYY-MM-DD
{
var date = Fields1[(2*i)+1];
var date1 = date.substring(0,4);
var date2 = date.substring(4,6);
var date3 = date.substring(6,8);
Fields1[(2*i)+1] = date1+&quot;-&quot;+date2+&quot;-&quot;+date3;
}
}
//Report result from array &quot;Fields1&quot; to indexes
for(var i = 0; i &lt; 12; i++)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(i,Fields1[i]);
}
</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="12976" FP="_AP" N="a"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="12977" FP="A" P="0" N="value1"/><CP ID="12963" FP="X" P="0" N="HI01.02"/><CP ID="12964" FP="X" P="1" N="HI01.04"/><CP ID="12965" FP="X" P="2" N="HI02.02"/><CP ID="12966" FP="X" P="3" N="HI02.04"/><CP ID="12967" FP="X" P="4" N="HI03.02"/><CP ID="12968" FP="X" P="5" N="HI03.04"/><CP ID="12969" FP="X" P="6" N="HI04.02"/><CP ID="12970" FP="X" P="7" N="HI04.04"/><CP ID="12971" FP="X" P="8" N="HI05.02"/><CP ID="12972" FP="X" P="9" N="HI05.04"/><CP ID="12973" FP="X" P="10" N="HI06.02"/><CP ID="12974" FP="X" P="11" N="HI06.04"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="1524" N="JavaScript_ValueInformation_Input_2" T="JScript"><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">// Retrieve the recordset values

</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">//Retrieve the recordset values

Fields1 = myRS1.getFields();
//Inserts dot after third character of industry code
for(var i = 0; i &lt;6 ; i++)
{
if(Fields1[2*i]!='')//IndustryCode
{
var value = Fields1[2*i];
var v1 = value.substr(0,3);
var result;
var v2 = value.substr(3,value.length-3);
if(v2!=&quot;&quot;)
result = v1+&quot;.&quot;+v2;
else
result = v1;
Fields1[2*i]=result;
}
}
//Report result from array &quot;Fields1&quot; to indexes
for(var i = 0; i &lt; 12; i++)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(i,Fields1[i]);
}</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="13111" FP="_AP" N="a"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="13112" FP="A" P="0" N="value1"/><CP ID="13099" FP="X" P="0" N="HI01.02"/><CP ID="13100" FP="X" P="1" N="HI01.09"/><CP ID="13101" FP="X" P="2" N="HI02.02"/><CP ID="13102" FP="X" P="3" N="HI02.09"/><CP ID="13103" FP="X" P="4" N="HI03.02"/><CP ID="13104" FP="X" P="5" N="HI03.09"/><CP ID="13105" FP="X" P="6" N="HI04.02"/><CP ID="13106" FP="X" P="7" N="HI04.09"/><CP ID="13107" FP="X" P="8" N="HI05.02"/><CP ID="13108" FP="X" P="9" N="HI05.09"/><CP ID="13109" FP="X" P="10" N="HI06.02"/><CP ID="13110" FP="X" P="11" N="HI06.09"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="1534" N="JavaScript_ExternalCauseOfInjury_Output_2" T="JScript"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{a2e970b9-d1eb-4551-9d3b-55c439527346}">Triggers the recordset based on activation and maps the result to target guideline.

</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">//Retrieve the recordset values
myRS1 = ec_VariableHelper.GetRecordSet(&quot;RS_2000C_OtherDiagno&quot;);
//Get the recordset values to the array &quot;Fields1&quot;

for(var i = 0; i &lt;6 ; i++)
{
//Inserts dot after third character of industry code
if(Fields1[2*i]!='')
{
var value = Fields1[2*i];//IndustryCode
var v1 = value.substr(0,3);
var result;
var v2 = value.substr(3,value.length-3);
if(v2!=&quot;&quot;)
result = v1+&quot;.&quot;+v2;
else
result = v1;
Fields1[2*i]=result;
}
}
//Report result from array &quot;Fields1&quot; to indexes
for(var i = 0; i &lt; 12; i++)
{   if(Fields1[i]!=undefined)
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(i,Fields1[i]);
}</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="13207" FP="_AP" N="a"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="13208" FP="A" P="0" N="value1"/><CP ID="13195" FP="X" P="0" N="HI01.02"/><CP ID="13196" FP="X" P="1" N="HI01.09"/><CP ID="13197" FP="X" P="2" N="HI02.02"/><CP ID="13198" FP="X" P="3" N="HI02.09"/><CP ID="13199" FP="X" P="4" N="HI03.02"/><CP ID="13200" FP="X" P="5" N="HI03.09"/><CP ID="13201" FP="X" P="6" N="HI04.02"/><CP ID="13202" FP="X" P="7" N="HI04.09"/><CP ID="13203" FP="X" P="8" N="HI05.02"/><CP ID="13204" FP="X" P="9" N="HI05.09"/><CP ID="13205" FP="X" P="10" N="HI06.02"/><CP ID="13206" FP="X" P="11" N="HI06.09"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="1541" N="JavaScript_OtherDiagnosisInfo_Input_1" T="JScript"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{a2e970b9-d1eb-4551-9d3b-55c439527346}">Take the input from the 23000 loop of 2000B and creates a recordset.

</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">//Retrieve the recordset values
myRS1 = ec_VariableHelper.GetRecordSet(&quot;RS_2000C_OtherProcedureInfo&quot;);
//Get the recordset values to the array &quot;Fields1&quot;
Fields1 = myRS1.getFields();
//Inserts dot after third character of industry code
for(var i = 0; i &lt; 6; i++)
{
if(Fields1[(2*i)+1]!='')//IndustryCode
{
var date = Fields1[(2*i)+1];
var date1 = date.substring(0,4);
var date2 = date.substring(4,6);
var date3 = date.substring(6,8);
Fields1[(2*i)+1] = date1+&quot;-&quot;+date2+&quot;-&quot;+date3;
}
}
//Report result from array &quot;Fields1&quot; to indexes
for(var i = 0; i &lt; 12; i++)
{  if(Fields1[i]!=undefined)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(i,Fields1[i]);
}
}</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="13328" FP="_AP" N="a"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="13329" FP="A" P="0" N="value1"/><CP ID="13316" FP="X" P="0" N="HI01.02"/><CP ID="13317" FP="X" P="1" N="HI01.04"/><CP ID="13318" FP="X" P="2" N="HI02.02"/><CP ID="13319" FP="X" P="3" N="HI02.04"/><CP ID="13320" FP="X" P="4" N="HI03.02"/><CP ID="13321" FP="X" P="5" N="HI03.04"/><CP ID="13322" FP="X" P="6" N="HI04.02"/><CP ID="13323" FP="X" P="7" N="HI04.04"/><CP ID="13324" FP="X" P="8" N="HI05.02"/><CP ID="13325" FP="X" P="9" N="HI05.04"/><CP ID="13326" FP="X" P="10" N="HI06.02"/><CP ID="13327" FP="X" P="11" N="HI06.04"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="1550" N="JavaScript_OtherProcedureInfo_Output_1" T="JScript"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{a2e970b9-d1eb-4551-9d3b-55c439527346}">Triggers the recordset based on activation and maps the result to target guideline.

</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">//Retrieve the recordset values

{

</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">// Retrieve the recordset values
var myRS1 = ec_VariableHelper.GetRecordSet(&quot;RS_2000C_2300_CLM5&quot;);
resArr1 = new Array();
//Get the input values to the array &quot;resArr1&quot;
for(i=0;i&lt;12;i++)
{ if(ec_DataHelper.GetValueByIndex(i)!=void(0) )
{
resArr1[i] = ec_DataHelper.GetValueByIndex(i);
}
}
//Update the recprdset with values of array &quot;resArr1&quot;
myRS1.insertRow();
myRS1.updateRow(resArr1);
ec_VariableHelper.SetRecordSet(&quot;RS_2000C_2300_CLM5&quot;, myRS1, true);
</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="13743" FP="A" P="0" N="value1"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="13744" FP="A" P="1" N="value2"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="13745" FP="A" P="2" N="value3"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="13746" FP="A" P="3" N="value4"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="13747" FP="A" P="4" N="value5"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="13748" FP="A" P="5" N="value6"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="13749" FP="A" P="6" N="value7"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="13750" FP="A" P="7" N="value8"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="13751" FP="A" P="8" N="value9"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="13752" FP="A" P="9" N="value10"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="13753" FP="A" P="10" N="value11"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="13754" FP="A" P="11" N="value12"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="13742" FP="X" P="0" N="result1"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="1704" N="JavaScript_OccurrenceSpanInformation_Input_2" T="JScript"><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">// Retrieve the recordset values

</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">// Retrieve the recordset values
myRS1 = ec_VariableHelper.GetRecordSet(&quot;RS_2000C_2300_CLM6&quot;);
//Get the recordset values to the array &quot;Fields1&quot;
Fields1 = myRS1.getFields();
for(var i = 0; i &lt; 6; i++)
{
if(Fields1[(2*i)+1]!='')//Changes format of DateTimePeriod to YYYY-MM-DD
{
var date = Fields1[(2*i)+1];
var date1 = date.substring(0,4);
var date2 = date.substring(4,6);
var date3 = date.substring(6,8);
Fields1[(2*i)+1] = date1+&quot;-&quot;+date2+&quot;-&quot;+date3;
}
}
//Report result from array &quot;Fields1&quot; to indexes
for(var i = 0; i &lt; 12; i++)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(i,Fields1[i]);
}
</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="13877" FP="_AP" N="a"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="13878" FP="A" P="0" N="value1"/><CP ID="13865" FP="X" P="0" N="HI01.02"/><CP ID="13866" FP="X" P="1" N="HI01.04"/><CP ID="13867" FP="X" P="2" N="HI02.02"/><CP ID="13868" FP="X" P="3" N="HI02.04"/><CP ID="13869" FP="X" P="4" N="HI03.02"/><CP ID="13870" FP="X" P="5" N="HI03.04"/><CP ID="13871" FP="X" P="6" N="HI04.02"/><CP ID="13872" FP="X" P="7" N="HI04.04"/><CP ID="13873" FP="X" P="8" N="HI05.02"/><CP ID="13874" FP="X" P="9" N="HI05.04"/><CP ID="13875" FP="X" P="10" N="HI06.02"/><CP ID="13876" FP="X" P="11" N="HI06.04"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="1725" N="JavaScript_OccurrenceInformation_Input_1" T="JScript"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{a2e970b9-d1eb-4551-9d3b-55c439527346}">Take the input from the 23000 loop of 2000B and creates a recordset.

resArr = new Array();
for(i=0;i&lt;11;i++)
{
//Get the input values to the array &quot;resArr&quot;

{

}
}

ec_VariableHelper.SetRecordSet(&quot;RS_2000C_2300_CLM&quot;, myRS, true);

</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">// Retrieve the recordset values
myRS = ec_VariableHelper.GetRecordSet(&quot;RS_2000C_2300_CLM&quot;);
//Get the recordset values to the array &quot;Fields1&quot;
Fields = myRS.getFields();
//Maps assignment acceptance as &quot;Y&quot; for &quot;A&quot; and &quot;N&quot; for &quot;C&quot;
if(Fields[4] == &quot;A&quot;)
{
Fields[4] = &quot;Y&quot;;
}
else if (Fields[4] == &quot;C&quot;)
{
Fields[4] = &quot;N&quot;;
}
//Report result from array &quot;Fields1&quot; to indexes
for(var i = 0; i &lt; 11; i++)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(i,Fields[i]);
}</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="14138" FP="_AP" N="a"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="14139" FP="A" P="0" N="value1"/><CP ID="14127" FP="X" P="0" N="CLM01"/><CP ID="14128" FP="X" P="1" N="{a2e970b9-d1eb-4551-9d3b-55c439527346}">Converts the date from yyyymmdd to yyyy-mm-dd.
</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">var date = ec_DataHelper.GetValueByIndex(0);
var date1 = date.substring(0,4);
var date2 = date.substring(4,6);
var date3 = date.substring(6,8);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0,date1+&quot;-&quot;+date2+&quot;-&quot;+date3);
</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="14152" FP="A" P="0" N="value1"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="14151" FP="X" P="0" N="result1"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="1760" N="Conditional Copy_AdmissionTimeCount" T="ConditionalCopy"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{a2e970b9-d1eb-4551-9d3b-55c439527346}">Passes the output value when input value equals DT.</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="if_1/conditions/expression_1/arg1">14155</P><P N="if_1/conditions/expression_1/arg1/type">2</P><P N="if_1/conditions/expression_1/operation">0</P><P N="if_1/conditions/expression_1/operation/type">0</P><P N="if_1/conditions/expression_1/arg2">DT</P><P N="if_1/actions/assignment_1/lvalue">14153</P><P N="if_1/actions/assignment_1/lvalue/type">2</P><P N="if_1/actions/assignment_1/rvalue">14156</P><P N="if_1/actions/assignment_1/rvalue/type">2</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="14155" FP="A" P="0" N="value1"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="14156" FP="A" P="1" N="value2"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="14153" FP="X" P="0" N="result1"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="1761" N="Substring_AdmissionDate" T="Substring"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{a2e970b9-d1eb-4551-9d3b-55c439527346}">Takes four characters from the input string starting from 8th character.</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="start">8</P><P N="length">4</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="14158" FP="A" N="v"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="14157" FP="X" N="r"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="1762" N="JavaScript_2300_DateFormatConversion" T="JScript"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{a2e970b9-d1eb-4551-9d3b-55c439527346}">Converts the date from yyyymmdd to yyyy-mm-dd.

myRS.last();
do {
var RS = myRS.getRow();
if (RS &gt; 0)
{
Fields = myRS.getFields();
ec_ResultHelper.Send();
for(i=0;i&lt;7;i++)
{
if(Fields[i]!=&quot;&quot; &amp;&amp; Fields[i] != &quot;undefined&quot; &amp;&amp; Fields[i]!= null)
// Report the value of the field at index i
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(i,Fields[i]);
}
}
}while (myRS.previous());</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="14187" FP="_AP" N="a"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="14188" FP="A" P="0" N="value1"/><CP ID="14177" FP="X" P="0" N="CL1.01"/><CP ID="14178" FP="X" P="1" N="CL1.02"/><CP ID="14179" FP="X" P="2" N="CL1.03"/><CP ID="14180" FP="X" P="3" N="noOutput_1"/><CP ID="14181" FP="X" P="4" N="noOutput_2"/><CP ID="14182" FP="X" P="5" N="PWK06"/><CP ID="14186" FP="X" P="6" N="AMT02(PatientEstimatedAmountDue)"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="1766" N="ConversionalCopy_2300_ReportTransmissionCode" T="ConversionalCopy"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{a2e970b9-d1eb-4551-9d3b-55c439527346}">Converts the input value to the corresponding output value as specified in the table and passes that value.</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="in">,AA,BM,EL,EM,FT,FX</P><P N="out">,Available On Request at Provider Site,By Mail,Electronically Only,E-Mail,File Transfer,By Fax</P><P N="comment">,,,,,,</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="14190" FP="A" N="v"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="14189" FP="X" N="r"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="1767" N="JavaScript_2300_ClaimInfoInput_2" T="JScript"><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">//Retrieve the recordset values

{

C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="14850" FP="X" P="0" N="CodeEntry"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="1928" N="JavaScript_DRG_Output" T="JScript"><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">//Retrieve the recordset values
myRS1 = ec_VariableHelper.GetRecordSet(&quot;RS_2000C_2300_CLM14&quot;);
//Get the rcordset values to the array Fields1
Fields1 = myRS1.getFields();
//Report the Fields1 array values to indexes
for(var i = 0; i &lt; 1; i++)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(i,Fields1[i]);
}</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="14855" FP="_AP" N="a"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="14852" FP="A" P="0" N="value1"/><CP ID="14853" FP="X" P="0" N="HI01.02"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="1930" ID="1945" N="Set Value-tenantId2000B" T="SetValue"><CPs><CP ID="14905" FP="_AP" N="a"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="14903" FP="A" N="v" DirectValue="{108}"/><CP ID="14902" FP="X" N="r"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="1946" N="Set Value-tenantId2000C" T="SetValue"><CPs><CP ID="14909" FP="_AP" N="a"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="14907" FP="A" N="v"
