</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="variableID">26</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="3242" FP="A" N="v"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="378" N="Set Value_2000B" T="SetValue"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{a2e970b9-d1eb-4551-9d3b-55c439527346}">Passes the interchange control number when activated.</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="3252" FP="_AP" N="a"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="3253" FP="A" N="v" DirectValue="{60}"/><CP ID="3251" FP="X" N="r"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="381" N="Set Value_PatientClaim" T="SetValue"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{a2e970b9-d1eb-4551-9d3b-55c439527346}">Set the value of the varibale uniqueId on activation.</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="3261" FP="_AP" N="a"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="3262" FP="A" N="v" DirectValue="{60}"/><CP ID="3260" FP="X" N="r"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="384" T="ChangeVariable"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{a2e970b9-d1eb-4551-9d3b-55c439527346}">Stores the value of ST02.
</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="variableID">28</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="3270" FP="A" N="v"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="395" T="ChangeVariable"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{a2e970b9-d1eb-4551-9d3b-55c439527346}">Stores the value of BHT04.
</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="variableID">30</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="3298" FP="A" N="v"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="397" T="ChangeVariable"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{a2e970b9-d1eb-4551-9d3b-55c439527346}">Stores the value of BHT03.
</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="variableID">29</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="3300" FP="A" N="v"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="405" N="Change Variable" T="ChangeVariable"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{a2e970b9-d1eb-4551-9d3b-55c439527346}">Stores the value of NM103.
</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="variableID">31</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="3323" FP="A" N="v"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="407" T="ChangeVariable"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{a2e970b9-d1eb-4551-9d3b-55c439527346}">Stores the value of NM109.
</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="variableID">32</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="3327" FP="A" N="v"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="417" N="JavaScript_2010AA_BillingProviderInfoInput" T="JScript"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{a2e970b9-d1eb-4551-9d3b-55c439527346}">Get the input from 2010AA loop and creates a recordset. </P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">/*Record Set &quot;BillingProvider&quot; has next information:
00-2010AA.NM103 (Last Name)
01-2010AA.NM109 (Billing Provider Identifier)
02-2010AA.N301  (Address Line#1)
03-2010AA.N401  (City Name)
04-2010AA.N402  (State Code)
05-2010AA.N403  (Postal Zone or ZIP Code)
06-2010AA.N404  (Country Code)
07-2010AA.REF02 (Reference Identification)
08-2010AA.N403(byte 1-5) (zip Code)
09-2010AA.N403(byte 6-9) (zip Suffix Code)
10-2010AA.PER04/06/08 (Telephone Number)
11-2010AA.PER04/06/08 (Fax Number) */
//Assigns recordset values into array &quot;myRS&quot;
myRS = ec_VariableHelper.GetRecordSet(&quot;BillingProvider&quot;);
var resArr = new Array();
//Assigns the input values to the respective indices of the array &quot;resArr&quot;
for (var i = 0; i &lt; 16; i++)
{
resArr[i] = ec_DataHelper.GetValueByIndex(i);
}
//Assign values of the the array &quot;resArr&quot; to the recordset array myRS
myRS.insertRow();
myRS.updateRow(resArr);
ec_VariableHelper.SetRecordSet(&quot;BillingProvider&quot;, myRS, true);</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="3352" FP="A" P="0" N="value1"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="3353" FP="A" P="1" N="value2"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="3357" FP="A" P="2" N="value6"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="3358" FP="A" P="3" N="value7"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="3359" FP="A" P="4" N="value8"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="3360" FP="A" P="5" N="value9"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="3361" FP="A" P="6" N="value10"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="3362" FP="A" P="7" N="value11"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="3363" FP="A" P="8" N="value12"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="3364" FP="A" P="9" N="value13"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="3365" FP="A" P="10" N="value14"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="3366" FP="A" P="11" N="value15"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="3367" FP="A" P="12" N="value16"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="3419" FP="A" P="13" N="value17"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="14827" FP="A" P="14" N="value3"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="14828" FP="A" P="15" N="value4"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="3351" FP="X" P="0" N="no output"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="418" N="JavaScript_2010AA_BillingProviderInfoOutput" T="JScript"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{a2e970b9-d1eb-4551-9d3b-55c439527346}">Triggers the recordset based on the activation and maps the value to the target guideline.</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">/*Record Set &quot;BillingProvider&quot; has next information:
00-2010AA.NM103           -  Last Name
01-2010AA.NM109           -  Billing Provider Identifier
02-2010AA.N301            -  Address Line#1
03-2010AA.N401            -  City Name
04-2010AA.N402            -  State Code
05-2010AA.N403            -  Postal Zone or ZIP Code
06-2010AA.N404            -  Country Code
07-2010AA.REF02           -  Reference Identification
08-2010AA.N403(byte 1-5)  -  zip Code
09-2010AA.N403(byte 6-9)  -  zip Suffix Code
10-2010AA.PER04/06/08     -  Telephone Number
11-2010AA.PER04/06/08     -  Fax Number */
//Gets recordset values to the &quot;myRS&quot; array
myRS = ec_VariableHelper.GetRecordSet(&quot;BillingProvider&quot;);
myRS.last();
var telephone = &quot;&quot;;
var faxnumber = &quot;&quot;;
var RS = myRS.getRow();
//Assigns the recorset array values to the array &quot;Fields&quot;
while(RS&gt;0)
{
Fields = myRS.getFields();
//Checks for Telephone Number
if (Fields[10] == &quot;TE&quot;)
{
if(telephone == &quot;&quot;)
{
telephone =Fields[11];
Fields[16] = telephone;
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(10, Fields[16].trim());
}
}
else if (Fields[12] == &quot;TE&quot;)
{
if(telephone == &quot;&quot;)
{
telephone =Fields[13]
Fields[16] = telephone;
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(10, Fields[16].trim());
}
}
else if (Fields[14] == &quot;TE&quot;)
{
if(telephone == &quot;&quot;)
{
telephone =Fields[15];
Fields[16] = telephone;
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(10, Fields[16].trim());
}
}
//Checks for Fax Number
if (Fields[10] == &quot;FX&quot;)
{
if(faxnumber == &quot;&quot;)
{
faxnumber= Fields[11]
Fields[17] = faxnumber;
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(11, Fields[17].trim());
}
}
else if (Fields[12] == &quot;FX&quot;)
{
if(faxnumber == &quot;&quot;)
{
faxnumber = Fields[13];
Fields[17] = faxnumber;
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(11, Fields[17].trim());
}
}
else if (Fields[14] == &quot;FX&quot;)
{
if(faxnumber == &quot;&quot;)
{
faxnumber = Fields[15];
Fields[17] = faxnumber;
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(11, Fields[17].trim());
}
}
//Report the output values to the respective indexes
for (var i = 0; i &lt; 10; i++)
{
if(Fields[i]!=undefined &amp;&amp; Fields[i] != &quot;&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(i, Fields[i].trim());
}
}
myRS.previous();
RS = myRS.getRow();
}
</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="3384" FP="_AP" N="a"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="3385" FP="A" P="0" N="no input"/><CP ID="3368" FP="X" P="0" N="NM103"/><CP ID="3369" FP="X" P="1" N="NM109"/><CP ID="3373" FP="X" P="2" N="N301"/><CP ID="3374" FP="X" P="3" N="N302"/><CP ID="3375" FP="X" P="4" N="N401"/><CP ID="3376" FP="X" P="5" N="N402"/><CP ID="3377" FP="X" P="6" N="N403"/><CP ID="3378" FP="X" P="7" N="N404"/><CP ID="3379" FP="X" P="8" N="REF01"/><CP ID="3380" FP="X" P="9" N="REF02"/><CP ID="3381" FP="X" P="10" N="PER04_PER06_telephoneNumber"/><CP ID="3382" FP="X" P="11" N="PER04_PER06_faxNumber"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="420" N="Substring_2010AA_ZipCode" T="Substring"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{a2e970b9-d1eb-4551-9d3b-55c439527346}">Take the first 5 bytes of the input.</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="start">0</P><P N="length">5</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="3392" FP="A" N="v"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="3391" FP="X" N="r"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="421" N="Substring_2010AA_ZipCodeSuffix" T="Substring"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{a2e970b9-d1eb-4551-9d3b-55c439527346}">Take the last 4  bytes of the input
</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="start">5</P><P N="length">4</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="3394" FP="A" N="v"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="3393" FP="X" N="r"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="422" N="ConditionalCopy_2010AA_CountryCode" T="ConditionalCopy"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{a2e970b9-d1eb-4551-9d3b-55c439527346}">‘CountryCode’ tag can is loaded as ‘US’ by default when there is no corresponding value in the N4 segments in EDI.</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="if_1/conditions/expression_1/arg1">3396</P><P N="if_1/conditions/expression_1/arg1/type">2</P><P N="if_1/conditions/expression_1/operation">0</P><P N="if_1/conditions/expression_1/operation/type">0</P><P N="if_1/actions/assignment_1/lvalue">3395</P><P N="if_1/actions/assignment_1/lvalue/type">2</P><P N="if_1/actions/assignment_1/rvalue">US</P><P N="else/actions/assignment_1/lvalue">3395</P><P N="else/actions/assignment_1/lvalue/type">2</P><P N="else/actions/assignment_1/rvalue">3396</P><P N="else/actions/assignment_1/rvalue/type">2</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="3396" FP="A" P="0" N="value1"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="3395" FP="X" P="0" N="result1"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="425" N="JavaScript_2010AA_TaxIdentificationNumber" T="JScript"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{a2e970b9-d1eb-4551-9d3b-55c439527346}">if /837/2000A/2010AA/REF01 (Reference Identification Qualifieris ‘SY’ then it will be mapped into ‘XXX-XX-XXXX’ format to taxIdentificationNumber (institutionalClaim/supplierInformation/taxIdentificationNumber
</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">var refIDQua = ec_DataHelper.GetValueByIndex(0);
var refIDNum = ec_DataHelper.GetValueByIndex(1);
if(refIDQua==&quot;EI&quot;)
{
var r1 = refIDNum.substring(0,2);
var r2 = refIDNum.substring(2);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0,r1+&quot;-&quot;+r2);//Changes to xx-xxxxxxx format
}</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="3402" FP="A" P="0" N="value1"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="3403" FP="A" P="1" N="value2"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="3401" FP="X" P="0" N="result1"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="430" N="JavaScript_2010AA_N301_And_N302" T="JScript"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{a2e970b9-d1eb-4551-9d3b-55c439527346}">Concatenates the address2 value with address1 separated by a comma,if address2 is present else returns the address1 value.</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">var address1 = ec_DataHelper.GetValueByIndex(0);
var address2 = ec_DataHelper.GetValueByIndex(1);
if(address2!=&quot;&quot;)
value=address1.trim()+&quot;, &quot;+address2.trim();
else if(address2==&quot;&quot;)
value=address1;
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0,value);
</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="3423" FP="A" P="0" N="value1"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="3424" FP="A" P="1" N="value2"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="3422" FP="X" P="0" N="result1"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="463" N="JavaScript_2010AA_BillingProviderInfoOutput" T="JScript"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{a2e970b9-d1eb-4551-9d3b-55c439527346}">Get the input values and forms recordset.</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">/*Record Set &quot;BillingProvider&quot; has next information:
00-2010AA.NM103           -  Last Name
01-2010AA.NM109           -  Billing Provider Identifier
02-2010AA.N301            -  Address Line#1
03-2010AA.N401            -  City Name
04-2010AA.N402            -  State Code
05-2010AA.N403            -  Postal Zone or ZIP Code
06-2010AA.N404            -  Country Code
07-2010AA.REF02           -  Reference Identification
08-2010AA.N403(byte 1-5)  -  zip Code
09-2010AA.N403(byte 6-9)  -  zip Suffix Code
10-2010AA.PER04/06/08     -  Telephone Number
11-2010AA.PER04/06/08     -  Fax Number */
//Gets recordset values to the &quot;myRS&quot; array
myRS = ec_VariableHelper.GetRecordSet(&quot;BillingProvider&quot;);
myRS.last();
var telephone = &quot;&quot;;
var faxnumber = &quot;&quot;;
var RS = myRS.getRow();
//Assigns the recorset array values to the array &quot;Fields&quot;
while(RS&gt;0)
{
Fields = myRS.getFields();
//Checks for Telephone Number
if (Fields[10] == &quot;TE&quot;)
{
if(telephone == &quot;&quot;)
{
telephone =Fields[11];
Fields[16] = telephone;
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(10, Fields[16].trim());
}
}
else if (Fields[12] == &quot;TE&quot;)
{
if(telephone == &quot;&quot;)
{
telephone =Fields[13]
Fields[16] = telephone;
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(10, Fields[16].trim());
}
}
else if (Fields[14] == &quot;TE&quot;)
{
if(telephone == &quot;&quot;)
{
telephone =Fields[15];
Fields[16] = telephone;
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(10, Fields[16].trim());
}
}
//Checks for Fax Number
if (Fields[10] == &quot;FX&quot;)
{
if(faxnumber == &quot;&quot;)
{
faxnumber= Fields[11]
Fields[17] = faxnumber;
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(11, Fields[17].trim());
}
}
else if (Fields[12] == &quot;FX&quot;)
{
if(faxnumber == &quot;&quot;)
{
faxnumber = Fields[13];
Fields[17] = faxnumber;
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(11, Fields[17].trim());
}
}
else if (Fields[14] == &quot;FX&quot;)
{
if(faxnumber == &quot;&quot;)
{
faxnumber = Fields[15];
Fields[17] = faxnumber;
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(11, Fields[17].trim());
}
}
//Report the output values to the respective indexes
for (var i = 0; i &lt; 10; i++)
{
if(Fields[i]!=undefined &amp;&amp; Fields[i] != &quot;&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(i, Fields[i].trim());
}
}
myRS.previous();
RS = myRS.getRow();
}
</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="5181" FP="_AP" N="a"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="5182" FP="A" P="0" N="no input"/><CP ID="5162" FP="X" P="0" N="NM103"/><CP ID="5163" FP="X" P="1" N="NM109"/><CP ID="5167" FP="X" P="2" N="N301"/><CP ID="5168" FP="X" P="3" N="N302"/><CP ID="5169" FP="X" P="4" N="N401"/><CP ID="5170" FP="X" P="5" N="N402"/><CP ID="5171" FP="X" P="6" N="N403"/><CP ID="5172" FP="X" P="7" N="N404"/><CP ID="5173" FP="X" P="8" N="REF01"/><CP ID="5174" FP="X" P="9" N="REF02"/><CP ID="5175" FP="X" P="10" N="PER04_PER06_telephoneNumber"/><CP ID="5176" FP="X" P="11" N="PER04_PER06_faxNumber"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="465" N="JavaScript_2010AA_N301_And_N302" T="JScript"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{a2e970b9-d1eb-4551-9d3b-55c439527346}">Concatenates address 1 and address 2.</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">var address1 = ec_DataHelper.GetValueByIndex(0);
var address2 = ec_DataHelper.GetValueByIndex(1);
if(address2!=&quot;&quot;)
value=address1.trim()+&quot;, &quot;+address2.trim();
else if(address2==&quot;&quot;)
value=address1;
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0,value);
</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="5189" FP="A" P="0" N="value1"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="5190" FP="A" P="1" N="value2"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="5188" FP="X" P="0" N="result1"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="466" N="Substring_2010AA_ZipCode" T="Substring"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{a2e970b9-d1eb-4551-9d3b-55c439527346}">Take the first 5 bytes of the input.</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="start">0</P><P N="length">5</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="5192" FP="A" N="v"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="5191" FP="X" N="r"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="467" N="Substring_2010AA_ZipCodeSuffix" T="Substring"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{a2e970b9-d1eb-4551-9d3b-55c439527346}">Take the last 4  bytes of the input</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="start">5</P><P N="length">4</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="5194" FP="A" N="v"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="5193" FP="X" N="r"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="468" N="ConditionalCopy_2010AA_CountryCode" T="ConditionalCopy"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{a2e970b9-d1eb-4551-9d3b-55c439527346}">‘CountryCode’ tag can is loaded as ‘US’ by default when there is no corresponding value in the N4 segments in EDI.</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="if_1/conditions/expression_1/arg1">5196</P><P N="if_1/conditions/expression_1/arg1/type">2</P><P N="if_1/conditions/expression_1/operation">0</P><P N="if_1/conditions/expression_1/operation/type">0</P><P N="if_1/actions/assignment_1/lvalue">5195</P><P N="if_1/actions/assignment_1/lvalue/type">2</P><P N="if_1/actions/assignment_1/rvalue">US</P><P N="else/actions/assignment_1/lvalue">5195</P><P N="else/actions/assignment_1/lvalue/type">2</P><P N="else/actions/assignment_1/rvalue">5196</P><P N="else/actions/assignment_1/rvalue/type">2</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="5196" FP="A" P="0" N="value1"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="5195" FP="X" P="0" N="result1"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="469" N="JavaScript_2010AA_TaxIdentificationNumber" T="JScript"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{a2e970b9-d1eb-4551-9d3b-55c439527346}">if /837/2000A/2010AA/REF01 (Reference Identification Qualifieris ‘SY’ then it will be mapped into ‘XXX-XX-XXXX’ format to taxIdentificationNumber (institutionalClaim/supplierInformation/taxIdentificationNumber</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">var refIDQua = ec_DataHelper.GetValueByIndex(0);
var refIDNum = ec_DataHelper.GetValueByIndex(1);
if(refIDQua==&quot;EI&quot;)
{
var r1 = refIDNum.substring(0,2);
var r2 = refIDNum.substring(2);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0,r1+&quot;-&quot;+r2);//Changes to xx-xxxxxxx format
}</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="5198" FP="A" P="0" N="value1"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="5199" FP="A" P="1" N="value2"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="5197" FP="X" P="0" N="result1"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="474" N="JavaScript_2010AB_Pay-ToInfoInput" T="JScript"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{a2e970b9-d1eb-4551-9d3b-55c439527346}">Gets the input from 2010AB loop segments and  creates a recordset.
</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">/*The recordset &quot;BillingProviderSpecialityInformation&quot; has the next inforation:
00 - 2010AB.N301 - Address Line1
01 - 2010AB.N301 - Address Line2
02-2010AA.N401   - City Name
03-2010AA.N402   - State Code
04-2010AA.N403   - Postal Zone or ZIP Code)
05-2010AA.N404   - Country Code*/
myRS = ec_VariableHelper.GetRecordSet(&quot;PayToInfo&quot;);
var value;
var resArr = new Array();
for (var i = 2; i &lt; 6; i++)
{
resArr[i] = ec_DataHelper.GetValueByIndex(i);
}
var address1 = ec_DataHelper.GetValueByIndex(0);
var address2 = ec_DataHelper.GetValueByIndex(1);
if(address2!=&quot;&quot;)
value=address1+&quot;, &quot;+address2;
else if(address2==&quot;&quot;)
value=address1;
resArr[0]=value;
myRS.insertRow();
myRS.updateRow(resArr);
ec_VariableHelper.SetRecordSet(&quot;PayToInfo&quot;, myRS, true);
</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="5446" FP="A" P="0" N="value1"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="5447" FP="A" P="1" N="value2"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="5448" FP="A" P="2" N="value3"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="5449" FP="A" P="3" N="value4"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="5450" FP="A" P="4" N="value5"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="5451" FP="A" P="5" N="value6"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="5445" FP="X" P="0" N="noOutput"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="475" N="JavaScript_2010AB_Pay-ToInfoOutput_SubscriberClaim" T="JScript"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{a2e970b9-d1eb-4551-9d3b-55c439527346}">Triggers the recordset based on the activation and maps the value to the target guideline.
</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">/*The recordset &quot;BillingProviderSpecialityInformation&quot; has the next inforation:
00 - 2010AB.N301 - Address Line1
01 - 2010AB.N301 - Address Line2
02-2010AA.N401   - City Name
03-2010AA.N402   - State Code
04-2010AA.N403   - Postal Zone or ZIP Code)
05-2010AA.N404   - Country Code*/
//Gets the recordset values to the myRS array
myRS = ec_VariableHelper.GetRecordSet(&quot;PayToInfo&quot;);
//Assigns myRs array values to the array Fields
Fields = myRS.getFields();
//Assigns thee 'CountryCode' value as &quot;US&quot; if it is empty
if(Fields[5]=='')
Fields[5]='US';
//Report the results to the respective indexes
for (var i = 0; i &lt; 6; i++)
{
if(Fields[i]!=undefined)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(i, Fields[i].trim());
}
}</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="5458" FP="_AP" N="a"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="5459" FP="A" P="0" N="noInput"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="5452" FP="X" P="0" N="N301"/><CP ID="5453" FP="X" P="1" N="noOutput"/><CP ID="5454" FP="X" P="2" N="N401"/><CP ID="5455" FP="X" P="3" N="N402"/><CP ID="5456" FP="X" P="4" N="N403"/><CP ID="5457" FP="X" P="5" N="N404"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="476" N="Substring_2010AB_ZipCode" T="Substring"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{a2e970b9-d1eb-4551-9d3b-55c439527346}">Take the first 5 bytes of the input.
</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="start">0</P><P N="length">5</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="5461" FP="A" N="v"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="5460" FP="X" N="r"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="477" N="Substring_2010AB_ZipCodeSuffix" T="Substring"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{a2e970b9-d1eb-4551-9d3b-55c439527346}">Take the last 4  bytes of the input
</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="start">5</P><P N="length">4</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="5463" FP="A" N="v"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="5462" FP="X" N="r"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="478" N="ConditionalCopy_2010AB_CountryCode" T="ConditionalCopy"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{a2e970b9-d1eb-4551-9d3b-55c439527346}">‘CountryCode’ tag can is loaded as ‘US’ by default when there is no corresponding value in the N4 segment  in EDI.
</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="if_1/conditions/expression_1/arg1">5465</P><P N="if_1/conditions/expression_1/arg1/type">2</P><P N="if_1/conditions/expression_1/operation">0</P><P N="if_1/conditions/expression_1/operation/type">0</P><P N="if_1/actions/assignment_1/lvalue">5464</P><P N="if_1/actions/assignment_1/lvalue/type">2</P><P N="if_1/actions/assignment_1/rvalue">US</P><P N="else/actions/assignment_1/lvalue">5464</P><P N="else/actions/assignment_1/lvalue/type">2</P><P N="else/actions/assignment_1/rvalue">5465</P><P N="else/actions/assignment_1/rvalue/type">2</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="5465" FP="A" P="0" N="value1"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="5464" FP="X" P="0" N="result1"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="481" N="JavaScript_2010AB_Pay-ToInfoOutput_PatientClaim" T="JScript"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{a2e970b9-d1eb-4551-9d3b-55c439527346}">Triggers the recordset based on the activation.</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">/*The recordset &quot;BillingProviderSpecialityInformation&quot; has the next inforation:
00 - 2010AB.N301 - Address Line1
01 - 2010AB.N301 - Address Line2
02-2010AA.N401   - City Name
03-2010AA.N402   - State Code
04-2010AA.N403   - Postal Zone or ZIP Code)
05-2010AA.N404   - Country Code*/
//Gets the recordset values to the myRS array
myRS = ec_VariableHelper.GetRecordSet(&quot;PayToInfo&quot;);
//Assigns myRs array values to the array Fields
Fields = myRS.getFields();
//Assigns thee 'CountryCode' value as &quot;US&quot; if it is empty
if(Fields[5]=='')
Fields[5]='US';
//Report the results to the respective indexes
for (var i = 0; i &lt; 6; i++)
{
if(Fields[i]!=undefined)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(i, Fields[i]);
}
}</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="5693" FP="_AP" N="a"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="5694" FP="A" P="0" N="noInput"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="5687" FP="X" P="0" N="N301"/><CP ID="5688" FP="X" P="1" N="noOutput"/><CP ID="5689" FP="X" P="2" N="N401"/><CP ID="5690" FP="X" P="3" N="N402"/><CP ID="5691" FP="X" P="4" N="N403"/><CP ID="5692" FP="X" P="5" N="N404"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="482" N="Substring_2010AB_ZipCode" T="Substring"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{a2e970b9-d1eb-4551-9d3b-55c439527346}">Take the first 5 bytes from the input string.</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="start">0</P><P N="length">5</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="5696" FP="A" N="v"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="5695" FP="X" N="r"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="483" N="Substring_2010AB_ZipCodeSuffix" T="Substring"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{a2e970b9-d1eb-4551-9d3b-55c439527346}">Take 4 bytes starting from the 6th character of the input string.</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="start">5</P><P N="length">4</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="5698" FP="A" N="v"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="5697" FP="X" N="r"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="496" N="2000B_SBR_Output" T="JScript"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{a2e970b9-d1eb-4551-9d3b-55c439527346}">The recordset is triggered based on the given activation and maps the ouptut to the target guideline.</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">/*Record Set &quot;SBR&quot; has next information:
00-2000B.SBR02  - Individual Relationship Code
01-2000B.SBR03  - Reference Identification
02-2000B.SBR04  -Name
03-2000B.SBR09*/
//Get the recordset values to the array &quot;myRS&quot;
myRS = ec_VariableHelper.GetRecordSet(&quot;RS_SBR&quot;);
//Assigns the recordset array values to the array Fields
Fields = myRS.getFields();
//Report the results to the respective indexes
for (var i = 0; i &lt; 4; i++)
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(i, Fields[i]);
ec_ResultHelper.Send();</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="5749" FP="_AP" N="a"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="5750" FP="A" P="0" N="noInput"/><CP ID="5745" FP="X" P="0" N="result1"/><CP ID="5746" FP="X" P="1" N="result2"/><CP ID="5747" FP="X" P="2" N="result3"/><CP ID="5748" FP="X" P="3" N="result4"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="499" N="2000B_SBR_Input" T="JScript"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{a2e970b9-d1eb-4551-9d3b-55c439527346}">Gets the input from SBR segment and  creates a recordset.</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">/*Record Set &quot;SBR&quot; has next information:
00-2000B.SBR02  - Individual Relationship Code
01-2000B.SBR03  - Reference Identification
02-2000B.SBR04  -Name
03-2000B.SBR09*/
//Get the recordset values to the myRS array
myRS = ec_VariableHelper.GetRecordSet(&quot;RS_SBR&quot;);
resArr = new Array();
//Assigns the input values to the array resArr
for(i=0;i&lt;4;i++)
{
resArr[i] = ec_DataHelper.GetValueByIndex(i);
}
//resArr values are inserted to thr recordset
myRS.insertRow();
myRS.updateRow(resArr);
ec_VariableHelper.SetRecordSet(&quot;RS_SBR&quot;, myRS, true);</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="5755" FP="A" P="0" N="value1"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="5756" FP="A" P="1" N="value2"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="5757" FP="A" P="2" N="value3"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="5758" FP="A" P="3" N="value4"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="5754" FP="X" P="0" N="noOutput"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="518" N="2000B_SBR_Output_PatientClaim" T="JScript"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{a2e970b9-d1eb-4551-9d3b-55c439527346}">Trigger the reecordset based on activation.</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">/*Record Set &quot;SBR&quot; has next information:
00-2000B.SBR02  - Individual Relationship Code
01-2000B.SBR03  - Reference Identification
02-2000B.SBR04  -Name
03-2000B.SBR09*/
//Get the recordset values to the array myRS
myRS = ec_VariableHelper.GetRecordSet(&quot;RS_SBR&quot;);
//Get the recordset array values to the array Fields
Fields = myRS.getFields();
//Report the results
for (var i = 0; i &lt; 4; i++)
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(i, Fields[i].trim());
ec_ResultHelper.Send();</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="5824" FP="_AP" N="a"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="5825" FP="A" P="0" N="noInput"/><CP ID="5820" FP="X" P="0" N="result1"/><CP ID="5821" FP="X" P="1" N="result2"/><CP ID="5822" FP="X" P="2" N="result3"/><CP ID="5823" FP="X" P="3" N="result4"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="531" N="JavaScript_2000C_PatientInfoOutput" T="JScript"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{a2e970b9-d1eb-4551-9d3b-55c439527346}">Trigger the recordset based on activation.</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">/*Record Set &quot;Patient&quot; has next information:
00-2000C.PAT01 - IndividualRelationshipCode
01-2010CA.NM103 - Last Name
02-2010CA.NM104 - First Name
03-2010CA.NM105 - Middle Name or Initial
04-2010CA.NM107 - Name Suffix
05-2010CA.DMG02 - Birth Date
06-2010CA.DMG03 - Gender Code*/
//Retrieve the recordset values
myRS = ec_VariableHelper.GetRecordSet(&quot;Patient&quot;);
//Get the recordset values to the array &quot;Fields&quot;
Fields = myRS.getFields();
var date = Fields[5];
//Changes date to the format YYYY-MM-DD
var date1 = date.substring(0,4);
var date2 = date.substring(4,6);
var date3 = date.substring(6,8);
Fields[5]=date1+&quot;-&quot;+date2+&quot;-&quot;+date3;
if(Fields[11] !=&quot;&quot;)
{
Fields[11] = Fields[11];
}
else
Fields[11] = &quot;US&quot;;
//Report the array elements to corresponding indexes
for(var i = 0; i &lt; 7; i++)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(i,Fields[i].trim());
}
for(var i = 7; i &lt; 12; i++)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(i+1,Fields[i].trim());
}
var a1 = Fields[1].trim()
var a2 = Fields[2].trim()
var a3 = Fields[3].trim()
var a4 = Fields[4].trim()
var patientName;
/*if (a2) {
patientName = a2;
}
if (a3) {
if (patientName) {
patientName += &quot;,&quot; + a3;
} else {
patientName = a3;
}
}
if (a3) {
if (patientName) {
patientName += &quot;,&quot; + a3;
} else {
patientName = a3;
}
}
if (a4) {
if (patientName) {
patientName += &quot;,&quot; + a4;
} else {
patientName = a4;
}
}*/
patientName = a1+&quot;,&quot;+a3+&quot;,&quot;+a2+&quot;,&quot;+a4;
if(patientName!=undefined)
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(7,patientName.trim());//Trim spaces </P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="5879" FP="_AP" N="a"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="5880" FP="A" P="0" N="noInput"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="5872" FP="X" P="0" N="PAT01"/><CP ID="5873" FP="X" P="1" N="NM103"/><CP ID="5874" FP="X" P="2" N="NM104"/><CP ID="5875" FP="X" P="3" N="NM105"/><CP ID="5876" FP="X" P="4" N="NM107"/><CP ID="5877" FP="X" P="5" N="DMG02"/><CP ID="5878" FP="X" P="6" N="DMG03"/><CP ID="12651" FP="X" P="7" N="patientName"/><CP ID="14647" FP="X" P="8" N="N301"/><CP ID="14648" FP="X" P="9" N="N401"/><CP ID="14649" FP="X" P="10" N="N402"/><CP ID="14650" FP="X" P="11" N="N403"/><CP ID="14651" FP="X" P="12" N="N404"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="550" N="JavaScript_2000C_PantientInfoInput" T="JScript"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{a2e970b9-d1eb-4551-9d3b-55c439527346}">Form recordset with the input values.</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">/*Record Set &quot;Patient&quot; has next information:
00-2000C.PAT01 - IndividualRelationshipCode
01-2010CA.NM103 - Last Name
02-2010CA.NM104 - First Name
03-2010CA.NM105 - Middle Name or Initial
04-2010CA.NM107 - Name Suffix
05-2010CA.DMG02 - Birth Date
06-2010CA.DMG03 - Gender Code*/
//Retrieve the recordset values
myRs = ec_VariableHelper.GetRecordSet(&quot;Patient&quot;);
resArr = new Array();
//Get the input values to the array &quot;resArr&quot;
for(i=0;i&lt;12;i++)
{
resArr[i] = ec_DataHelper.GetValueByIndex(i);
}
//Update the recordset with the values of the array &quot;resArr&quot;
myRS.insertRow();
myRS.updateRow(resArr);
ec_VariableHelper.SetRecordSet(&quot;Patient&quot;, myRS, true);
</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="5929" FP="A" P="0" N="value1"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="5930" FP="A" P="1" N="value2"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="5931" FP="A" P="2" N="value3"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="5932" FP="A" P="3" N="value4"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="5933" FP="A" P="4" N="value5"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="5934" FP="A" P="5" N="value6"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="5935" FP="A" P="6" N="value7"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="14637" FP="A" P="7" N="value8"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="14638" FP="A" P="8" N="value9"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="14640" FP="A" P="9" N="value10"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="14641" FP="A" P="10" N="value11"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="14642" FP="A" P="11" N="value12"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="5928" FP="X" P="0" N="noOutput"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="552" N="ConersionalCopy_2000CA_GenderCode" T="ConversionalCopy"><Ps C="S"><P N="in">,M,F,U</P><P N="out">,Male,Female,Unknown</P><P N="comment">,,,</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="5941" FP="A" N="v"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="5940" FP="X" N="r"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="628" T="ChangeVariable"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{a2e970b9-d1eb-4551-9d3b-55c439527346}">Stores the value of N301.

</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="variableID">52</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="6277" FP="A" N="v"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="680" N="JavaScript_2300_ClaimInfoInput_1" T="JScript"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{a2e970b9-d1eb-4551-9d3b-55c439527346}">Take the input from the 23000 loop of 2000B and creates a recordset.</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">
//Retrieve the recordset values and assigns it to the array 'myRS'
myRS = ec_VariableHelper.GetRecordSet(&quot;RS_2000B_2300_CLM&quot;);
resArr = new Array();
for(i=0;i&lt;11;i++)
{
//Assigns input valyes to resArr array
if(ec_DataHelper.GetValueByIndex(i)!=void(0) )
{
resArr[i] = ec_DataHelper.GetValueByIndex(i);
}
}
//Update the recorset with the values of the array 'resArr'
myRS.insertRow();
myRS.updateRow(resArr);
ec_VariableHelper.SetRecordSet(&quot;RS_2000B_2300_CLM&quot;, myRS, true);
</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="6323" FP="A" P="0" N="value1"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="6335" FP="A" P="1" N="value2"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="6342" FP="A" P="2" N="value3"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="6343" FP="A" P="3" N="value4"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="6354" FP="A" P="4" N="value5"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="6355" FP="A" P="5" N="value6"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="6358" FP="A" P="6" N="value7"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="6407" FP="A" P="7" N="value8"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="6408" FP="A" P="8" N="value9"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="6409" FP="A" P="9" N="value10"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="6427" FP="A" P="10" N="value11"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="6322" FP="X" P="0" N="result1"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="683" N="JavaScript-2300_ClaimInfoOutput_1" T="JScript"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{a2e970b9-d1eb-4551-9d3b-55c439527346}">Triggers the recordset based on activation and maps the result to target guideline.
</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">//Retrieve the recordset values to the array myRS
myRS = ec_VariableHelper.GetRecordSet(&quot;RS_2000B_2300_CLM&quot;);
//Get the recordset array values to the array Fields
Fields = myRS.getFields();
//Maps assignment acceptance as &quot;Y&quot; for &quot;A&quot; and &quot;N&quot; for &quot;C&quot;
if(Fields[4] == &quot;A&quot;)
{
Fields[4] = &quot;Y&quot;;
}
else if (Fields[4] == &quot;C&quot;)
{
Fields[4] = &quot;N&quot;;
}
//Report the results
for(var i = 0; i &lt; 11; i++)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(i,Fields[i]);
}</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="6333" FP="_AP" N="a"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="6334" FP="A" P="0" N="value1"/><CP ID="6331" FP="X" P="0" N="CLM01"/><CP ID="6332" FP="X" P="1" N="CLM02"/><CP ID="6347" FP="X" P="2" N="CLM05.01"/><CP ID="6351" FP="X" P="3" N="CLM05.03"/><CP ID="6360" FP="X" P="4" N="CLM07"/><CP ID="6361" FP="X" P="5" N="CLM08"/><CP ID="6362" FP="X" P="6" N="CLM09"/><CP ID="6410" FP="X" P="7" N="DTP03(DischargeHour)"/><CP ID="6411" FP="X" P="8" N="DTP03(StatementHour)"/><CP ID="6412" FP="X" P="9" N="DTP02(AdmissionDate)"/><CP ID="6431" FP="X" P="10" N="DTP03(AdmissionDate)"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="684" N="Concatenate_2300_CLM05.01+CLM05.03" T="Concatenate"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{a2e970b9-d1eb-4551-9d3b-55c439527346}">Concatenates CLM05.01 and CLM03.</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="6345" FP="A" P="0" N="value1"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="6346" FP="A" P="1" N="value2"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="6344" FP="X" N="r"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="689" N="Substring_2300_EndDate" T="Substring"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{a2e970b9-d1eb-4551-9d3b-55c439527346}">Take eight characters starting from the ninth character.</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="start">9</P><P N="length">8</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="6417" FP="A" N="v"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="6416" FP="X" N="r"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="690" N="Substring_2300_StartDate" T="Substring"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{a2e970b9-d1eb-4551-9d3b-55c439527346}">Take the first 8 characters of the string.</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="start">0</P><P N="length">8</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="6419" FP="A" N="v"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="6418" FP="X" N="r"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="691" N="JavaScript_2300_DateFormatConversion" T="JScript"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{a2e970b9-d1eb-4551-9d3b-55c439527346}">Converts the date from yyyymmdd to yyyy-mm-dd.
</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">//Change the date format to yyyy-mm-dd
var date = ec_DataHelper.GetValueByIndex(0);
var date1 = date.substring(0,4);
var date2 = date.substring(4,6);
var date3 = date.substring(6,8);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0,date1+&quot;-&quot;+date2+&quot;-&quot;+date3);
</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="6424" FP="A" P="0" N="value1"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="6423" FP="X" P="0" N="result1"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="692" N="Conditional Copy_AdmissionDate" T="ConditionalCopy"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{a2e970b9-d1eb-4551-9d3b-55c439527346}">Passes the output value when input value equals DT.</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="if_1/conditions/expression_1/arg1">6429</P><P N="if_1/conditions/expression_1/arg1/type">2</P><P N="if_1/conditions/expression_1/operation">0</P><P N="if_1/conditions/expression_1/operation/type">0</P><P N="if_1/conditions/expression_1/arg2">DT</P><P N="if_1/actions/assignment_1/lvalue">6430</P><P N="if_1/actions/assignment_1/lvalue/type">2</P><P N="if_1/actions/assignment_1/rvalue">6432</P><P N="if_1/actions/assignment_1/rvalue/type">2</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="6429" FP="A" P="0" N="value1"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="6432" FP="A" P="1" N="value2"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="6430" FP="X" P="0" N="result1"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="693" N="Substring_AdmissionTimeCount" T="Substring"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{a2e970b9-d1eb-4551-9d3b-55c439527346}">Takes four characters from the input string starting from 8th character.</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="start">8</P><P N="length">4</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="6433" FP="A" N="v"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="6434" FP="X" N="r"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="699" N="JavaScript_2300_DateFormatConversion" T="JScript"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{a2e970b9-d1eb-4551-9d3b-55c439527346}">Converts the date from yyyymmdd to yyyy-mm-dd.</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">var date = ec_DataHelper.GetValueByIndex(0);

var date3 = date.substring(6,8);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0,date1+&quot;-&quot;+date2+&quot;-&quot;+date3);

target guideline.</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="if_1/conditions/expression_1/arg1">6581</P><P N="if_1/conditions/expression_1/arg1/type">2</P><P N="if_1/conditions/expression_1/operation">0</P><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="6580" FP="X" P="0" N="result1"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="716" N="JavaScript_ExternalCauseOfInjury_Output_1" T="JScript"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{a2e970b9-d1eb-4551-9d3b-55c439527346}">Triggers the recordset based on activation and maps the result to target guideline.
</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">//Retrieve the recordset values
myRS1 = ec_VariableHelper.GetRecordSet(&quot;RS_2000B_2300_CLM2&quot;);
//Get the recordset values to the array &quot;Fields1&quot;
Fields1 = myRS1.getFields();
for(var i = 0; i &lt;6 ; i++)
{
//Inserts dot after third character of industry code

</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="7150" FP="A" P="0" N="value2"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="7151" FP="A" P="1" N="value3"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="7152" FP="A" P="2" N="value4"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="7153" FP="A" P="3" N="value5"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="7154" FP="A" P="4" N="value6"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="7155" FP="A" P="5" N="value7"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="7156" FP="A" P="6" N="value8"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="7157" FP="A" P="7" N="value9"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="7158" FP="A" P="8" N="value10"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="7159" FP="A" P="9" N="value11"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="7160" FP="A" P="10" N="value12"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="7161" FP="A" P="11" N="value13"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="7142" FP="X" P="0" N="result1"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="746" N="JavaScript_OtherDiagnosisInfo_Output_1" T="JScript"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{a2e970b9-d1eb-4551-9d3b-55c439527346}">Triggers the recordset based on activation and maps the result to target guideline.
</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">//Retrieve the recordset values
myRS1 = ec_VariableHelper.GetRecordSet(&quot;RS_2000B_2300_CLM3&quot;);
//Get the recordset values to the array &quot;Fields1&quot;
Fields1 = myRS1.getFields();
for(var i = 0; i &lt;6 ; i++)
{
//Inserts dot after third character of industry code
if(Fields1[2*i]!='')
{
var value = Fields1[2*i];
var v1 = value.substr(0,3);
var result;
var v2 = value.substr(3,value.length-3);
if(v2!=&quot;&quot;)
result = v1+&quot;.&quot;+v2;
else
result = v1;
Fields1[2*i]=result;
}
}
//Report result from array &quot;Fields1&quot; to indexes
for(var i = 0; i &lt; 12; i++)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(i,Fields1[i]);
}</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="7147" FP="_AP" N="a"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="7146" FP="A" P="0" N="value1"/><CP ID="7222" FP="X" P="0" N="HI01.02"/><CP ID="7223" FP="X" P="1" N="HI01.09"/><CP ID="7224" FP="X" P="2" N="HI02.02"/><CP ID="7225" FP="X" P="3" N="HI02.09"/><CP ID="7226" FP="X" P="4" N="HI03.02"/><CP ID="7227" FP="X" P="5" N="HI03.09"/><CP ID="7228" FP="X" P="6" N="HI04.02"/><CP ID="7229" FP="X" P="7" N="HI04.09"/><CP ID="7230" FP="X" P="8" N="HI05.02"/><CP ID="7231" FP="X" P="9" N="HI05.09"/><CP ID="7232" FP="X" P="10" N="HI06.02"/><CP ID="7233" FP="X" P="11" N="HI06.09"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="757" N="JavaScript_OtherProcedureInfo_Output_1" T="JScript"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{a2e970b9-d1eb-4551-9d3b-55c439527346}">Triggers the recordset based on activation and maps the result to target guideline.
</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">//Retrieve the recordset values
myRS1 = ec_VariableHelper.GetRecordSet(&quot;RS_2000B_2300_CLM4&quot;);
//Get the recordset values to the array &quot;Fields1&quot;
Fields1 = myRS1.getFields();
for(var i = 0; i &lt; 6; i++)
{
if(Fields1[(2*i)+1]!='')//Changes format of DateTimePeriod to YYYY-MM-DD
{
var date = Fields1[(2*i)+1];
var date1 = date.substring(0,4);
var date2 = date.substring(4,6);
var date3 = date.substring(6,8);
Fields1[(2*i)+1] = date1+&quot;-&quot;+date2+&quot;-&quot;+date3;
}
}
//Report result from array &quot;Fields1&quot; to indexes
for(var i = 0; i &lt; 12; i++)
{  if(Fields1[i]!=undefined)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(i,Fields1[i]);
}
}</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="7576" FP="_AP" N="a"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="7577" FP="A" P="0" N="value1"/><CP ID="7553" FP="X" P="0" N="HI01.02"/><CP ID="7554" FP="X" P="1" N="HI01.04"/><CP ID="7555" FP="X" P="2" N="HI02.02"/><CP ID="7556" FP="X" P="3" N="HI02.04"/><CP ID="7557" FP="X" P="4" N="HI03.02"/><CP ID="7558" FP="X" P="5" N="HI03.04"/><CP ID="7559" FP="X" P="6" N="HI04.02"/><CP ID="7560" FP="X" P="7" N="HI04.04"/><CP ID="7561" FP="X" P="8" N="HI05.02"/><CP ID="7562" FP="X" P="9" N="HI05.04"/><CP ID="7563" FP="X" P="10" N="HI06.02"/><CP ID="7564" FP="X" P="11" N="HI06.04"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="758" N="JavaScript_OtherProcedureInfo_Input_1" T="JScript"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{a2e970b9-d1eb-4551-9d3b-55c439527346}">Take the input from the 23000 loop of 2000B and creates a recordset.

</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">
//Change date to format yyy-mm-dd
var date = ec_DataHelper.GetValueByIndex(0);

</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">// Retrieve the recordset values
myRS1 = ec_VariableHelper.GetRecordSet(&quot;RS_2000B_2300_CLM5&quot;);
//Get the recordset values to the array &quot;Fields1&quot;
Fields1 = myRS1.getFields();
//Report result from array &quot;Fields1&quot; to indexes
for(var i = 0; i &lt; 12; i++)
{
if(Fields1[i]!=void(0))
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(i,Fields1[i]);
}</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="8029" FP="_AP" N="a"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="8030" FP="A" P="0" N="value1"/><CP ID="8003" FP="X" P="0" N="HI01.02"/><CP ID="8004" FP="X" P="1" N="HI01.04"/><CP ID="8005" FP="X" P="2" N="HI02.02"/><CP ID="8006" FP="X" P="3" N="HI02.04"/><CP ID="8007" FP="X" P="4" N="HI03.02"/><CP ID="8008" FP="X" P="5" N="HI03.04"/><CP ID="8009" FP="X" P="6" N="HI04.02"/><CP ID="8010" FP="X" P="7" N="HI04.04"/><CP ID="8011" FP="X" P="8" N="HI05.02"/><CP ID="8012" FP="X" P="9" N="HI05.04"/><CP ID="8013" FP="X" P="10" N="HI06.02"/><CP ID="8014" FP="X" P="11" N="HI06.04"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="775" N="JavaScript_OccurrenceSpanInfo_DateFormatConversion" T="JScript"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{a2e970b9-d1eb-4551-9d3b-55c439527346}">Converts the date from yyyymmdd to yyyy-mm-dd.
</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">
//Change date to format yyy-mm-dd
var date = ec_DataHelper.GetValueByIndex(0);
var date1 = date.substring(0,4);
var date2 = date.substring(4,6);
var date3 = date.substring(6,8);
//Report the result to the zeroth index
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0,date1+&quot;-&quot;+date2+&quot;-&quot;+date3);
</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="8032" FP="A" P="0" N="value1"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="8031" FP="X" P="0" N="result1"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="777" N="JavaScript_OccurrenceSpanInformation_Input_1" T="JScript"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{a2e970b9-d1eb-4551-9d3b-55c439527346}">Take the input from the 23000 loop of 2000B and creates a recordset.
</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">// Retrieve the recordset values
var myRS1 = ec_VariableHelper.GetRecordSet(&quot;RS_2000B_2300_CLM5&quot;);
resArr1 = new Array();
//Get the input values to the array &quot;resArr1&quot;
for(i=0;i&lt;12;i++)
{ if(ec_DataHelper.GetValueByIndex(i)!=void(0) )
{
resArr1[i] = ec_DataHelper.GetValueByIndex(i);
}
}
//Update the recprdset with values of array &quot;resArr1&quot;
myRS1.insertRow();
myRS1.updateRow(resArr1);
ec_VariableHelper.SetRecordSet(&quot;RS_2000B_2300_CLM5&quot;, myRS1, true);
</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="8058" FP="A" P="0" N="value1"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="8059" FP="A" P="1" N="value2"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="8060" FP="A" P="2" N="value3"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="8061" FP="A" P="3" N="value4"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="8062" FP="A" P="4" N="value5"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="8063" FP="A" P="5" N="value6"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="8064" FP="A" P="6" N="value7"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="8065" FP="A" P="7" N="value8"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="8066" FP="A" P="8" N="value9"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="8067" FP="A" P="9" N="value10"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="8068" FP="A" P="10" N="value11"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="8069" FP="A" P="11" N="value12"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="8057" FP="X" P="0" N="result1"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="778" N="Substring_2300_StartDate" T="Substring"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{a2e970b9-d1eb-4551-9d3b-55c439527346}">Take first 8 characters.

</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">// Retrieve the recordset values
var myRS1 = ec_VariableHelper.GetRecordSet(&quot;RS_2000B_2300_CLM6&quot;);
resArr1 = new Array();
//Get the input values to the array &quot;resArr1&quot;
for(i=0;i&lt;12;i++)
{ if(ec_DataHelper.GetValueByIndex(i)!=void(0) )
{
resArr1[i] = ec_DataHelper.GetValueByIndex(i);
}
}
//Update the recprdset with values of array &quot;resArr1&quot;
myRS1.insertRow();
myRS1.updateRow(resArr1);
ec_VariableHelper.SetRecordSet(&quot;RS_2000B_2300_CLM6&quot;, myRS1, true);
</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="8800" FP="A" P="0" N="value1"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="8807" FP="A" P="1" N="value2"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="8808" FP="A" P="2" N="value3"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="8809" FP="A" P="3" N="value4"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="8810" FP="A" P="4" N="value5"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="8811" FP="A" P="5" N="value6"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="8812" FP="A" P="6" N="value7"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="8813" FP="A" P="7" N="value8"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="8814" FP="A" P="8" N="value9"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="8815" FP="A" P="9" N="value10"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="8816" FP="A" P="10" N="value11"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="8817" FP="A" P="11" N="value12"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="8801" FP="X" P="0" N="result1"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="995" N="JavaScript_OccurrenceInfo_Output_1" T="JScript"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{a2e970b9-d1eb-4551-9d3b-55c439527346}">Triggers the recordset based on activation and maps the result to target guideline.
</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">//Retrieve the recordset values
myRS1 = ec_VariableHelper.GetRecordSet(&quot;RS_2000B_2300_CLM6&quot;);
//Get the recordset values to the array &quot;Fields1&quot;
Fields1 = myRS1.getFields();
for(var i = 0; i &lt; 6; i++)
{
if(Fields1[(2*i)+1]!='')//Changes format of DateTimePeriod to YYYY-MM-DD
{
var date = Fields1[(2*i)+1];
var date1 = date.substring(0,4);
var date2 = date.substring(4,6);
var date3 = date.substring(6,8);
Fields1[(2*i)+1] = date1+&quot;-&quot;+date2+&quot;-&quot;+date3;
}
}
//Report result from array &quot;Fields1&quot; to indexes
for(var i = 0; i &lt; 12; i++)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(i,Fields1[i]);
}
</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="8806" FP="_AP" N="a"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="8805" FP="A" P="0" N="value1"/><CP ID="8804" FP="X" P="0" N="HI01.02"/><CP ID="8901" FP="X" P="1" N="HI01.04"/><CP ID="8902" FP="X" P="2" N="HI02.02"/><CP ID="8903" FP="X" P="3" N="HI02.04"/><CP ID="8904" FP="X" P="4" N="HI03.02"/><CP ID="8905" FP="X" P="5" N="HI03.04"/><CP ID="8906" FP="X" P="6" N="HI04.02"/><CP ID="8907" FP="X" P="7" N="HI04.04"/><CP ID="8908" FP="X" P="8" N="HI05.02"/><CP ID="8909" FP="X" P="9" N="HI05.04"/><CP ID="8910" FP="X" P="10" N="HI06.02"/><CP ID="8911" FP="X" P="11" N="HI06.04"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="1009" N="JavaScript_ValueInformation_Input_1" T="JScript"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{a2e970b9-d1eb-4551-9d3b-55c439527346}">Take the input from the 23000 loop of 2000B and creates a recordset.

</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">//Retrieve the recordset values

{

</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="10082" FP="A" P="0" N="value1"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="10083" FP="A" P="1" N="value2"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="10084" FP="A" P="2" N="value3"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="10085" FP="A" P="3" N="value4"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="10086" FP="A" P="4" N="value5"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="10087" FP="A" P="5" N="value6"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="10081" FP="X" P="0" N="result1"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="1056" N="JavaScript_ServiceLineNumber_Input" T="JScript"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{a2e970b9-d1eb-4551-9d3b-55c439527346}">Takes the input from 2400 loop segmements excluding sub-loop segments and forms a recordset.</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">//Retrieve the recordset values

{

}

</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="10310" FP="A" P="0" N="value1"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="10311" FP="A" P="1" N="value2"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="10312" FP="A" P="2" N="value3"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="10313" FP="A" P="3" N="value4"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="10309" FP="X" P="0" N="result1"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="1073" N="JavaScript_2410_DrugIdentificationOutput" T="JScript"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{a2e970b9-d1eb-4551-9d3b-55c439527346}">Trigger the recordset based on the activation and maps the output to the target guideline.</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">//Retrieve the values of recordset &quot;RS_2000B_2410&quot;
myRS = ec_VariableHelper.GetRecordSet(&quot;RS_2000B_2410&quot;);
// Get the recordset values to the array 'Fields'
Fields = myRS.getFields();
if(Fields[1]!=&quot;&quot;)
{
var ndcCode = Fields[1];

var ndcCode2 = ndcCode.substring(5,9);
var ndcCode3 = ndcCode.substring(9);

}
for(var i = 0; i &lt; 4; i++)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(i,Fields[i]);//Report the elements of the array &quot;Fields&quot; to corresponding indexes
}</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="10318" FP="_AP" N="a"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="10319" FP="A" P="0" N="noInput"/><CP ID="10314" FP="X" P="0" N="LIN02"/><CP ID="10315" FP="X" P="1" N="LIN03"/><CP ID="10316" FP="X" P="2" N="CTP04"/><CP ID="10317" FP="X" P="3" N="CTP05.01"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="1077" N="JavaScript_2410_DrugIdentificationInput" T="JScript"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{a2e970b9-d1eb-4551-9d3b-55c439527346}">Takes the input and and forms recordset.</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">//Retrieve the recordset values

{

{

N="LIN03"/><CP ID="10350" FP="X" P="2" N="CTP04"/><CP ID="10351" FP="X" P="3" N="CTP05.01"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="1079" N="ConditionalCopy_2410_LIN02" T="ConditionalCopy"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{a2e970b9-d1eb-4551-9d3b-55c439527346}">Maps the output as 'ND' if input is N4.</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="if_1/conditions/expression_1/arg1">10355</P><P N="if_1/conditions/expression_1/arg1/type">2</P><P N="if_1/conditions/expression_1/operation">0</P><P N="if_1/conditions/expression_1/operation/type">0</P><P N="if_1/conditions/expression_1/arg2">N4</P><P N="if_1/actions/assignment_1/lvalue">10354</P><P N="if_1/actions/assignment_1/lvalue/type">2</P><P N="if_1/actions/assignment_1/rvalue">ND</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="10355" FP="A" P="0" N="value1"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="10354" FP="X" P="0" N="result1"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="1104" N="SubString_2330B_ZipCode" T="Substring"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{a2e970b9-d1eb-4551-9d3b-55c439527346}">Take the frist 5 characters of the input value.</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="start">0</P><P N="length">5</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="10596" FP="A" N="v"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="10595" FP="X" N="r"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="1105" N="SubString_2330B_ZipCodeSuffix" T="Substring"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{a2e970b9-d1eb-4551-9d3b-55c439527346}">Take 4 characters starting from the 5th character.</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="start">5</P><P N="length">4</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="10598" FP="A" N="v"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="10597" FP="X" N="r"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="1123" N="JavaScript_2430_CAS_Input" T="JScript"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{a2e970b9-d1eb-4551-9d3b-55c439527346}">Take the input from 2430 loop segments and forms a recordset.</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">var Line_PayerCheck = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;Line_PayerCheck&quot;);
var resArr = new Array();
var lineNum = ec_DataHelper.GetValueByIndex(19);
var payerId = ec_DataHelper.GetValueByIndex(20);
var myRSLine_Payer = lineNum + &quot;-&quot; + payerId;
myRS = ec_VariableHelper.GetRecordSet(&quot;LineCAS_CO_PR&quot;);
myRS.first();
var arrayLinePayer = &quot;&quot;;
var found_payer = 0;
if(Line_PayerCheck.length &gt; 0)
{
var splitRes = Line_PayerCheck.split(&quot;|&quot;);
for(var j=0;j&lt;splitRes.length;j++)
{
if (splitRes[j] == myRSLine_Payer)
{
found_payer = 1;
}
}
}
if (found_payer == 0)
{
for (var i = 0; i &lt; 21; i++) resArr [i] = ec_DataHelper.GetValueByIndex(i);
myRS.insertRow();
myRS.updateRow(resArr);
ec_VariableHelper.SetRecordSet(&quot;LineCAS_CO_PR&quot;, myRS, true);
}
else
{
//Update/Add to existing row:
var casArray_Temp = new Array();//create new array
for (var i = 0; i &lt; 21; i++) casArray_Temp [i] = ec_DataHelper.GetValueByIndex(i); //casArray_Temp[19]-linenum,casArray_Temp[20]-svd01
var counter = 0;
var newCASArray = new Array(21); //creating array with length 21
for(var j=1; j&lt;casArray_Temp.length-2; j=j+3)
{
var found_CAS = 0;
myRS = ec_VariableHelper.GetRecordSet(&quot;LineCAS_CO_PR&quot;);
myRS.first();
var RS1 = myRS.getRow();
while(RS1&gt;0)
{
Fields = myRS.getFields();
arrayLinePayer = Fields[19] + &quot;-&quot; + Fields[20];
if(myRSLine_Payer == arrayLinePayer)
{
if(casArray_Temp[0] == Fields[0])
{
switch (casArray_Temp[j])
{
case Fields[1]:
Fields[2] = +Fields[2] + +casArray_Temp[j+1];
if(casArray_Temp[j+2] != &quot;&quot;)
{
Fields[3] = +Fields[3] + +casArray_Temp[j+2];
}
found_CAS = 1;
break;
case Fields[4]:
Fields[5] = +Fields[5] + +casArray_Temp[j+1];
if(casArray_Temp[j+2] != &quot;&quot;)
{
Fields[6] = +Fields[6] + +casArray_Temp[j+2];
}
found_CAS = 1;
break;
case Fields[7]:
Fields[8] = +Fields[8] + +casArray_Temp[j+1];
if(casArray_Temp[j+2] != &quot;&quot;)
{
Fields[9] = +Fields[9] + +casArray_Temp[j+2];
}
found_CAS = 1;
break;
case Fields[10]:
Fields[11] = +Fields[11] + +casArray_Temp[j+1];
if(casArray_Temp[j+2] != &quot;&quot;)
{
Fields[12] = +Fields[12] + +casArray_Temp[j+2];
}
found_CAS = 1;
break;
case Fields[13]:
Fields[14] = +Fields[14] + +casArray_Temp[j+1];
if(casArray_Temp[j+2] != &quot;&quot;)
{
Fields[15] = +Fields[15] + +casArray_Temp[j+2];
}
found_CAS = 1;
break;
case Fields[16]:
Fields[17] = +Fields[17] + +casArray_Temp[j+1];
if(casArray_Temp[j+2] != &quot;&quot;)
{
Fields[18] = +Fields[18] + +casArray_Temp[j+2];
}
found_CAS = 1;
break;
}
myRS.updateRow(Fields);
ec_VariableHelper.SetRecordSet(&quot;LineCAS_CO_PR&quot;, myRS, true);
}
}
myRS.next();
RS1 = myRS.getRow();
}
if ((found_CAS == 0) &amp;&amp; (casArray_Temp[j]!=&quot;undefined&quot;) &amp;&amp; (casArray_Temp[j]!=&quot;&quot;))
{
if (counter == 0)
{
newCASArray[19] = casArray_Temp[19];
newCASArray[20] = casArray_Temp[20];
newCASArray[0] = casArray_Temp[0];
}
counter = counter + 1;
newCASArray[counter] = casArray_Temp[j];
newCASArray[counter+1] = casArray_Temp[j+1];
newCASArray[counter+2] = casArray_Temp[j+2];
}
}
if (newCASArray.length &gt; 0)
{
myRS.insertRow();
myRS.updateRow(newCASArray);
ec_VariableHelper.SetRecordSet(&quot;LineCAS_CO_PR&quot;, myRS, true);
}
}

P="2" N="value3"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="10752" FP="A" P="3" N="value4"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="10753" FP="A" P="4" N="value5"><Ps C="R"><P N="result1"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="1124" N="JavaScript_CAS2320Input" T="JScript"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{a2e970b9-d1eb-4551-9d3b-55c439527346}">Takes the input from the segments of 2320 loop and forms a recordset.</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">//Record Set &quot;Claim_2320CAS&quot; has information from 2320\CAS(Claim Level Adjustment).
//Retrieve the recordset values
myRS = ec_VariableHelper.GetRecordSet(&quot;Claim_2320CAS_2000B&quot;);
var resArr = new Array();
//Get the input values to the array 'resArr'
for (var i = 0; i &lt; 20; i++) resArr [i] = ec_DataHelper.GetValueByIndex(i);
//Update the recordset with the values of the array 'resArr'
myRS.insertRow();
myRS.updateRow(resArr);
ec_VariableHelper.SetRecordSet(&quot;Claim_2320CAS_2000B&quot;, myRS, true);</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="10772" FP="A" P="0" N="value1"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="10773" FP="A" P="1" N="value2"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="10774" FP="A" P="2" N="value3"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="10775" FP="A" P="3" N="value4"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="10776" FP="A" P="4" N="value5"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="10777" FP="A" P="5" N="value6"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="10778" FP="A" P="6" N="value7"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="10779" FP="A" P="7" N="value8"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="10780" FP="A" P="8" N="value9"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="10781" FP="A" P="9" N="value10"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="10782" FP="A" P="10" N="value11"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="10783" FP="A" P="11" N="value12"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="10784" FP="A" P="12" N="value13"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="10785" FP="A" P="13" N="value14"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="10786" FP="A" P="14" N="value15"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="10787" FP="A" P="15" N="value16"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="10788" FP="A" P="16" N="value17"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="10789" FP="A" P="17" N="value18"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="10790" FP="A" P="18" N="value19"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="11805" FP="A" P="19" N="value20" DirectValue="{66}"/><CP ID="10771" FP="X" P="0" N="no output"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="1144" T="ChangeVariable"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{a2e970b9-d1eb-4551-9d3b-55c439527346}">Stores the UniqueId value.

{ if(ec_DataHelper.GetValueByIndex(i)!=void(0) )
{

}
}
//Update the recordset with the values of array resArr1
myRS1.insertRow();
myRS1.updateRow(resArr1);
ec_VariableHelper.SetRecordSet(&quot;RS_2000B_2300_CLM9&quot;, myRS1, true);
</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="11292" FP="A" P="0" N="value1"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="11294" FP="A" P="1" N="value2"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="11293" FP="X" P="0" N="result1"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="1149" N="JavaScript_PrincipalProcedureInformation_Output" T="JScript"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{a2e970b9-d1eb-4551-9d3b-55c439527346}">Trigger the recordset based on activation.</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">//Retrieve the recordset values to the array myRS

{

ec_VariableHelper.SetRecordSet(&quot;RS_2000C_2300_CLM14&quot;, myRS1, true);
</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="11533" FP="A" P="0" N="value1"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="11534" FP="X" P="0" N="result1"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="1244" N="JavaScript_PricipalProcedureInfo_Input" T="JScript"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{a2e970b9-d1eb-4551-9d3b-55c439527346}">Take input and forms recordset.
</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script"> // Retrieve the recordset values
var myRS1 = ec_VariableHelper.GetRecordSet(&quot;RS_2000C_2300_CLM15&quot;);

{

}
//Update the recprdset with values of array &quot;resArr1&quot;
myRS1.insertRow();
myRS1.updateRow(resArr1);
ec_VariableHelper.SetRecordSet(&quot;RS_2000C_2300_CLM15&quot;, myRS1, true);
</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="11540" FP="A" P="0" N="value1"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="11542" FP="A" P="1" N="value2"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="11541" FP="X" P="0" N="result1"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="1245" N="JavaScript_PricipalProcedureInfo_Output" T="JScript"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{a2e970b9-d1eb-4551-9d3b-55c439527346}">Trigger the recordset based on activation.</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">//Retrieve the recordset values

for(var i = 0; i &lt; 2; i++)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(i,Fields1[i]);
}</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="11545" FP="_AP" N="a"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="11543" FP="A" P="0" N="value1"/><CP ID="11544" FP="X" P="0" N="result1"/><CP ID="11547" FP="X" P="1" N="result2"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="1345" T="ChangeVariable"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{a2e970b9-d1eb-4551-9d3b-55c439527346}">Set the value of variable to 0 on activation.

</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="variableID">63</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="11752" FP="_AP" N="a"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="11753" FP="A" N="v" DirectValue="1"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="1351" N="JavaScript_OtherSubscriberInformationInput" T="JScript"><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">//The recordset &quot;Service_2320Details&quot; will have the OtherSubscriberInformation(Including 2330A and 2330B loop).

ec_VariableHelper.SetRecordSet(&quot;Service_2320Details&quot;, myRS, true);</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="11806" FP="A" P="0" N="value1"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="11808" FP="A" P="1" N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="11811" FP="A" P="4" N="value5"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="11812" FP="A" P="5" N="value6"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="11813" FP="A" P="6" N="value7"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="11924" FP="A" P="7" N="value8"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="11925" FP="A" P="8" N="value9"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="11926" FP="A" P="9" N="value10"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="11927" FP="A" P="10" N="value11"><Ps C="R"><P ID="11948" FP="A" P="13" N="value14"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="11949" FP="A" P="14" N="value15"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="11950" FP="A" P="15" ID="11973" FP="A" P="20" N="value21"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="11989" FP="A" P="21" N="value22" DirectValue="{69}"/><CP ID="14615" FP="A" P="22" N="value23"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="11807" FP="X" P="0" N="result1"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="1353" T="Increment"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{a2e970b9-d1eb-4551-9d3b-55c439527346}">Increments the variable count_2320 upon activation.</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="variableID">66</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="11824" FP="_AP" N="a"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="1355" N="JavaScript_LineAjuducationInformation_Input" T="JScript"><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">//Get recordset values
var Line_PayerCheck = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;Line_PayerCheck&quot;);
var resArr = new Array();
var lineNum = ec_DataHelper.GetValueByIndex(4);
var payerId = ec_DataHelper.GetValueByIndex(3);
var myRSLine_Payer = lineNum + &quot;-&quot; + payerId;
myRS = ec_VariableHelper.GetRecordSet(&quot;Service_2430Details&quot;);
myRS.first();
var arrayLinePayer = &quot;&quot;;
var found_payer = 0;
if(Line_PayerCheck.length &gt; 0)
{
var splitRes = Line_PayerCheck.split(&quot;|&quot;);
for(var j=0;j&lt;splitRes.length;j++)
{
if (splitRes[j] == myRSLine_Payer)
{
found_payer = 1;
}
}
}
if (found_payer == 0)
{	//Update the recordset with the values of array &quot;resArr&quot;
for (var i = 0; i &lt; 7; i++) resArr [i] = ec_DataHelper.GetValueByIndex(i);
myRS.insertRow();
myRS.updateRow(resArr);
ec_VariableHelper.SetRecordSet(&quot;Service_2430Details&quot;, myRS, true);
}
else
{
//Update/Add to existing row:
var RS1 = myRS.getRow();
var netPaid = ec_DataHelper.GetValueByIndex(0);
var memberResponsibility = ec_DataHelper.GetValueByIndex(2);
var remitDate = ec_DataHelper.GetValueByIndex(1);
while(RS1&gt;0)
{
Fields = myRS.getFields();
arrayLinePayer = Fields[4] + &quot;-&quot; + Fields[3];
if(myRSLine_Payer == arrayLinePayer)
{
Fields[0] = +Fields[0] + +netPaid;
if(memberResponsibility!=&quot;&quot;)
{
Fields[2] = +Fields[2] + +memberResponsibility;
}
if (Fields[1] == &quot;&quot;)
{
Fields[1] = remitDate;
}
myRS.updateRow(Fields);
}
myRS.next();
RS1 = myRS.getRow();
}
ec_VariableHelper.SetRecordSet(&quot;Service_2430Details&quot;, myRS, true);
}</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="11855" FP="A" P="0" N="value1"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="11857" FP="A" P="1" N="value2"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="11858" FP="A" BilledAmt.</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="variableID">69</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="11988" FP="A" N="v"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="1372" T="ChangeVariable"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{a2e970b9-d1eb-4551-9d3b-55c439527346}">Store the value of the element SV203.</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="variableID">70</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="11992" FP="A" N="v"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="1377" N="ServiceAdjustmentInput" T="JScript"><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">//Record Set &quot;ServiceAdjustment&quot; has information from 2430\CAS(Line Adjustment).
var GroupCode = ec_DataHelper.GetValueByIndex(0);
//Gets the recordset &quot;ServiceAdjustment&quot;
myRS = ec_VariableHelper.GetRecordSet(&quot;ServiceAdjustment&quot;);
var resArr = new Array();
//Assign the input values to the array &quot;resArr&quot;
for (var i = 0; i &lt; 19; i++) resArr [i] = ec_DataHelper.GetValueByIndex(i);
// Update the recordset with the input values
myRS.insertRow();
myRS.updateRow(resArr);
ec_VariableHelper.SetRecordSet(&quot;ServiceAdjustment&quot;, myRS, true);
</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="12016" FP="A" P="0" N="value1"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="12017" FP="A" P="1" N="value2"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="12018" FP="A" P="2" N="value3"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="12019" FP="A" P="3" N="value4"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="12020" FP="A" P="4" N="value5"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="12021" FP="A" P="5" N="value6"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="12022" FP="A" P="6" N="value7"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="12023" FP="A" P="7" N="value8"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="12024" FP="A" P="8" N="value9"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="12025" FP="A" P="9" N="value10"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="12026" FP="A" P="10" N="value11"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="12027" FP="A" P="11" N="value12"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="12028" FP="A" P="12" N="value13"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="12029" FP="A" P="13" N="value14"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="12030" FP="A" P="14" N="value15"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="12031" FP="A" P="15" N="value16"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="12032" FP="A" P="16" N="value17"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="12033" FP="A" P="17" N="value18"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="12034" FP="A" P="18" N="value19"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="12015" FP="X" P="0" N="no output"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="1379" N="ServiceLineCAScodes_Output" T="JScript"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{a2e970b9-d1eb-4551-9d3b-55c439527346}">Trigger the recordset based on activation.</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">//Retrieve the recordset values
myRS3 = ec_VariableHelper.GetRecordSet(&quot;LineCAS_CO_PR&quot;);//CO PR
lineNum = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;LineNumber&quot;);
myRS3.last();
var RS3 = myRS3.getRow();
while (RS3&gt;0)
{
//Assign the recordset values to the array &quot;Fields3&quot;
Fields3 = myRS3.getFields();
if(Fields3[19] == lineNum)
{
for (var i=0; i&lt;6; i++)
{
if((Fields3[i*3+1] != &quot;&quot;) &amp;&amp; (Fields3[i*3+1] != &quot;undefined&quot;))
{
var CASamount = parseFloat(Fields3[i*3+2]);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0, Fields3[i*3+1]);//Cascode
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(1, Fields3[0]);//Groupcode
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(2, CASamount.toFixed(2));//Amount
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(3, Fields3[i*3+3]);//Quantity
ec_ResultHelper.Send();
}
}
}
myRS3.previous();
RS3 = myRS3.getRow();
}</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="12050" FP="_AP" N="a"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="12051" FP="A" P="0" N="value0"/><CP ID="12046" FP="X" P="0" N="2430_CAS02,05,08,11,14,17"/><CP ID="12047" FP="X" P="1" N="2430_CAS01"/><CP ID="12048" FP="X" P="2" N="2430_CAS03,06,09,12,15,18"/><CP ID="12049" FP="X" P="3" N="2430_CAS04,07,10,13,16,19"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="1380" N="JavaScript_EOBDate" T="JScript"><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">var date2430 = ec_DataHelper.GetValueByIndex(0);
var firstinstance2430 = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;FirstInstance_2430Date&quot;);
if(firstinstance2430 == &quot;&quot;){
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0, date2430);
}</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="12071" FP="A" P="0" N="value1"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="12070" FP="X" P="0" N="result1"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="1381" T="LookAhead"><Ps C="S"><P N="lookupUPath">/Transaction(ID = '837', Instance = 'current()')/Loop(ID = '2000B', Instance = 'current()')/Loop(ID = '2300', Instance = 'current()')/Loop(ID = '2400', Instance = 'current()')/Loop(ID = '2430', Instance = 'current()')/Segment(ID = 'DTP', Instance = 'current()')/Element(ID = '1251')</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="12073" FP="_AP" N="a"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="12072" FP="X" N="r"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="1382" T="ChangeVariable"><Ps C="S"><P N="variableID">71</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="12074" FP="A" N="v"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="1389" N="JavaScript_ServiceAdjustmentOutput" T="JScript"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{a2e970b9-d1eb-4551-9d3b-55c439527346}">Trigger the recordsets based on activation.</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">
//Gets the recordset &quot;ServiceAdjustment&quot;
myRS = ec_VariableHelper.GetRecordSet(&quot;ServiceAdjustment&quot;);//CO PR
myRS.last();
var RS = myRS.getRow();
var arrayResult = [0,0,0,0,0,0,0,0,0];//Initialize array
allowedAmt_Line = 0;
var netPaidAmt = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;SVD02_SumAmt_2000B_2430&quot;);//NetPaidAmount
var billedAmount = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;SV203_billedAmount_2400&quot;);//BilledAmount
var Loop2430_Present = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;Flag_2430Present&quot;);
if(netPaidAmt!= &quot;&quot;)
{
allowedAmt_Line = netPaidAmt;
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(9, netPaidAmt);//netPaidAmount
}
while (RS&gt;0)
{
Fields = myRS.getFields();
for (var i=0; i&lt;6; i++)
{
if (Fields[0] == &quot;PR&quot;)//Enters if ClaimAdjustmentGroupCode is &quot;PR&quot;
{
switch (Fields[i*3+1])//ClaimAdjustmentReasonCode
{
case &quot;1&quot;:
arrayResult[0] = +arrayResult[0] + +Fields[i*3+2];// Assign sum of monetary amounts when ClaimAdjustmentReasonCode is '1' to array index '0'
break;
case &quot;2&quot;:
arrayResult[1] = +arrayResult[1] + +Fields[i*3+2];// Assign sum of monetary amounts when ClaimAdjustmentReasonCode is '2' to array index '1'
break;
case &quot;225&quot;:
arrayResult[2] = +arrayResult[2] + +Fields[i*3+2];
break;
case &quot;237&quot;:
arrayResult[2] = +arrayResult[2] + +Fields[i*3+2];
break;
case &quot;B4&quot;:
arrayResult[2] = +arrayResult[2] + +Fields[i*3+2];
break;
// Assign sum of monetary amounts when ClaimAdjustmentReasonCode is '225', '237', and 'B4'  to array index '2'
case &quot;3&quot;:
arrayResult[3] = +arrayResult[3] + +Fields[i*3+2];// Assign sum of monetary amounts when ClaimAdjustmentReasonCode is '3' to array index '3'
break;
default:
arrayResult[6] = +arrayResult[6] + +Fields[i*3+2];// Sum of monetary amounts for other values of ClaimAdjustmentReasonCode
}
allowedAmt_Line = +allowedAmt_Line + +Fields[i*3+2];//monetary amount + NetPaidAmount
}
else
{
if (Fields[0] == &quot;CO&quot;)//Enters when ClaimAdjustmentGroupCode is &quot;CO&quot;
{
switch (Fields[i*3+1])// ClaimAdjustmentReasonCode
{
case &quot;225&quot;:
arrayResult[4] = +arrayResult[4] + +Fields[i*3+2];
break;
case &quot;237&quot;:
arrayResult[4] = +arrayResult[4] + +Fields[i*3+2];
break;
case &quot;B4&quot;:
arrayResult[4] = +arrayResult[4] + +Fields[i*3+2];
break;
// Assign sum of monetary amounts when ClaimAdjustmentReasonCode is '225', '237', and 'B4'  to array index '4'
case &quot;45&quot;:
arrayResult[5] = +arrayResult[5] + +Fields[i*3+2];// Assign the sum of monetary amounts when ClaimAdjustmentReasonCode is '45' to array index '5'
break;
case &quot;105&quot;:
arrayResult[8] = +arrayResult[8] + +Fields[i*3+2];
break;
default:
arrayResult[7] = +arrayResult[7] + +Fields[i*3+2];//Sum of monetary amounts for other values of ClaimAdjustmentReasonCode
}
}
}
}
ec_ResultHelper.Send();
myRS.previous();
RS = myRS.getRow();
}
arrayResult[9] = +arrayResult[6]+ +arrayResult[7];
// Report the elemnts of the array &quot;arrayResult&quot;
for (var i=0; i&lt;6; i++)
{
if (arrayResult[i] != 0 &amp;&amp; arrayResult[i]!= &quot;&quot; &amp;&amp; arrayResult[i]!= undefined)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(i, arrayResult[i].toFixed(2));
}
}
if (arrayResult[8] != 0 &amp;&amp; arrayResult[8]!=&quot;&quot; &amp;&amp; arrayResult[8]!= undefined)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(12, arrayResult[8].toFixed(2));
}
if (arrayResult[9] != 0 &amp;&amp; arrayResult[9]!= &quot;&quot; &amp;&amp; arrayResult[9]!= undefined)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(6, arrayResult[9].toFixed(2));
}
if(Loop2430_Present == &quot;1&quot;)
{
if(allowedAmt_Line!=0 &amp;&amp; allowedAmt_Line!= &quot;&quot; &amp;&amp; allowedAmt_Line!= undefined )
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(7, parseFloat(allowedAmt_Line).toFixed(2));//Allowed amount
}
else
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(7, &quot;0.00&quot;);
}
}
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(8, billedAmount)//billedAmount
var amt = ec_DataHelper.GetValueByIndex(0);
if ((amt != &quot;&quot;)) ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(11,amt);//MemberResponsibilityAmount</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="12092" FP="_AP" N="a"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="14257" FP="A" P="0" N="value2" DirectValue="{87}"/><CP ID="12091" FP="X" P="0" N="CAS03,06,09,12,15,18_Deductible"/><CP ID="12093" FP="X" P="1" N="CAS03,06,09,12,15,18_CoInsurance"/><CP ID="12094" FP="X" P="2" N="CAS03,06,09,12,15,18_MemberPenalty"/><CP ID="12095" FP="X" P="3" N="CAS03,06,09,12,15,18_Copay"/><CP ID="12096" FP="X" P="4" N="CAS03,06,09,12,15,18_ProviderPenalty"/><CP ID="12097" FP="X" P="5" N="CAS03,06,09,12,15,18_DiscountAmt"/><CP ID="12098" FP="X" P="6" N="CAS03,06,09,12,15,18_NonCoveredAmt"/><CP ID="12099" FP="X" P="7" N="2430_SVD02"/><CP ID="12101" FP="X" P="8" N="2400_SV203"/><CP ID="12107" FP="X" P="9" N="2430_SVD02_NetPaidAmt"/><CP ID="12486" FP="X" P="10" N="noOutput"/><CP ID="14258" FP="X" P="11" N="2430_AMT02"/><CP ID="14583" FP="X" P="12" N="taxAmount"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="1390" N="JavaScript_RecordSetClear" T="JScript"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{a2e970b9-d1eb-4551-9d3b-55c439527346}">Clears the recordset ServiceAdjustment.</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">// Clear the junk values

//Update the recordset with the values of the array 'resArr'
myRS.insertRow();
myRS.updateRow(resArr);
ec_VariableHelper.SetRecordSet(&quot;Claim_2320CAS_2000C&quot;, myRS, true);</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="12174" FP="A" P="0" N="value1"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="12175" FP="A" P="1"
