T="Substring"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{df450e4e-e4da-45d3-a02c-cf9fcffb29f5}">Map Zip Code byte 1-5</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="start">0</P><P N="length">5</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="8757" FP="A" N="v"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="8756" FP="X" N="r"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="1153" N="Substring-zipextensioncode" T="Substring"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{df450e4e-e4da-45d3-a02c-cf9fcffb29f5}">Map Zip Code Extension byte 6-9</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="start">5</P><P N="length">4</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="8759" FP="A" N="v"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="8758" FP="X" N="r"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="1162" T="ChangeVariable"><Ps C="S"><P N="variableID">148</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="8814" FP="_AP" N="a"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="8815" FP="A" N="v" DirectValue="1"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="1163" N="JavaScript-ServiceAdjustment" T="JScript"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{df450e4e-e4da-45d3-a02c-cf9fcffb29f5}"> Mapping EOB Payment Information for 2000C loop</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">        // Retrieve the record set for LineCAS_CO_PR_2000C
myRS = ec_VariableHelper.GetRecordSet(&quot;ServiceAdjustment_2000C&quot;);//CO PR
myRS.last();
var Fields = new Array();
var arrayResult = [0,0,0,0,0,0,0,0,0];// Initialize an array to store the calculation results
allowedAmt_Line = 0;// Initialize the allowed amount for the line
var netPaidAmt = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;SVD02_2430_MonetarySumAmt_2000C&quot;);// Get the net paid amount from the variable
//var billedAmount = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;SV203_billedAmount_2400&quot;);
var Loop2430_Present = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;Flag_2430Present_2000C&quot;);// Get the Loop2430_Present flag from the variable
if(netPaidAmt!= &quot;&quot;)// Check if netPaidAmt is not empty
{
allowedAmt_Line = netPaidAmt;
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(10,netPaidAmt);//netPaidAmount
}
do
{
RS = myRS.getRow();
if (RS&gt;0)// Iterate over the record set
{
Fields = myRS.getFields();
//ec_ResultHelper.println(Fields[0]);
for (var i=0; i&lt;6; i++)
{
if (Fields[0] == &quot;PR&quot;)// Perform calculations based on the value in Fields[0]
{
switch (Fields[i*3+1])
{
case &quot;1&quot;:
arrayResult[0] = +arrayResult[0] + +Fields[i*3+2];
break;
case &quot;2&quot;:
arrayResult[1] = +arrayResult[1] + +Fields[i*3+2];
break;
case &quot;225&quot;:
arrayResult[2] = +arrayResult[2] + +Fields[i*3+2];
break;
case &quot;237&quot;:
arrayResult[2] = +arrayResult[2] + +Fields[i*3+2];
break;
case &quot;B4&quot;:
arrayResult[2] = +arrayResult[2] + +Fields[i*3+2];
break;
case &quot;3&quot;:
arrayResult[3] = +arrayResult[3] + +Fields[i*3+2];
break;
default:
arrayResult[7] = +arrayResult[7] + +Fields[i*3+2];
}
allowedAmt_Line = +allowedAmt_Line + +Fields[i*3+2];
//ec_ResultHelper.println(&quot;allowedAmt_Line&quot;+allowedAmt_Line);
}
else if (Fields[0] == &quot;CO&quot;)
{
switch (Fields[i*3+1])
{
case &quot;225&quot;:
arrayResult[4] = +arrayResult[4] + +Fields[i*3+2];
break;
case &quot;237&quot;:
arrayResult[4] = +arrayResult[4] + +Fields[i*3+2];
break;
case &quot;B4&quot;:
arrayResult[4] = +arrayResult[4] + +Fields[i*3+2];
break;
case &quot;45&quot;:
arrayResult[5] = +arrayResult[5] + +Fields[i*3+2];
break;
case &quot;105&quot;:
arrayResult[6] = +arrayResult[6] + +Fields[i*3+2];
break;
default:
arrayResult[8] = +arrayResult[8] + +Fields[i*3+2];
}
}
}
myRS.previous(); // Move to the previous row in the record set
}
}
while(!myRS.isLast());
ec_ResultHelper.Send();
arrayResult[7] = +arrayResult[7]+ +arrayResult[8];// Calculate the sum of arrayResult[6] and arrayResult[7]
for (var i=0; i&lt;8; i++)
{
if (arrayResult[i] != 0 &amp;&amp; arrayResult[i] !=&quot;&quot; &amp;&amp; arrayResult[i] !=undefined)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(i, parseFloat(arrayResult[i]).toFixed(2));
}
}
if(Loop2430_Present == &quot;1&quot;)// Check if Loop2430_Present is &quot;1&quot;
{
if(allowedAmt_Line!=0 &amp;&amp; allowedAmt_Line!=&quot;&quot; &amp;&amp; allowedAmt_Line!=undefined)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(8, parseFloat(allowedAmt_Line).toFixed(2));//Allowed amount
}
}</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="8826" FP="_AP" N="a"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="8827" FP="A" P="0" N="value1"/><CP ID="8816" FP="X" P="0" N="CAS03,06,09,12,15,18_DeductibleAmt"/><CP ID="8817" FP="X" P="1" N="CAS03,06,09,12,15,18_CoInsurance"/><CP ID="8818" FP="X" P="2" N="CAS03,06,09,12,15,18_MemberPenality "/><CP ID="8819" FP="X" P="3" N="CAS03,06,09,12,15,18_CoPay "/><CP ID="8820" FP="X" P="4" N="CAS03,06,09,12,15,18_ProviderPenality"/><CP ID="8821" FP="X" P="5" N="CAS03,06,09,12,15,18_DiscountAmt"/><CP ID="12318" FP="X" P="6" N="CAS03,06,09,12,15,18_TaxAmt"/><CP ID="8822" FP="X" P="7" N="CAS03,06,09,12,15,18_NonCoveredAmount "/><CP ID="8823" FP="X" P="8" N="Allowedamt-CAS*PR+SVD02"/><CP ID="8824" FP="X" P="9" N="NoOuput"/><CP ID="8825" FP="X" P="10" N="SVD02(2400)"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="1164" T="ChangeVariable"><Ps C="S"><P N="variableID">148</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="8828" FP="_AP" N="a"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="8829" FP="A" N="v" DirectValue="0"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="1165" T="ChangeVariable"><Ps C="S"><P N="variableID">114</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="8830" FP="A" N="v"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="1166" N="ServiceLineCAScodes" T="JScript"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{df450e4e-e4da-45d3-a02c-cf9fcffb29f5}">Mapping for Cascodes of 2000C</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Type">1</P><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">// Retrieve the record set for LineCAS_CO_PR_2000C
myRS3 = ec_VariableHelper.GetRecordSet(&quot;LineCAS_CO_PR_2000C&quot;);//CO PR
// Get the LX01_ServiceLineNum_2400_2000C variable
lx01 = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;LX01_ServiceLineNum_2400_2000C&quot;);
//ec_ResultHelper.println (&quot;LX printing &quot; + lx01)
myRS3.last();  //selecting the last row in the record set
var RS3 = myRS3.getRow();// Get the current row number
while (RS3&gt;0)// Iterate over the record set
{
Fields3 = myRS3.getFields();
if(Fields3[19] == lx01)// Check if the value at index 19 matches lx01
{
for (var i=0; i&lt;6; i++)
{
if((Fields3[i*3+1] != &quot;&quot;) &amp;&amp; (Fields3[i*3+1] != &quot;undefined&quot;))
{
// Report the results for each field
var CASamount = parseFloat(Fields3[i*3+2]);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0, Fields3[i*3+1]);//Cascode
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(1, Fields3[0]);//Groupcode
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(2, parseFloat(CASamount).toFixed(2));//Amount
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(3, Fields3[i*3+3]);//Quantity
ec_ResultHelper.Send();
}
}
}
myRS3.previous();
RS3 = myRS3.getRow();
}</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="8835" FP="_AP" N="a"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="8836" FP="A" P="0" N="value0"/><CP ID="8831" FP="X" P="0" N="CAS02,05,08,11,14,17 "/><CP ID="8832" FP="X" P="1" N="CAS01"/><CP ID="8833" FP="X" P="2" N="CAS03,06,09,12,15,18 "/><CP ID="8834" FP="X" P="3" N="CAS04,07,10,13,16,19"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="1167" N="Service2430DetailsInput" T="JScript"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{df450e4e-e4da-45d3-a02c-cf9fcffb29f5}">Record set for 2430 loop details</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">var Line_PayerCheck = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;Line_PayerCheck_2000C&quot;);
var resArr = new Array();
var lineNum = ec_DataHelper.GetValueByIndex(4);
var payerId = ec_DataHelper.GetValueByIndex(0);
var myRSLine_Payer = lineNum + &quot;-&quot; + payerId;
myRS = ec_VariableHelper.GetRecordSet(&quot;Service_2430Details_2000C&quot;);
myRS.first();
var arrayLinePayer = &quot;&quot;;
var found_payer = 0;
if(Line_PayerCheck.length &gt; 0)
{
var splitRes = Line_PayerCheck.split(&quot;|&quot;);
for(var j=0;j&lt;splitRes.length;j++)
{
if (splitRes[j] == myRSLine_Payer)
{
found_payer = 1;
}
}
}
if (found_payer == 0)
{
for (var i = 0; i &lt; 6; i++) resArr [i] = ec_DataHelper.GetValueByIndex(i);   //0-svd01,1-netpaid/svd02,2-dtp03,3-amt02-memrespamt
myRS.insertRow();
myRS.updateRow(resArr);
ec_VariableHelper.SetRecordSet(&quot;Service_2430Details_2000C&quot;, myRS, true);
}
else
{
//Update/Add to existing row:
var RS1 = myRS.getRow();
var netPaid = ec_DataHelper.GetValueByIndex(1);
var memberResponsibility = ec_DataHelper.GetValueByIndex(3);
var eobdate = ec_DataHelper.GetValueByIndex(2);
while(RS1&gt;0)
{
Fields = myRS.getFields();
arrayLinePayer = Fields[4] + &quot;-&quot; + Fields[0];
if(myRSLine_Payer == arrayLinePayer)
{
Fields[1] = +Fields[1] + +netPaid;
if(memberResponsibility!=&quot;&quot;)
{
Fields[3] = +Fields[3] + +memberResponsibility;
}
if ( Fields[2] == &quot;&quot;)
{
Fields[2] = eobdate;
}
myRS.updateRow(Fields);
}
myRS.next();
RS1 = myRS.getRow();
}
ec_VariableHelper.SetRecordSet(&quot;Service_2430Details_2000C&quot;, myRS, true);
}</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="8838" FP="A" P="0" N="value0"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="8839" FP="A" P="1" N="value1"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="8840" FP="A" P="2" N="value2"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="8841" FP="A" P="3" N="value3"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="8842" FP="A" P="4" N="value4" DirectValue="{139}"/><CP ID="8843" FP="A" P="5" N="value5" DirectValue="{104}"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="8844" FP="A" P="6" N="value6"/><CP ID="8837" FP="X" P="0" N="no output"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="1168" N="ServiceAdjustmentInputAll" T="JScript"><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">var Line_PayerCheck = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;Line_PayerCheck_2000C&quot;);
var resArr = new Array();
var lineNum = ec_DataHelper.GetValueByIndex(19);
var payerId = ec_DataHelper.GetValueByIndex(20);
var myRSLine_Payer = lineNum + &quot;-&quot; + payerId;
myRS = ec_VariableHelper.GetRecordSet(&quot;LineCAS_CO_PR_2000C&quot;);
myRS.first();
var arrayLinePayer = &quot;&quot;;
var found_payer = 0;
if(Line_PayerCheck.length &gt; 0)
{
var splitRes = Line_PayerCheck.split(&quot;|&quot;);
for(var j=0;j&lt;splitRes.length;j++)
{
if (splitRes[j] == myRSLine_Payer)
{
found_payer = 1;
}
}
}
if (found_payer == 0)
{
for (var i = 0; i &lt; 21; i++) resArr [i] = ec_DataHelper.GetValueByIndex(i);
myRS.insertRow();
myRS.updateRow(resArr);
ec_VariableHelper.SetRecordSet(&quot;LineCAS_CO_PR_2000C&quot;, myRS, true);
}
else
{
//Update/Add to existing row:
var casArray_Temp = new Array();//create new array
for (var i = 0; i &lt; 21; i++) casArray_Temp [i] = ec_DataHelper.GetValueByIndex(i); //casArray_Temp[19]-linenum,casArray_Temp[20]-svd01
var counter = 0;
var newCASArray = new Array(21); //creating array with length 21
for(var j=1; j&lt;casArray_Temp.length-2; j=j+3)
{
var found_CAS = 0;
myRS = ec_VariableHelper.GetRecordSet(&quot;LineCAS_CO_PR_2000C&quot;);
myRS.first();
var RS1 = myRS.getRow();
while(RS1&gt;0)
{
Fields = myRS.getFields();
arrayLinePayer = Fields[19] + &quot;-&quot; + Fields[20];
if(myRSLine_Payer == arrayLinePayer)
{
if(casArray_Temp[0] == Fields[0])
{
switch (casArray_Temp[j])
{
case Fields[1]:
Fields[2] = +Fields[2] + +casArray_Temp[j+1];
if(casArray_Temp[j+2] != &quot;&quot;)
{
Fields[3] = +Fields[3] + +casArray_Temp[j+2];
}
found_CAS = 1;
break;
case Fields[4]:
Fields[5] = +Fields[5] + +casArray_Temp[j+1];
if(casArray_Temp[j+2] != &quot;&quot;)
{
Fields[6] = +Fields[6] + +casArray_Temp[j+2];
}
found_CAS = 1;
break;
case Fields[7]:
Fields[8] = +Fields[8] + +casArray_Temp[j+1];
if(casArray_Temp[j+2] != &quot;&quot;)
{
Fields[9] = +Fields[9] + +casArray_Temp[j+2];
}
found_CAS = 1;
break;
case Fields[10]:
Fields[11] = +Fields[11] + +casArray_Temp[j+1];
if(casArray_Temp[j+2] != &quot;&quot;)
{
Fields[12] = +Fields[12] + +casArray_Temp[j+2];
}
found_CAS = 1;
break;
case Fields[13]:
Fields[14] = +Fields[14] + +casArray_Temp[j+1];
if(casArray_Temp[j+2] != &quot;&quot;)
{
Fields[15] = +Fields[15] + +casArray_Temp[j+2];
}
found_CAS = 1;
break;
case Fields[16]:
Fields[17] = +Fields[17] + +casArray_Temp[j+1];
if(casArray_Temp[j+2] != &quot;&quot;)
{
Fields[18] = +Fields[18] + +casArray_Temp[j+2];
}
found_CAS = 1;
break;
}
myRS.updateRow(Fields);
ec_VariableHelper.SetRecordSet(&quot;LineCAS_CO_PR_2000C&quot;, myRS, true);
}
}
myRS.next();
RS1 = myRS.getRow();
}
if ((found_CAS == 0) &amp;&amp; (casArray_Temp[j]!=&quot;undefined&quot;) &amp;&amp; (casArray_Temp[j]!=&quot;&quot;))
{
if (counter == 0)
{
newCASArray[19] = casArray_Temp[19];
newCASArray[20] = casArray_Temp[20];
newCASArray[0] = casArray_Temp[0];
}
counter = counter + 1;
newCASArray[counter] = casArray_Temp[j];
newCASArray[counter+1] = casArray_Temp[j+1];
newCASArray[counter+2] = casArray_Temp[j+2];
}
}
if (newCASArray.length &gt; 0)
{
myRS.insertRow();
myRS.updateRow(newCASArray);
ec_VariableHelper.SetRecordSet(&quot;LineCAS_CO_PR_2000C&quot;, myRS, true);
//ec_ResultHelper.println(&quot;Else part 2000C RS&quot; + myRS)
}
}
</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="8846" FP="A" P="0" N="value1"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="8847" FP="A" P="1" N="value2"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="8848" FP="A" P="2" N="value3"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="8849" FP="A" P="3" N="value4"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="8850" FP="A" P="4" N="value5"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="8851" FP="A" P="5" N="value6"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="8852" FP="A" P="6" N="value7"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="8853" FP="A" P="7" N="value8"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="8854" FP="A" P="8" N="value9"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="8855" FP="A" P="9" N="value10"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="8856" FP="A" P="10" N="value11"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="8857" FP="A" P="11" N="value12"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="8858" FP="A" P="12" N="value13"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="8859" FP="A" P="13" N="value14"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="8860" FP="A" P="14" N="value15"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="8861" FP="A" P="15" N="value16"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="8862" FP="A" P="16" N="value17"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="8863" FP="A" P="17" N="value18"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="8864" FP="A" P="18" N="value19"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="8865" FP="A" P="19" N="value20" DirectValue="{139}"/><CP ID="8866" FP="A" P="20" N="value21" DirectValue="{149}"/><CP ID="8845" FP="X" P="0" N="no output"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="1169" T="ChangeVariable"><Ps C="S"><P N="variableID">149</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="8867" FP="A" N="v"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="1171" T="SetValue"><CPs><CP ID="8877" FP="_AP" N="a"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="8878" FP="A" N="v" DirectValue="{151}"/><CP ID="8876" FP="X" N="r"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="1172" T="ConditionalCopy"><Ps C="S"><P N="if_1/conditions/expression_1/arg1">8880</P><P N="if_1/conditions/expression_1/arg1/type">2</P><P N="if_1/conditions/expression_1/operation">1</P><P N="if_1/conditions/expression_1/operation/type">0</P><P N="if_1/conditions/expression_1/arg2">0</P><P N="if_1/actions/assignment_1/lvalue">8879</P><P N="if_1/actions/assignment_1/lvalue/type">2</P><P N="if_1/actions/assignment_1/rvalue">8880</P><P N="if_1/actions/assignment_1/rvalue/type">2</P><P N="else/actions/assignment_1/lvalue">8879</P><P N="else/actions/assignment_1/lvalue/type">2</P><P N="else/actions/assignment_1/rvalue">0</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="8880" FP="A" P="0" N="value1"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="8879" FP="X" P="0" N="2430-AMT02"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="1174" N="JavaScript_RecordSet-3" T="JScript"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{df450e4e-e4da-45d3-a02c-cf9fcffb29f5}">//Reseting the recorset ie,removing junk values</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">//Reseting the recorset ie,removing junk values
myRS = ec_VariableHelper.GetRecordSet(&quot;ServiceAdjustment_2000C&quot;);
myRS.clear();</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="8887" FP="_AP" N="a"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="8888" FP="A" P="0" N="value1"/><CP ID="8886" FP="X" P="0" N="result1"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="1180" T="ChangeVariable"><Ps C="S"><P N="variableID">152</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="8898" FP="A" N="v"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="1183" N="Add-charged amt" T="Add"><CPs><CP ID="8904" FP="A" P="0" N="number1"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="8905" FP="A" P="1" N="number2" DirectValue="{106}"/><CP ID="8903" FP="X" N="r"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="1184" T="ChangeVariable"><Ps C="S"><P N="variableID">106</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="8906" FP="A" N="v"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="1194" N="System Date/Time-DATE" T="SystemDateTime"><Ps C="S"><P N="format">yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="8938" FP="_AP" N="a"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="8937" FP="X" N="r"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="1196" N="System Date/Time-DATE" T="SystemDateTime"><Ps C="S"><P N="format">yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="8943" FP="_AP" N="a"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="8942" FP="X" N="r"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="1202" N="JavaScript- RenderingProviderOutput" T="JScript"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{df450e4e-e4da-45d3-a02c-cf9fcffb29f5}">maping done for Rendering Provider only in 2000B Loop</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">// Retrieving record sets or creating recorset
myRS1 = ec_VariableHelper.GetRecordSet(&quot;BillingProvider_2000A&quot;);
myRS2 = ec_VariableHelper.GetRecordSet(&quot;Rendering_Prov_2310B_2000B&quot;);
myRS3 = ec_VariableHelper.GetRecordSet(&quot;Rendering_Prov_2420A_2000B&quot;);
// Retrieving fields from record sets
Fields3 = myRS3.getFields();
Fields2 = myRS2.getFields();
Fields1 = myRS1.getFields();
// Checking if 2420A is not empty
if (Fields3[0] != &quot;&quot;) //for missed mandatory info
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0, Fields3[0]);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(1, Fields3[1]);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(2, Fields3[4]);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(3, Fields3[5]);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(4, Fields3[6]);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(5, Fields3[7]);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(6, Fields3[2]);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(7, Fields3[3]);
ec_ResultHelper.Send();
}
// Checking if 2420A is empty and 2310B is not empty
else if(Fields3[0] == &quot;&quot; &amp;&amp; Fields2[0] != &quot;&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0, Fields2[0]);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(1, Fields2[1]);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(2, Fields2[4]);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(3, Fields2[5]);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(4, Fields2[6]);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(5, Fields2[7]);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(6, Fields2[2]);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(7, Fields2[3]);
ec_ResultHelper.Send();
}
// Checking if 2010AA NM102 is &quot;1&quot;
else if(Fields1[1] == &quot;1&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0, Fields1[2]);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(1, Fields1[3]);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(2, Fields1[6]);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(4, Fields1[13]);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(5, Fields1[14]);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(6, Fields1[4]);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(7, Fields1[5]);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(3, Fields1[0]);
ec_ResultHelper.Send();
}</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="8973" FP="_AP" N="a"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="8974" FP="A" P="0" N="no input"/><CP ID="8965" FP="X" P="0" N="NM103"/><CP ID="8966" FP="X" P="1" N="NM104"/><CP ID="8967" FP="X" P="2" N="NM109"/><CP ID="8968" FP="X" P="3" N="PRV03"/><CP ID="8969" FP="X" P="4" N="REF01"/><CP ID="8970" FP="X" P="5" N="REF02"/><CP ID="8971" FP="X" P="6" N="NM105"/><CP ID="8972" FP="X" P="7" N="NM107"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="1204" N="JavaScript- RenderingProviderOutput" T="JScript"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{df450e4e-e4da-45d3-a02c-cf9fcffb29f5}">Mapping done for RenderingProvider details</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">//Obtain record sets
myRS1 = ec_VariableHelper.GetRecordSet(&quot;BillingProvider_2000A&quot;);
myRS2 = ec_VariableHelper.GetRecordSet(&quot;Rendering_Prov_2310B_2000C&quot;);
myRS3 = ec_VariableHelper.GetRecordSet(&quot;Rendering_Prov_2420A_2000C&quot;);
Fields3 = myRS3.getFields();
Fields2 = myRS2.getFields();
Fields1 = myRS1.getFields();
//Check if 2420A is not empty
if (Fields3[0] != &quot;&quot;) //for missed mandatory info
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0, Fields3[0]);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(1, Fields3[1]);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(2, Fields3[4]);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(3, Fields3[5]);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(4, Fields3[6]);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(5, Fields3[7]);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(6, Fields3[2]);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(7, Fields3[3]);
ec_ResultHelper.Send();
}
//Check if 2310B is not empty,2420A is empty
else if(Fields3[0] == &quot;&quot; &amp;&amp; Fields2[0] != &quot;&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0, Fields2[0]);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(1, Fields2[1]);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(2, Fields2[4]);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(3, Fields2[5]);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(4, Fields2[6]);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(5, Fields2[7]);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(6, Fields2[2]);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(7, Fields2[3]);
ec_ResultHelper.Send();
}
else if(Fields1[1] == &quot;1&quot;)//Check if Fields1[1] is equal to &quot;1&quot;
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0, Fields1[2]);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(1, Fields1[3]);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(2, Fields1[6]);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(4, Fields1[13]);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(5, Fields1[14]);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(6, Fields1[4]);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(7, Fields1[5]);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(3, Fields1[0]);
ec_ResultHelper.Send();
}</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="8993" FP="_AP" N="a"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="8994" FP="A" P="0" N="no input"/><CP ID="8985" FP="X" P="0" N="NM103"/><CP ID="8986" FP="X" P="1" N="NM104"/><CP ID="8987" FP="X" P="2" N="NM109"/><CP ID="8988" FP="X" P="3" N="PRV03"/><CP ID="8989" FP="X" P="4" N="REF01"/><CP ID="8990" FP="X" P="5" N="REF02"/><CP ID="8991" FP="X" P="6" N="NM105"/><CP ID="8992" FP="X" P="7" N="NM107"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="1206" N="JavaScript-2000B-ST/BHT" T="JScript"><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">// Retrieving values from variables
//ec_ResultHelper.println(&quot;Edifecs logs&quot;);
var ST02 = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;TransactionSetControlNum&quot;);
var BHT03 = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;BHT03_RefIdentification&quot;);
var BHT04 = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;BHT04_CleanClaimDate&quot;);
var ISA06 = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;ISA_06_SenderID&quot;);
var ISA08 = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;ISA_08_ReceiverID&quot;);
var ClaimSource = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;ClaimSource&quot;);
var ClaimDeliveryType = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;ClaimDeliveryType&quot;);
var RecordID = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;UniqueID&quot;);
if(ST02 !=&quot;&quot;)// Checking if ST02 is not empty
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0,ST02);
}
if(BHT03 !=&quot;&quot;)// Checking if BHT03 is not empty
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(1,BHT03);
}
if(BHT04 !=&quot;&quot;)// Checking if BHT04 is not empty
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(2,BHT04);
}
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(3,&quot;1&quot;);// Reporting result index 3 with value &quot;1&quot;
if(ClaimDeliveryType != &quot;&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(4,ClaimDeliveryType);
}
if(ClaimSource != &quot;&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(5,ClaimSource);
}
//ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(5,ISA06.trim());// Reporting ISA06 trimmed value at index 5
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(6,&quot;Supplier&quot;);// Reporting &quot;Supplier&quot; at index 6
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(7,ISA08.trim());// Reporting ISA08 trimmed value at index 7
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(8,&quot;Submitted Claim Key&quot;);// mapped to ClaimUDT
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(9,RecordID);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(10,&quot;Internal Claim Identifiers&quot;);// mapped to ClaimUDT
</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="9020" FP="_AP" N="a"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="9018" FP="A" P="0" N="value1"/><CP ID="9019" FP="X" P="0" N="ST02"/><CP ID="9021" FP="X" P="1" N="BHT03"/><CP ID="9022" FP="X" P="2" N="BHT04"/><CP ID="9044" FP="X" P="3" N="Medical(1)/claimPayorType"/><CP ID="9047" FP="X" P="4" N="ISA06-S/E"/><CP ID="9049" FP="X" P="5" N="ISA06"/><CP ID="9051" FP="X" P="6" N="Supplier"/><CP ID="9065" FP="X" P="7" N="ISA08"/><CP ID="12519" FP="X" P="8" N="SubmittedClaimKey"/><CP ID="12520" FP="X" P="9" N="UniqueID"/><CP ID="12537" FP="X" P="10" N="InternalClaimIdentifiers"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="1207" T="ConvertDateTime"><Ps C="S"><P N="in_format">CCYYMMDD</P><P N="in_format_spec">1</P><P N="out_format">yyyy-MM-dd</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="9023" FP="A" N="v"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="9024" FP="X" N="BHT04"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="1211" N="JavaScript-2000C-ST/BHT" T="JScript"><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">// Retrieving values from variables

if(ST02 !=&quot;&quot;)// Checking if ST02 is not empty
{

{

{

{

}

</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">
//var ISA06 = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;ISA_06_SenderID&quot;);
//var ISA08 = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;ISA_08_ReceiverID&quot;);
var ISA06 = ec_DataHelper.GetValueByIndex(0);

ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0,ISA06.trim());
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(1,ISA08.trim());
</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="9079" FP="A" P="0" N="value1"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="9081" FP="A" P="1" N="value2"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="9080" FP="X" P="0" N="ISA06"/><CP ID="9082" FP="X" P="1" N="ISA08"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="1243" N="JavaScript-ClaimInfo_Input1" T="JScript"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{df450e4e-e4da-45d3-a02c-cf9fcffb29f5}">Record set for first 11 input values of 2300 loop</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">// Retrieving the record set or creating the recordset
myRs = ec_VariableHelper.GetRecordSet(&quot;Claim_Info_2300_Input1_2000B&quot;);
// Creating an empty array and Getting the value by index and assigning it to the array.
resArr = new Array();
for(i=0;i&lt;11;i++)
{
resArr[i] = ec_DataHelper.GetValueByIndex(i);
}
//Updating the newly inserted row with the values from the array
myRS.insertRow();
myRS.updateRow(resArr);
ec_VariableHelper.SetRecordSet(&quot;Claim_Info_2300_Input1_2000B&quot;, myRS, true);</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="9381" FP="A" P="0" N="value1"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="9383" FP="A" P="1" N="value2"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="9384" FP="A" P="2" N="value3"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="9385" FP="A" P="3" N="value4"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="9386" FP="A" P="4" N="value5"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="9387" FP="A" P="5" N="value6"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="9388" FP="A" P="6" N="value7"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="9389" FP="A" P="7" N="value8"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="9390" FP="A" P="8" N="value9"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="9391" FP="A" P="9" N="value10"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="9656" FP="A" P="10" N="value11"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="9382" FP="X" P="0" N="result1"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="1261" N="JavaScript-Trigger-Claim_Info_2300_Output1" T="JScript"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{df450e4e-e4da-45d3-a02c-cf9fcffb29f5}">Triggering Record of claim information in 2000B loop</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">// Retrieving the record set or creating the recordset
myRS = ec_VariableHelper.GetRecordSet(&quot;Claim_Info_2300_Input1_2000B&quot;);
// Get the fields of the record set
Fields = myRS.getFields();
for(var i = 0; i &lt; 9; i++)
{
// Report the result for each field at index i
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(i,Fields[i]);
}
// Check if Fields[9] or Fields[10] is &quot;EM&quot;
if(Fields[9] == &quot;EM&quot; || Fields[10] == &quot;EM&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(9,&quot;Y&quot;); // Report the result for &quot;EM&quot; condition as &quot;Y&quot; at index 9
}
// Check if Fields[9] or Fields[10] is &quot;0A&quot;
if(Fields[9] == &quot;OA&quot; || Fields[10] == &quot;OA&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(11,&quot;Y&quot;);// Report the result for &quot;0A&quot; condition as &quot;Y&quot; at index 11
}
// Check if Fields[9] or Fields[10] is &quot;AA&quot;
if(Fields[9] == &quot;AA&quot; || Fields[10] == &quot;AA&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(10,&quot;Y&quot;);// Report the result for &quot;AA&quot; condition as &quot;Y&quot; at index 10
}
</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="9597" FP="_AP" N="a"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="9598" FP="A" P="0" N="value1"/><CP ID="9529" FP="X" P="0" N="CLM01"/><CP ID="9530" FP="X" P="1" N="CLM02"/><CP ID="9531" FP="X" P="2" N="CLM05.01"/><CP ID="9532" FP="X" P="3" N="CLM05.03"/><CP ID="9533" FP="X" P="4" N="CLM06"/><CP ID="9534" FP="X" P="5" N="CLM07"/><CP ID="9535" FP="X" P="6" only for void/replacement claims (2300.CLM05.03 = '7' or '8'</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="if_1/conditions/expression_1/arg1">9603</P><P N="if_1/conditions/expression_1/arg1/type">2</P><P N="if_1/actions/assignment_1/rvalue">9604</P><P N="if_1/actions/assignment_1/rvalue/type">2</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="9603" FP="A" P="0" N="value1"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="9604" FP="A" P="1" N="value2"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="9602" FP="X" P="0" N="REF02(Payer Claim)"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="1266" N="Conditional Copy-CLM06" T="ConditionalCopy"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{df450e4e-e4da-45d3-a02c-cf9fcffb29f5}">Map only when CLM06 value is 'Y'</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="if_1/conditions/expression_1/arg1">9606</P><P N="if_1/actions/assignment_1/rvalue/type">2</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="9606" FP="A" P="0" N="value1"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="9605" FP="X" P="0" N="CLM06"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="1278" N="JavaScript-ClaimInfo_Input2" T="JScript"><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">myRS1 = ec_VariableHelper.GetRecordSet(&quot;Claim_Info_input2_2000B&quot;);
resArr1 = new Array();
for(i=0;i&lt;11;i++)
{
resArr1[i] = ec_DataHelper.GetValueByIndex(i);
}
myRS1.insertRow();
myRS1.updateRow(resArr1);
ec_VariableHelper.SetRecordSet(&quot;Claim_Info_input2_2000B&quot;, myRS1, true);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0,&quot;Claim_Info_input2_2000B&quot;);</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="9691" FP="A" P="0" N="value1"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="9692" FP="A" P="1" N="value2"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="9693" FP="A" P="2" N="value3"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="9694" FP="A" P="3" N="value4"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="9695" FP="A" P="4" N="value5"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="9696" FP="A" P="5" N="value6"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="9697" FP="A" P="6" N="value7"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="9698" FP="A" P="7" N="value8"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="9699" FP="A" P="8" N="value9"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="9700" FP="A" P="9" N="value10"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="9701" FP="A" P="10" N="value11"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="9690" FP="X" P="0" N="result1"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="1287" N="JavaScript-Trigger-Claim_Info_2300_Output2" T="JScript"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{df450e4e-e4da-45d3-a02c-cf9fcffb29f5}">Triggering Record of claim information in 2000B loop</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">var myRS = ec_VariableHelper.GetRecordSet(&quot;Claim_Info_input2_2000B&quot;);
myRS.last();
var recordProcessed = false;
do {
var RS = myRS.getRow();
if (RS &gt; 0 &amp;&amp; !recordProcessed) {
var Fields = myRS.getFields();
// Check the country code field (assuming it's in Fields[1])
if (Fields[1] === &quot;&quot;) {
Fields[1] = &quot;US&quot;; // Set default value if no country code exists
}
// Only proceed if there are valid fields
var validFieldsExist = false;
for (var i = 0; i &lt; 11; i++) {
if (Fields[i] !== &quot;&quot; &amp;&amp; Fields[i] !== null &amp;&amp; typeof Fields[i] !== &quot;undefined&quot;) {
validFieldsExist = true;
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(i, Fields[i]);
}
}
// Send results only if valid fields were processed
if (validFieldsExist) {
ec_ResultHelper.Send();
recordProcessed = true; // Mark as processed
}
}

myRS = ec_VariableHelper.GetRecordSet(&quot;Claim_Info_input5_2000B&quot;);
Fields = myRS.getFields();
// Report the value of the field at index i
for(var i = 0; i &lt; 12; i++)
{
if(Fields[i] != &quot;&quot;)
{
// Insert a dot (.) character after the third character of the DiagnosisCode
var DiagnosisCode = Fields[i];
if(DiagnosisCode.length &gt; 3)
{
// Insert a dot (.) character after the third character of the DiagnosisCode
var char = &quot;.&quot;;
var OrgDiagnosisCode = DiagnosisCode.substring(0,3) + char + DiagnosisCode.substring(3,DiagnosisCode.length);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(i,OrgDiagnosisCode);//Report the result for the modified DiagnosisCode at index i
}
else
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(i,DiagnosisCode);
}
}
}
</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="10546" FP="_AP" N="a"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="10547" FP="A" P="0" N="value1"/><CP ID="10517" FP="X" P="0" N="HI01.02"/><CP ID="10518" FP="X" P="1" N="HI02.02"/><CP ID="10519" FP="X" P="2" N="HI03.02"/><CP ID="10520" FP="X" P="3" N="HI04.02"/><CP ID="10521" FP="X" P="4" N="HI05.02"/><CP ID="10522" FP="X" P="5" N="HI06.02"/><CP ID="10523" FP="X" P="6" N="HI07.02"/><CP ID="10524" FP="X" P="7" N="HI08.02"/><CP ID="10525" FP="X" P="8" N="HI09.02"/><CP ID="10526" FP="X" P="9" N="HI10.02"/><CP ID="10527" FP="X" P="10" N="HI11.02"/><CP ID="10528" FP="X" P="11" N="HI12.02"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="1336" N="JavaScript-ClaimInfo_Input1" T="JScript"><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">// Retrieving the record set or creating the recordset

{

}

myRS.updateRow(resArr);
ec_VariableHelper.SetRecordSet(&quot;Claim_Info_2300_Input1_2000C&quot;, myRS, true);</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="10676" FP="A" P="0" N="value1"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="10677" FP="A" P="1" N="value2"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="10678" FP="A" P="2" N="value3"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="10679" FP="A" P="3" N="value4"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="10680" FP="A" P="4" N="value5"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="10681" FP="A" P="5" N="value6"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="10682" FP="A" P="6" N="value7"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="10683" FP="A" P="7" N="value8"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="10684" FP="A" P="8" N="value9"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="10685" FP="A" P="9" N="value10"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="10686" FP="A" P="10" N="value11"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="10675" FP="X" P="0" N="result1"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="1338" N="JavaScript-Trigger-Claim_Info_2300_Output1" T="JScript"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{df450e4e-e4da-45d3-a02c-cf9fcffb29f5}">Triggering Record of claim information in 2000B loop</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">// Retrieve the record set
myRS = ec_VariableHelper.GetRecordSet(&quot;Claim_Info_2300_Input1_2000C&quot;);
Fields = myRS.getFields();// Get the fields of the record set
for(var i = 0; i &lt; 9; i++)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(i,Fields[i]);
}
// Check if Fields[9] or Fields[10] is &quot;EM&quot;
if(Fields[9] == &quot;EM&quot; || Fields[10] == &quot;EM&quot;)
{
// Report the result for &quot;EM&quot; condition as &quot;Y&quot; at index 9
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(9,&quot;Y&quot;);
}
// Check if Fields[9] or Fields[10] is &quot;AA&quot;
if(Fields[9] == &quot;AA&quot; || Fields[10] == &quot;AA&quot;)
{
// Report the result for &quot;AA&quot; condition as &quot;Y&quot; at index 10
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(10,&quot;Y&quot;);
}
// Check if Fields[9] or Fields[10] is &quot;0A&quot;
if( Fields[9] == &quot;OA&quot; || Fields[10] == &quot;OA&quot;)
{
// Report the result for &quot;0A&quot; condition as &quot;Y&quot; at index 11
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(11,&quot;Y&quot;);
}</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="10711" FP="_AP" N="a"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="10712" FP="A" P="0" N="value1"/><CP ID="10700" FP="X" P="0" N="CLM01"/><CP ID="10701" FP="X" P="1" N="CLM02"/><CP ID="10702" FP="X" P="2" N="CLM05.01"/><CP ID="10703" FP="X" P="3" N="CLM05.03"/><CP ID="10704" FP="X" P="4" N="CLM06"/><CP ID="10705" FP="X" P="5" N="CLM07"/><CP ID="10706" FP="X" P="6" N="CLM08"/><CP ID="10707" FP="X" P="7" N="CLM09"/><CP ID="10708" FP="X" P="8" N="CLM10"/><CP ID="10709" FP="X" P="9" N="CLM11.01,02-EM"/><CP ID="10710" FP="X" P="10" N="CLM11.01,02-AA"/><CP ID="12097" FP="X" P="11" N="CLM11.01,02-OA"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="1344" T="ChangeVariable"><Ps C="S"><P N="variableID">52</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="10722" FP="A" N="v"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="1345" N="Change Variable" T="ChangeVariable"><Ps C="S"><P N="variableID">141</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="10723" FP="A" N="v"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="1346" T="ChangeVariable"><Ps C="S"><P N="variableID">162</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="10724" FP="A" N="v"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="1348" N="Conditional Copy-CLM06" T="ConditionalCopy"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{df450e4e-e4da-45d3-a02c-cf9fcffb29f5}">Map only when CLM06 value is 'Y'

ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0,&quot;Claim_Info_input2_2000C&quot;);</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="10781" FP="A" P="0" N="value1"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="10782" FP="A" P="1" N="value2"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="10783" FP="A" P="2" N="value3"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="10784" FP="A" P="3" N="value4"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="10785" FP="A" P="4" N="value5"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="10786" FP="A" P="5" N="value6"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="10787" FP="A" P="6" N="value7"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="10788" FP="A" P="7" N="value8"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="10789" FP="A" P="8" N="value9"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="10790" FP="A" P="9" N="value10"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="10791" FP="A" P="10" N="value11"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="10780" FP="X" P="0" N="result1"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="1375" N="JavaScript-Trigger-Claim_Info_2300_Output2" T="JScript"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{df450e4e-e4da-45d3-a02c-cf9fcffb29f5}">Triggering Record of claim information in 2000B loop</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">var myRS = ec_VariableHelper.GetRecordSet(&quot;Claim_Info_input2_2000C&quot;);
myRS.last();
var recordProcessed = false;
do {
var RS = myRS.getRow();
if (RS &gt; 0 &amp;&amp; !recordProcessed) {
var Fields = myRS.getFields();
// Check the country code field (assuming it's in Fields[1])
if (Fields[1] === &quot;&quot;) {
Fields[1] = &quot;US&quot;; // Set default value if no country code exists
}
// Only proceed if there are valid fields
var validFieldsExist = false;
for (var i = 0; i &lt; 11; i++) {
if (Fields[i] !== &quot;&quot; &amp;&amp; Fields[i] !== null &amp;&amp; typeof Fields[i] !== &quot;undefined&quot;) {
validFieldsExist = true;
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(i, Fields[i]);
}
}
// Send results only if valid fields were processed
if (validFieldsExist) {
ec_ResultHelper.Send();
recordProcessed = true; // Mark as processed
}
}
} while (myRS.previous());</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="10863" FP="_AP" N="a"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="10864" FP="A" P="0" N="value1"/><CP ID="10852" FP="X" P="0" N="CLM11.04"/><CP ID="10853" FP="X" P="1" N="CLM11.05"/><CP ID="10854" FP="X" P="2" N="DTP03"/><CP ID="10855" FP="X" P="3" N="DTP03(1)"/><CP ID="10856" FP="X" P="4" N="DT01(Disability Dates)"/><CP ID="10857" FP="X" P="5" N="DT03(Disability Dates)"/><CP ID="10858" FP="X" P="6" N="DTP03(2)"/><CP ID="10859" FP="X" P="7" N="DTP03(3)"/><CP ID="10860" FP="X" P="8" N="PWK01( Claim Supplemental Information)"/><CP ID="10861" FP="X" P="9" N="PWK02"/><CP ID="10862" FP="X" P="10" N="PWK06"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="1377" N="Convert Date/Time-memberCurrentConditionDate" T="ConvertDateTime"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{df450e4e-e4da-45d3-a02c-cf9fcffb29f5}">Map in the format YYYY-MM-DD</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="in_format">CCYYMMDD</P><P N="in_format_spec">1</P><P N="out_format">yyyy-MM-dd</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="10868" FP="A" N="v"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="10867" FP="X" N="DTP03"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="1378" N="Convert Date/Time-startDate" T="ConvertDateTime"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{df450e4e-e4da-45d3-a02c-cf9fcffb29f5}">Map in the format YYYY-MM-DD</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="in_format">CCYYMMDD</P><P N="in_format_spec">1</P><P N="out_format">yyyy-MM-dd</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="10870" FP="A" N="v"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="10869" FP="X" N="DTP03"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="1381" N="Convert Date/Time- Admission" T="ConvertDateTime"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{df450e4e-e4da-45d3-a02c-cf9fcffb29f5}">Map in the format YYYY-MM-DD
</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="in_format">CCYYMMDD</P><P N="in_format_spec">1</P><P N="out_format">yyyy-MM-dd</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="10878" FP="A" N="v"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="10877" FP="X" N="DTP03"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="1382" N="Convert Date/Time- Discharge" T="ConvertDateTime"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{df450e4e-e4da-45d3-a02c-cf9fcffb29f5}">Map in the format YYYY-MM-DD
</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="in_format">CCYYMMDD</P><P N="in_format_spec">1</P><P N="out_format">yyyy-MM-dd</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="10880" FP="A" N="v"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="10879" FP="X" N="DTP03"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="1385" N="Coversional Copy-transmissionType" T="ConversionalCopy"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{df450e4e-e4da-45d3-a02c-cf9fcffb29f5}">Map as, If &quot;AA&quot; Map &quot;Available on Request at Provider Site&quot;

</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="in">,AA,BM,EL,EM,FT,FX</P><P N="out">,Available On Request at Provider Site,By Mail,Electronically Only,E-Mail,File Transfer,By Fax</P><P N="comment">,,,,,,</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="10886" FP="A" N="v"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="10885" FP="X" N="r"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="1387" N="JavaScript-ClaimInfo_Input3" T="JScript"><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">// Retrieving the record set or creating the recordset
myRS1 = ec_VariableHelper.GetRecordSet(&quot;Claim_Info_input3_2000C&quot;);
// Creating an empty array and Getting the value by index and assigning it to the array.

for(i=0;i&lt;11;i++)
{
resArr1[i] = ec_DataHelper.GetValueByIndex(i);
}
//Updating the newly inserted row with the values from the array

myRS1.updateRow(resArr1);
ec_VariableHelper.SetRecordSet(&quot;Claim_Info_input3_2000C&quot;, myRS1, true);

ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0,&quot;Claim_Info_input5_2000C&quot;);</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="11011" FP="A" P="0" N="value1"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="11012" FP="A" P="1" N="value2"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="11013" FP="A" P="2" N="value3"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="11014" FP="A" P="3" N="value4"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="11015" FP="A" P="4" N="value5"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="11016" FP="A" P="5" N="value6"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="11017" FP="A" P="6" N="value7"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="11018" FP="A" P="7" N="value8"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="11019" FP="A" P="8" N="value9"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="11020" FP="A" P="9" N="value10"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="11021" FP="A" P="10" N="value11"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="11022" FP="A" P="11" N="value12"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="11010" FP="X" P="0" N="result1"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="1401" N="JavaScript-Trigger-Claim_Info_Output5" T="JScript"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{df450e4e-e4da-45d3-a02c-cf9fcffb29f5}">Triggering Record of claim information in 2000B loop</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">// Retrieving the record set or creating the recordset
myRS = ec_VariableHelper.GetRecordSet(&quot;Claim_Info_input5_2000C&quot;);
Fields = myRS.getFields();
for(var i = 0; i &lt; 12; i++)
{
if(Fields[i] != &quot;&quot;)
{
var DiagnosisCode = Fields[i];
if(DiagnosisCode.length &gt; 3)
{
// Insert a dot (.) character after the third character of the DiagnosisCode
var char = &quot;.&quot;;
var OrgDiagnosisCode = DiagnosisCode.substring(0,3) + char + DiagnosisCode.substring(3,DiagnosisCode.length);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(i,OrgDiagnosisCode);//Report the result for the modified DiagnosisCode at index i
}
else
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(i,DiagnosisCode);
}
}
}
</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="11049" FP="_AP" N="a"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="11050" FP="A" P="0" N="value1"/><CP ID="11037" FP="X" P="0" N="HI01.02"/><CP ID="11038" FP="X" P="1" N="HI02.02"/><CP ID="11039" FP="X" P="2" N="HI03.02"/><CP ID="11040" FP="X" P="3" N="HI04.02"/><CP ID="11041" FP="X" P="4" N="HI05.02"/><CP ID="11042" FP="X" P="5" N="HI06.02"/><CP ID="11043" FP="X" P="6" N="HI07.02"/><CP ID="11044" FP="X" P="7" N="HI08.02"/><CP ID="11045" FP="X" P="8" N="HI09.02"/><CP ID="11046" FP="X" P="9" N="HI10.02"/><CP ID="11047" FP="X" P="10" N="HI11.02"/><CP ID="11048" FP="X" P="11" N="HI12.02"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="1406" N="JavaScript-Pay-To-Address 2010AB--2000B" T="JScript"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{df450e4e-e4da-45d3-a02c-cf9fcffb29f5}">Mapping done for Pay-To-Address </P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">// Retrieving variables
var N301 = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;Address_2010AB_2000B&quot;).trim();
var N401 = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;N401_CityName_2010AB_2000B&quot;);
var N402 = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;N402_StateCode_2010AB_2000B&quot;);
var N403 = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;N403_PostalCode_2010AB_2000B&quot;);
var N404 = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;N404_CountryCode_2010AB_2000B&quot;);
// Checking if variables are not empty
if(N301 != &quot;&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0,N301);
}
if(N401 != &quot;&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(1,N401);
}
if(N402 != &quot;&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(2,N402);
}
if(N403 != &quot;&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(3,N403);
}
if(N404 != &quot;&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(4,N404);
}
</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="11119" FP="_AP" N="a"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="11117" FP="A" P="0" N="value1"/><CP ID="11118" FP="X" P="0" N="N301"/><CP ID="11120" FP="X" P="1" N="N401"/><CP ID="11121" FP="X" P="2" N="N402"/><CP ID="11122" FP="X" P="3" N="N403"/><CP ID="11123" FP="X" P="4" N="N404"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="1408" T="JScript"><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">var Add1 = ec_DataHelper.GetValueByIndex(0);
var Add2 = ec_DataHelper.GetValueByIndex(1);
// Checking if both Add1 and Add2 variables are not empty
if(Add1 != &quot;&quot; &amp;&amp; Add2 != &quot;&quot;)
{
// Concatenating Add1 and Add2 with a comma
var Add = Add1 + &quot;,&quot; + Add2 ;
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0,Add);
}
// Checking if Add1 is empty and Add2 is not empty
if(Add1 == &quot;&quot; &amp;&amp; Add2 != &quot;&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0,Add2);
}
// Checking if Add1 is not empty and Add2 is empty
if(Add1 != &quot;&quot; &amp;&amp; Add2 == &quot;&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0,Add1);
}
</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="11131" FP="_AP" N="a"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="11128" FP="A" P="0" N="value1" DirectValue="{39}"/><CP ID="11130" FP="A" P="1" N="value2" DirectValue="{40}"/><CP ID="11129" FP="X" P="0" N="result1"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="1409" N="JavaScript-2000B-PAT Information" T="JScript"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{df450e4e-e4da-45d3-a02c-cf9fcffb29f5}">Nullcheck using javascrpit done for PAT </P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">// Retrieving variables
var PAT06 = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;PAT06_2000B_DOD&quot;);
var PAT08 = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;PAT08_2000B_Wt&quot;);
var PAT09 = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;PAT09_2000B_PRGT&quot;);
var SBR02 = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;SBR02_RelationshipCode_2000B&quot;);
// Checking if variable are not empty
if(PAT06 != &quot;&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0,PAT06);
}
if(PAT08 != &quot;&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(1,PAT08);
}
if(PAT09 != &quot;&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(2,PAT09);
}
if(SBR02 != &quot;&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(3,SBR02);
}
</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="11134" FP="_AP" N="a"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="11132" FP="A" P="0" N="value1"/><CP ID="11133" FP="X" P="0" N="PAT06"/><CP ID="11136" FP="X" P="1" N="PAT08"/><CP ID="11137" FP="X" P="2" N="PAT09"/><CP ID="11194" FP="X" P="3" N="SBR02"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="1414" N="JavaScript-2010CA-MemberInformation-2000C" T="JScript"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{df450e4e-e4da-45d3-a02c-cf9fcffb29f5}">Mapping membeInformation for Patientclaim from 2010CA loop</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">//Retrieving the values from variables
var MemberFullName;
var NM103 = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;NM103_2010CA_NameLast&quot;).trim();
var NM104 = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;NM104_2010CA_NameFirst&quot;).trim();
var NM105 = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;NM105_2010CA_MiddleName&quot;).trim();
var NM107 = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;NM107_2010CA_NameSuffix&quot;).trim();
var N301 = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;N301_2010CA_StreetAddress&quot;).trim();
var N401 = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;N401_2010CA_CityName&quot;).trim();
var N402 = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;N402_2010CA_StateCode&quot;).trim();
var N403 = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;N403_2010CA_PostalCode&quot;).trim();
var N404 = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;N404_2010CA_CountryCode&quot;).trim();
var DMG03 = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;DMG03_2010CA_GenderCode&quot;).trim();
var DMG02 = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;DMG02_2010CA_DOB&quot;).trim();
var PER04 = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;PER04_2010CA_CommNum&quot;).trim();
var PER06 = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;PER06_2010CA_CommNum&quot;).trim();
// Concatenate the name components to form the member's full name
// if (NM104) {
// MemberFullName = NM104;
// }
// if (NM105) {
// if (MemberFullName) {
// MemberFullName += &quot;,&quot; + NM105;
// } else {
// MemberFullName = NM105;
// }
// }
// if (NM103) {
// if (MemberFullName) {
// MemberFullName += &quot;,&quot; + NM103;
// } else {
// MemberFullName = NM103;
// }
// }
// if (NM107) {
// if (MemberFullName) {
// MemberFullName += &quot;,&quot; + NM107;
// } else {
// MemberFullName = NM107;
// }
// }
MemberFullName =NM103+&quot;,&quot;+NM105+&quot;,&quot;+NM104+&quot;,&quot;+NM107;
//Trim and report the result
if(MemberFullName!= &quot;&quot;)
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0,MemberFullName.trim());
// Check if  variables are not empty and report its value at indexes
if(NM103 != &quot;&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(1,NM103)
}
if(NM104 != &quot;&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(2,NM104)
}
if(NM105 != &quot;&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(3,NM105)
}
if(NM107 != &quot;&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(4,NM107)
}
if(N301 != &quot;&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(5,N301)
}
if(N401 != &quot;&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(6,N401)
}
if(N402 != &quot;&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(7,N402)
}
if(N403 != &quot;&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(8,N403)
}
if(N404 != &quot;&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(9,N404)
}
else if(N404 == &quot;&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(9,&quot;US&quot;);
}
if(DMG03 != &quot;&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(10,DMG03)
}
if(DMG02 != &quot;&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(11,DMG02)
}
if(PER04 != &quot;&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(12,PER04)
}
if(PER06 != &quot;&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(13,PER06)
}
</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="11149" FP="_AP" N="a"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="11147" FP="A" P="0" N="value1"/><CP ID="11148" FP="X" P="0" N="MemberFullName"/><CP ID="11150" FP="X" P="1" N="NM103"/><CP ID="11151" FP="X" P="2" N="NM104"/><CP ID="11152" FP="X" P="3" N="NM105"/><CP ID="11153" FP="X" P="4" N="NM107"/><CP ID="11154" FP="X" P="5" N="N301"/><CP ID="11155" FP="X" P="6" N="N401"/><CP ID="11156" FP="X" P="7" N="N402"/><CP ID="11157" FP="X" P="8" N="N403"/><CP ID="11158" FP="X" P="9" N="N404"/><CP ID="11159" FP="X" P="10" N="DMG03"/><CP ID="11160" FP="X" P="11" N="DMG02"/><CP ID="11161" FP="X" P="12" N="PER04"/><CP ID="11162" FP="X" P="13" N="PER06"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="1416" T="ConversionalCopy"><Ps C="S"><P N="in">,M,F,U</P><P N="out">,Male,Female,Unknown</P><P N="comment">,,,</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="11166" FP="A" N="v"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="11165" FP="X" N="DMG03"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="1427" N="JavaScript-2000B-PAT Information" T="JScript"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{df450e4e-e4da-45d3-a02c-cf9fcffb29f5}">Nullcheck using javascrpit done for PAT </P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">// Retrieving variables
var PAT06 = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;PAT06_2000B_DOD&quot;);
var PAT08 = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;PAT08_2000B_Wt&quot;);
var PAT09 = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;PAT09_2000B_PRGT&quot;);
var SBR02 = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;SBR02_RelationshipCode_2000B&quot;);
// Checking if variable are not empty
if(PAT06 != &quot;&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0,PAT06);
}
if(PAT08 != &quot;&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(1,PAT08);
}
if(PAT09 != &quot;&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(2,PAT09);
}
if(SBR02 != &quot;&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(3,SBR02);
}
</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="11206" FP="_AP" N="a"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="11207" FP="A" P="0" N="value1"/><CP ID="11202" FP="X" P="0" N="PAT06"/><CP ID="11203" FP="X" P="1" N="PAT08"/><CP ID="11204" FP="X" P="2" N="PAT09"/><CP ID="11205" FP="X" P="3" N="SBR02"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="1428" N="JavaScript-referringPractitionerInformation" T="JScript"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{df450e4e-e4da-45d3-a02c-cf9fcffb29f5}">Mapping referringPractitionerInformation after nullchecking</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">//Retrieving the values from variables
var ReferringPractitionerName = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;ReferringPractitionerName_2310A_2000B&quot;);
var NM103 = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;NM103_2310A_ReferringProvider_2000B&quot;);
var NM104 = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;NM104_NameFirst_2310A_2000B&quot;);
var NM105 = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;NM105_NameMiddle_2310A_2000B&quot;);
var NM107 = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;NM107_NameSuffix_2310A_2000B&quot;);
var NM109 = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;NM109_IdentificationCode_2310A_2000B&quot;);
var REF01 = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;REF01_REFID_2310A_2000B&quot;);
var REF02 = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;REF02_REFID_2310A_2000B&quot;);
var referralNum =ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;ReferralNumber_2000B&quot;);
//Check if  variables are not empty and report its value at indexes
if(ReferringPractitionerName != &quot;&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0,ReferringPractitionerName.trim())
}
if(NM103 != &quot;&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(1,NM103.trim())
}
if(NM104 != &quot;&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(2,NM104.trim())
}
if(NM105 != &quot;&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(3,NM105.trim())
}
if(NM107 != &quot;&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(4,NM107.trim())
}
if(NM109 != &quot;&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(5,NM109.trim())
}
if(REF01 != &quot;&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(6,REF01.trim())
}
if(REF02 != &quot;&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(7,REF02.trim())
}
if(referralNum !=&quot;&quot; &amp;&amp; ReferringPractitionerName != &quot;&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(8,referralNum.trim())
}
</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="11210" FP="_AP" N="a"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="11208" FP="A" P="0" N="value1"/><CP ID="11209" FP="X" P="0" N="NM103+04"/><CP ID="11211" FP="X" P="1" N="NM103"/><CP ID="11212" FP="X" P="2" N="NM104"/><CP ID="11213" FP="X" P="3" N="NM105"/><CP ID="11214" FP="X" P="4" N="NM107"/><CP ID="11215" FP="X" P="5" N="NM109"/><CP ID="11216" FP="X" P="6" N="REF01"/><CP ID="11217" FP="X" P="7" N="REF02"/><CP ID="12669" FP="X" P="8" N="2300_REF02(referralNumb)"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="1431" N="JavaScript-TriggerRecordsets-2010AA" T="JScript"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{df450e4e-e4da-45d3-a02c-cf9fcffb29f5}">Mapping Done for supplier Information only  by triggering the Record sets Using Javascript .
</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">//Obtain record sets
myRS1 = ec_VariableHelper.GetRecordSet(&quot;BillingProvider_2000A&quot;);
myRS2 = ec_VariableHelper.GetRecordSet(&quot;Rendering_Prov_2310B_2000C&quot;);
myRS3 = ec_VariableHelper.GetRecordSet(&quot;Rendering_Prov_2420A_2000C&quot;);
//Retrieve fields from record sets
Fields3 = myRS3.getFields();
Fields2 = myRS2.getFields();
Fields1 = myRS1.getFields();
//Check if Fields1[1] is equal to 1 then report the values
if(Fields1[1]== 1)        //first name
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0,Fields1[3].trim());
ec_ResultHelper.Send();
}
if(Fields1[1]== 1)//middle name
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(1,Fields1[4].trim());
ec_ResultHelper.Send();
}
if(Fields1[1]== 1)//name suffi
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(2,Fields1[5].trim());
ec_ResultHelper.Send();
}
if(Fields1[7] != &quot;&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(3,Fields1[7].trim());
ec_ResultHelper.Send();
}
if (Fields1[8] != &quot;&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(8,Fields1[8].trim());
ec_ResultHelper.Send();
}
if(Fields1[12] == &quot;&quot;) //Country Code
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(4,&quot;US&quot;);
}
else
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(4,Fields1[12].trim());
}
if(Fields1[13] == &quot;EI&quot;)// REF02-TaxIdentification Number
{
var Referenceid = Fields1[14];
var Appendchar= &quot;-&quot;
var pos=2
// Modify the format of reference_id by adding a hyphen
Referenceid = Referenceid.substring(0,pos)+ Appendchar + Referenceid.substring(pos,Referenceid.length);
//Report the modified reference_id as a result
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(5,Referenceid.trim());
ec_ResultHelper.Send();
}
else if(Fields1[13] == &quot;SY&quot;)
{
var Referenceid = Fields1[14];
var Appendchar= &quot;-&quot;
//var pos=2
//Modify the format of reference_id by adding hyphens at specific positions
Referenceid = Referenceid.substring(0,3)+ Appendchar + Referenceid.substring(3,5) + Appendchar + Referenceid.substring(5,Referenceid.length);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(5,Referenceid.trim());
ec_ResultHelper.Send();
}
if(Fields1[13] == &quot;SY&quot;) //otherid
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(6,Fields1[14].trim());
ec_ResultHelper.Send();
}
else if(Fields1[15] == &quot;1G&quot; || Fields1[15] == &quot;0B&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(6,Fields1[16].trim());
ec_ResultHelper.Send();
}
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(7,Fields1[2].trim());//supplierName
</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="11277" FP="_AP" N="a"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="11278" FP="A" P="0" N="value1"/><CP ID="11269" FP="X" P="0" N="NM104"/><CP ID="11270" FP="X" P="1" N="NM105"/><CP ID="11271" FP="X" P="2" N="NM107"/><CP ID="11272" FP="X" P="3" N="N301,N302"/><CP ID="11273" FP="X" P="4" N="N404"/><CP ID="11274" FP="X" P="5" N="REF02-Taxid"/><CP ID="11275" FP="X" P="6" N="REF02"/><CP ID="11276" FP="X" P="7" N="NM103"/><CP ID="12676" FP="X" P="8" N="N302"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="1436" N="JavaScript-Supplierinformation" T="JScript"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{df450e4e-e4da-45d3-a02c-cf9fcffb29f5}">Supplierinformations from record set BillingProvider_2000A are mapped using this java script function
</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">// Retrieving the record set or creating the recordset
myRS1 = ec_VariableHelper.GetRecordSet(&quot;BillingProvider_2000A&quot;);
myRS1.last();
var telephone = &quot;&quot;;
var telephone1 =&quot;&quot;;
var telephone2=&quot;&quot;;
var telephone3=&quot;&quot;;
var telephone4=&quot;&quot;;
var RS = myRS1.getRow();
while(RS&gt;0)
{
Fields1 = myRS1.getFields();
// Reporting communication details if available
if(Fields1[17]!= &quot;&quot; &amp;&amp; Fields1[21]== &quot;TE&quot;)
{
//ec_ResultHelper.println(&quot;teout&quot;+telephone)
if (telephone == &quot;&quot;)
{
telephone = Fields1[17];
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0,telephone);
//ec_ResultHelper.println(&quot;te&quot;+telephone)
ec_ResultHelper.Send();//Communication details
}
}
if(Fields1[18]!= &quot;&quot; &amp;&amp; Fields1[20]== &quot;TE&quot; &amp;&amp; Fields1[21]!= &quot;TE&quot;)
{
if (telephone1 == &quot;&quot; &amp;&amp; telephone == &quot;&quot;)
{
telephone1 = Fields1[18];
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0,telephone1);
ec_ResultHelper.Send();
}
}
if(Fields1[20] == &quot;EX&quot; &amp;&amp; Fields1[18]!= &quot;&quot;)
{
if (telephone2 == &quot;&quot;)
{
telephone2 = Fields1[18];
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(1,telephone2);
ec_ResultHelper.Send();
}
}
if(Fields1[22] == &quot;EX&quot; &amp;&amp; Fields1[23]!= &quot;&quot; &amp;&amp; Fields1[20] != &quot;EX&quot;)
{
if (telephone3 == &quot;&quot;&amp;&amp; telephone2 == &quot;&quot;)
{
telephone3 = Fields1[23];
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(1,telephone3);
ec_ResultHelper.Send();
}
}
myRS1.previous();
RS = myRS1.getRow();
}
// Retrieving the record set or creating the recordset
myRS2 = ec_VariableHelper.GetRecordSet(&quot;BillingProvider_2000A&quot;);
myRS2.last();
Fields2 = myRS2.getFields();
// Reporting Tax Code if available
if(Fields2[13]!= &quot;&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(2,Fields2[13]);//TaxCode
ec_ResultHelper.Send();
}
// Reporting City Name if available
if(Fields2[9]!= &quot;&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(3,Fields2[9].trim());//City Name
ec_ResultHelper.Send();
}
// Reporting State Code if available
if(Fields2[10]!= &quot;&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(4,Fields2[10]);//State Code
ec_ResultHelper.Send();
}
// Reporting Postal Code if available
if(Fields2[11]!= &quot;&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(5,Fields2[11]);//Postal Code
ec_ResultHelper.Send();
}
// Reporting Supplier Billing Name if available
if(Fields2[2]!= &quot;&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(6,Fields2[2].trim());//SupplierBilling Name
ec_ResultHelper.Send();
}
// Reporting NPI if available
if(Fields2[6]!= &quot;&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(7,Fields2[6]);//npi
ec_ResultHelper.Send();
}
// Reporting IdentificationCode if available
if(Fields2[0]!= &quot;&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(8,Fields2[0]);//code
ec_ResultHelper.Send();
}
// Reporting Qualifier if available
if(Fields2[19]!= &quot;&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(9,Fields2[19]);//Qualifier
ec_ResultHelper.Send();
}
// Reporting Supplier PIN Number if IG
if(Fields2[15] == &quot;1G&quot;) //Supllier PIN Number
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(10,Fields2[16]);
ec_ResultHelper.Send();
}
</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="11309" FP="_AP" N="a"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="11310" FP="A" P="0" N="value1"/><CP ID="11298" FP="X" P="0" N="PER03"/><CP ID="11299" FP="X" P="1" N="PER06"/><CP ID="11300" FP="X" P="2" N="REF01"/><CP ID="11301" FP="X" P="3" N="N401"/><CP ID="11302" FP="X" P="4" N="N402"/><CP ID="11303" FP="X" P="5" N="N403"/><CP ID="11304" FP="X" P="6" N="NM103"/><CP ID="11305" FP="X" P="7" N="NM109"/><CP ID="11306" FP="X" P="8" N="PRV03"/><CP ID="11307" FP="X" P="9" N="PRV02"/><CP ID="11308" FP="X" P="10" N="REF02-PIN"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="1441" N="JavaScript-Pay-To-Address 2010AB-2000C" T="JScript"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{df450e4e-e4da-45d3-a02c-cf9fcffb29f5}">Mapping done for Pay-To-Address
</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">// Retrieving variables
var N301 = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;Address_2010AB_2000B&quot;).trim();
var N401 = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;N401_CityName_2010AB_2000B&quot;);
var N402 = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;N402_StateCode_2010AB_2000B&quot;);
var N403 = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;N403_PostalCode_2010AB_2000B&quot;);
var N404 = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;N404_CountryCode_2010AB_2000B&quot;);
// Checking if variables are not empty
if(N301 != &quot;&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0,N301);
}
if(N401 != &quot;&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(1,N401);
}
if(N402 != &quot;&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(2,N402);
}
if(N403 != &quot;&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(3,N403);
}
if(N404 != &quot;&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(4,N404);
}
</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="11329" FP="_AP" N="a"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="11330" FP="A" P="0" N="value1"/><CP ID="11324" FP="X" P="0" N="N301"/><CP ID="11325" FP="X" P="1" N="N401"/><CP ID="11326" FP="X" P="2" N="N402"/><CP ID="11327" FP="X" P="3" N="N403"/><CP ID="11328" FP="X" P="4" N="N404"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="1444" N="JavaScript-referringPractitionerInformation" T="JScript"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{df450e4e-e4da-45d3-a02c-cf9fcffb29f5}">Mapping referringPractitionerInformation after nullchecking</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">//Retrieving the values from variables
var ReferringPractitionerName = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;ReferringPractitionerName_2310A_2000C&quot;).trim();
var NM103 = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;NM103_2310A_ReferringProvider_2000C&quot;).trim();
var NM104 = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;NM104_NameFirst_2310A_2000C&quot;).trim();
var NM105 = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;NM105_NameMiddle_2310A_2000C&quot;).trim();
var NM107 = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;NM107_NameSuffix_2310A_2000C&quot;).trim();
var NM109 = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;NM109_IdentificationCode_2310A_2000C&quot;).trim();
var REF01 = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;REF01_REFID_2310A_2000C&quot;).trim();
var REF02 = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;REF02_REFID_2310A_2000C&quot;).trim();
var referralNum = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;ReferralNumber_2000C&quot;).trim();
// Check if  variables are not empty and report its value at indexes
if(ReferringPractitionerName != &quot;&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0,ReferringPractitionerName)
}
if(NM103 != &quot;&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(1,NM103)
}
if(NM104 != &quot;&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(2,NM104)
}
if(NM105 != &quot;&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(3,NM105)
}
if(NM107 != &quot;&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(4,NM107)
}
if(NM109 != &quot;&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(5,NM109)
}
if(REF01 != &quot;&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(6,REF01)
}
if(REF02 != &quot;&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(7,REF02)
}
if(referralNum !=&quot;&quot; &amp;&amp; ReferringPractitionerName != &quot;&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(8,referralNum)
}
</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="11356" FP="_AP" N="a"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="11357" FP="A" P="0" N="value1"/><CP ID="11348" FP="X" P="0" N="NM103+04"/><CP ID="11349" FP="X" P="1" N="NM103"/><CP ID="11350" FP="X" P="2" N="NM104"/><CP ID="11351" FP="X" P="3" N="NM105"/><CP ID="11352" FP="X" P="4" N="NM107"/><CP ID="11353" FP="X" P="5" N="NM109"/><CP ID="11354" FP="X" P="6" N="REF01"/><CP ID="11355" FP="X" P="7" N="REF02"/><CP ID="12673" FP="X" P="8" N="2300_REF02(referralNumb)"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="1450" T="ChangeVariable"><Ps C="S"><P N="variableID">150</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="11369" FP="A" N="v"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="1451" T="SetValue"><CPs><CP ID="11371" FP="_AP" N="a"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="11372" FP="A" N="v" DirectValue="{150}"/><CP ID="11370" FP="X" N="r"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="1452" T="ConditionalCopy"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{df450e4e-e4da-45d3-a02c-cf9fcffb29f5}">Mapping AMT02 value as memresp amt to based on the activation of eobinformation tag </P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="if_1/conditions/expression_1/arg1">11374</P><P N="if_1/conditions/expression_1/arg1/type">2</P><P N="if_1/conditions/expression_1/operation">1</P><P N="if_1/conditions/expression_1/operation/type">0</P><P N="if_1/conditions/expression_1/arg2">0</P><P N="if_1/actions/assignment_1/lvalue">11373</P><P N="if_1/actions/assignment_1/lvalue/type">2</P><P N="if_1/actions/assignment_1/rvalue">11374</P><P N="if_1/actions/assignment_1/rvalue/type">2</P><P N="else/actions/assignment_1/lvalue">11373</P><P N="else/actions/assignment_1/lvalue/type">2</P><P N="else/actions/assignment_1/rvalue">0</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="11374" FP="A" P="0" N="value1"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="11373" FP="X" P="0" N="2430-AMT02"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="1453" N="JavaScript-ServiceLineLoop_Input1" T="JScript"><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">// Retrieving the record set or creating the recordset
myRS = ec_VariableHelper.GetRecordSet(&quot;ServiceLineLoop_Input1_2000B&quot;);
var resArr = new Array();
for (var i = 0; i &lt;12 ; i++)
{
resArr [i] = ec_DataHelper.GetValueByIndex(i);
}

var length = Per04.length;
if(length &gt;10)
{
var PhoneAreaCode = Per04.substring(0, 3);
var Countrycode = Per04.substring(0, 1);
var phnnum = Per04.substr(-7);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0,Countrycode);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(1,PhoneAreaCode);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(2,phnnum);
}
else if(length = 10)
{
var PhoneAreaCode = Per04.substring(0, 3);
var phnnum = Per04.substr(-7);
//ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0,Countrycode);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(1,PhoneAreaCode);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(2,phnnum);
}</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="12125" FP="A" P="0" N="value1"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="12126" FP="X" P="0" N="result1"/><CP ID="12127" FP="X" P="1" N="result2"/><CP ID="12128" FP="X" P="2" N="result3"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="1617" N="JavaScript-PhoneDetails" T="JScript"><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">var Per04= ec_DataHelper.GetValueByIndex(0);

N="out_format">yyyy-MM-dd</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="12300" FP="A" N="v"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="12299" FP="X" N="r"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="1671" T="ChangeVariable"><Ps C="S"><P N="variableID">114</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="12306" FP="_AP" N="a"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="12305" FP="A" N="v"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="1674" T="ChangeVariable"><Ps C="S"><P N="variableID">46</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="12312" FP="_AP" N="a"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="12311" FP="A" N="v"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="1676" N="ServiceAdjustmentInputAll for SeviceLine" T="JScript"><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">var Line_PayerCheck = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;Line_PayerCheck_2000B&quot;);
var resArr = new Array();
var lineNum = ec_DataHelper.GetValueByIndex(19);
var payerId = ec_DataHelper.GetValueByIndex(20);
var myRSLine_Payer = lineNum + &quot;-&quot; + payerId;
myRS = ec_VariableHelper.GetRecordSet(&quot;ServiceAdjustment_2000B&quot;);
myRS.first();
var arrayLinePayer = &quot;&quot;;
var found_payer = 0;
if(Line_PayerCheck.length &gt; 0)
{
var splitRes = Line_PayerCheck.split(&quot;|&quot;);
for(var j=0;j&lt;splitRes.length;j++)
{
if (splitRes[j] == myRSLine_Payer)
{
found_payer = 1;
}
}
}
if (found_payer == 0)
{
for (var i = 0; i &lt; 21; i++) resArr [i] = ec_DataHelper.GetValueByIndex(i);
myRS.insertRow();
myRS.updateRow(resArr);
ec_VariableHelper.SetRecordSet(&quot;ServiceAdjustment_2000B&quot;, myRS, true);
}
else
{
//Update/Add to existing row:
var casArray_Temp = new Array();//create new array
for (var i = 0; i &lt; 21; i++) casArray_Temp [i] = ec_DataHelper.GetValueByIndex(i); //casArray_Temp[19]-linenum,casArray_Temp[20]-svd01
var counter = 0;
var newCASArray = new Array(21); //creating array with length 21
for(var j=1; j&lt;casArray_Temp.length-2; j=j+3)
{
var found_CAS = 0;
myRS = ec_VariableHelper.GetRecordSet(&quot;ServiceAdjustment_2000B&quot;);
myRS.first();
var RS1 = myRS.getRow();
while(RS1&gt;0)
{
Fields = myRS.getFields();
arrayLinePayer = Fields[19] + &quot;-&quot; + Fields[20];
if(myRSLine_Payer == arrayLinePayer)
{
if(casArray_Temp[0] == Fields[0])
{
switch (casArray_Temp[j])
{
case Fields[1]:
Fields[2] = +Fields[2] + +casArray_Temp[j+1];
if(casArray_Temp[j+2] != &quot;&quot;)
{
Fields[3] = +Fields[3] + +casArray_Temp[j+2];
}
found_CAS = 1;
break;
case Fields[4]:
Fields[5] = +Fields[5] + +casArray_Temp[j+1];
if(casArray_Temp[j+2] != &quot;&quot;)
{
Fields[6] = +Fields[6] + +casArray_Temp[j+2];
}
found_CAS = 1;
break;
case Fields[7]:
Fields[8] = +Fields[8] + +casArray_Temp[j+1];
if(casArray_Temp[j+2] != &quot;&quot;)
{
Fields[9] = +Fields[9] + +casArray_Temp[j+2];
}
found_CAS = 1;
break;
case Fields[10]:
Fields[11] = +Fields[11] + +casArray_Temp[j+1];
if(casArray_Temp[j+2] != &quot;&quot;)
{
Fields[12] = +Fields[12] + +casArray_Temp[j+2];
}
found_CAS = 1;
break;
case Fields[13]:
Fields[14] = +Fields[14] + +casArray_Temp[j+1];
if(casArray_Temp[j+2] != &quot;&quot;)
{
Fields[15] = +Fields[15] + +casArray_Temp[j+2];
}
found_CAS = 1;
break;
case Fields[16]:
Fields[17] = +Fields[17] + +casArray_Temp[j+1];
if(casArray_Temp[j+2] != &quot;&quot;)
{
Fields[18] = +Fields[18] + +casArray_Temp[j+2];
}
found_CAS = 1;
break;
}
myRS.updateRow(Fields);
ec_VariableHelper.SetRecordSet(&quot;ServiceAdjustment_2000B&quot;, myRS, true);
}
}
myRS.next();
RS1 = myRS.getRow();
}
if ((found_CAS == 0) &amp;&amp; (casArray_Temp[j]!=&quot;undefined&quot;) &amp;&amp; (casArray_Temp[j]!=&quot;&quot;))
{
if (counter == 0)
{
newCASArray[19] = casArray_Temp[19];
newCASArray[20] = casArray_Temp[20];
newCASArray[0] = casArray_Temp[0];
}
counter = counter + 1;
newCASArray[counter] = casArray_Temp[j];
newCASArray[counter+1] = casArray_Temp[j+1];
newCASArray[counter+2] = casArray_Temp[j+2];
}
}
if (newCASArray.length &gt; 0)
{
myRS.insertRow();
myRS.updateRow(newCASArray);
ec_VariableHelper.SetRecordSet(&quot;ServiceAdjustment_2000B&quot;, myRS, true);
//ec_ResultHelper.println(&quot;Else part 2000C RS&quot; + myRS)
}
}

myRS.clear();</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="12368" FP="_AP" N="a"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="12369" FP="A" P="0" N="value1"/><CP ID="12367" FP="X" P="0" N="result1"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="1680" N="ServiceAdjustmentInputAll for SeviceLine" T="JScript"><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">//ec_ResultHelper.println(&quot;entering 2000c loop for fetching values&quot;)

myRS.first();
var resArr = new Array();
for (var i = 0; i &lt; 19; i++) resArr [i] = ec_DataHelper.GetValueByIndex(i);
myRS.insertRow();
myRS.updateRow(resArr);
ec_VariableHelper.SetRecordSet(&quot;ServiceAdjustment_2000C&quot;, myRS, true);
</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="12391" FP="A" P="0" N="value1"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="12392" FP="A" P="1" N="value2"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="12393" FP="A" P="2" N="value3"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="12394" FP="A" P="3" N="value4"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="12395" FP="A" P="4" N="value5"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="12396" FP="A" P="5" N="value6"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="12397" FP="A" P="6" N="value7"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="12398" FP="A" P="7" N="value8"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="12399" FP="A" P="8" N="value9"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="12400" FP="A" P="9" N="value10"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="12401" FP="A" P="10" N="value11"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="12402" FP="A" P="11" N="value12"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="12403" FP="A" P="12" N="value13"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="12404" FP="A" P="13" N="value14"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="12405" FP="A" P="14" N="value15"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="12406" FP="A" P="15" N="value16"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="12407" FP="A" P="16" N="value17"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="12408" FP="A" P="17" N="value18"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="12409" FP="A" P="18" N="value19"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="12390" FP="X" P="0" N="result1"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="1684" N="JavaScript_RecordSet" T="JScript"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{df450e4e-e4da-45d3-a02c-cf9fcffb29f5}">//Reseting the recorset ie,removing junk values</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">//Reseting the recorset ie,removing junk values

date = ec_DataHelper.GetValueByIndex(1);
var dateQualifer = ec_DataHelper.GetValueByIndex(0);
if(date.includes(&quot;-&quot;))
{
var split = date.split('-');
var startDate = split[0];
var endDate = split[1];
}
else{
var startDate = date;
var endDate = startDate;
}
if(dateQualifer == 314 || dateQualifer == 360)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0,startDate);
}
if(dateQualifer == 314 || dateQualifer == 361)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(1,endDate);
}</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="12493" FP="A" P="0" N="value1"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="12496" FP="A" P="1" N="value2"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="12494" FP="X" P="0" N="result1"/><CP ID="12495" FP="X" P="1" N="result2"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="1709" N="JavaScript-Disability Dates" T="JScript"><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">var date = ec_DataHelper.GetValueByIndex(1);

{

var startDate = split[0];
var endDate = split[1];
}
else{
var startDate = date;
var endDate = startDate;
}
if(dateQualifer == 314 || dateQualifer == 360)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0,startDate);
}
if(dateQualifer == 314 || dateQualifer == 361)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(1,endDate);
}</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="12503" FP="A" P="0" N="value1"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="12504" FP="A" P="1" N="value2"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="12501" FP="X"
