if(pwk06new == &quot;&quot;)
{

}</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="12607" FP="A" P="0" N="value1"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="12606" FP="X" P="0" N="PWK06"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="1752" N="JavaScript-ServiceDate" T="JScript"><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">var qualifier = ec_DataHelper.GetValueByIndex(0);
var date  = ec_DataHelper.GetValueByIndex(1);
if(qualifier == &quot;RD8&quot;)
{
var firstDateString = date.substring(0, 8);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0,firstDateString);
var secondDateString = date.substring(9);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(1,secondDateString);
}
else if(qualifier == &quot;D8&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0,date);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(1,date);
}
</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="12647" FP="A" P="0" N="value1"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="12649" FP="A" P="1" N="value2"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="12648" FP="X" P="0" N="result1"/><CP ID="12650" FP="X" P="1" N="result2"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="1754" N="JavaScript-ServiceDate" T="JScript"><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">var qualifier = ec_DataHelper.GetValueByIndex(0);
var date  = ec_DataHelper.GetValueByIndex(1);
if(qualifier == &quot;RD8&quot;)
{
var firstDateString = date.substring(0, 8);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0,firstDateString);
var secondDateString = date.substring(9);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(1,secondDateString);
}
else if(qualifier == &quot;D8&quot;)
{
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0,date);
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(1,date);
}
</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="12658" FP="A" P="0" N="value1"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="12659" FP="A" P="1" N="value2"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="12656" FP="X" P="0" N="result1"/><CP ID="12657" FP="X" P="1" N="result2"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="1755" T="ChangeVariable"><Ps C="S"><P N="variableID">167</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="12668" FP="A" N="v"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="1756" T="ChangeVariable"><Ps C="S"><P N="variableID">168</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="12672" FP="A" N="v"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="1758" N="JavaScript_RecordSet-1" T="JScript"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{df450e4e-e4da-45d3-a02c-cf9fcffb29f5}">//Reseting the recorset ie,removing junk values</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">//Reseting the recorset ie,removing junk values
myRS = ec_VariableHelper.GetRecordSet(&quot;Subscriber_Info&quot;);
myRS.clear();
myRS.insertRow();
ec_VariableHelper.SetRecordSet(&quot;Subscriber_Info&quot;, myRS, true);
</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="12704" FP="_AP" N="a"/><CP ID="12705" FP="A" P="0" N="value1"/><CP ID="12703" FP="X" P="0" N="result1"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="1760" N="JavaScript-Record Set-Subscriber Information_2000B for patient" T="JScript"><Ps C="GlobalUserNotes"><P N="{df450e4e-e4da-45d3-a02c-cf9fcffb29f5}">Record set for subscriber info
</P></Ps><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">// Retrieving the record set or creating the recordset
myRS = ec_VariableHelper.GetRecordSet(&quot;Subscriber_InfoforPAT&quot;);
// Creating an empty array and Getting the value by index and assigning it to the array.Updating the newly inserted row with the values from the array
var resArr = new Array();
for (var i = 0; i &lt; 5; i++)
{
resArr [i] = ec_DataHelper.GetValueByIndex(i);
}
myRS.insertRow();
myRS.updateRow(resArr);
ec_VariableHelper.SetRecordSet(&quot;Subscriber_InfoforPAT&quot;, myRS, true);</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="12716" FP="A" P="0" N="value1"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="12717" FP="A" P="1" N="value2"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="12718" FP="A" P="2" N="value3"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="12719" FP="A" P="3" N="value4"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="12720" FP="A" P="4" N="value5"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="12715" FP="X" P="0" N="result1"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="1761" T="SetValue"><CPs><CP ID="12733" FP="A" N="v" DirectValue="1"/><CP ID="12732" FP="X" N="r"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="1762" T="ChangeVariable"><Ps C="S"><P N="variableID">169</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="12737" FP="A" N="v"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="1765" N="Set Value-2000B" T="SetValue"><CPs><CP ID="12743" FP="_AP" N="a"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="12744" FP="A" N="v" DirectValue="{169}"/><CP ID="12742" FP="X" N="r"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="1766" N="Set Value-2000C" T="SetValue"><CPs><CP ID="12747" FP="_AP" N="a"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="12748" FP="A" N="v" DirectValue="{169}"/><CP ID="12746" FP="X" N="r"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="1767" T="JScript"><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">var lastname = ec_DataHelper.GetValueByIndex(0);

N="r"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="1782" T="JScript"><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">//Fetch the record set named &quot;Service_2320Details&quot;
myRS = ec_VariableHelper.GetRecordSet(&quot;Service_2320Details&quot;);
// selecting the last record in the record set
myRS.last();
// Get the current row number
var RS1 = myRS.getRow();
// Start a loop that iterates while RS1 (current row) is greater than 0
var amt_2430 = 0;
while (RS1&gt;0)
{
Fields = myRS.getFields();
myRS2 = ec_VariableHelper.GetRecordSet(&quot;Service_2430Details&quot;);
myRS2.last();
var RS2 = myRS2.getRow();
while (RS2&gt;0)
{
Fields2 = myRS2.getFields();
if(Fields2[3] != &quot;&quot; &amp;&amp; Fields2[3] != undefined)
{
amt_2430 = parseFloat(amt_2430)+parseFloat(Fields2[3]);
//ec_ResultHelper.println(&quot;x=&quot; +Fields2[3]);
//ec_ResultHelper.println(&quot;amt=&quot; + amt_2430);
//ec_ResultHelper.println(&quot;Hi&quot;);
}
//Fields2[3]=amt_2430;
//ec_ResultHelper.Send();
myRS2.previous();
RS2 = myRS2.getRow();
}
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0,Fields2[3]); //MEMresponsibility amt
amt_2430=0;
myRS.previous();
RS1 = myRS.getRow();
}

DirectValue="1"/><CP ID="12901" FP="X" N="r"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="1805" T="JScript"><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">// Get the value at index 0
var countrycode = ec_DataHelper.GetValueByIndex(0);
// Check if countrycode is an empty string
if(countrycode ==&quot;&quot;)
{
// Report &quot;US&quot; as the country code at index 0
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0,&quot;US&quot;);//CountryCode
ec_ResultHelper.Send(); // Send the result
}
else
{
// Report the retrieved country code at index 0
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0,countrycode);//CountryCode
ec_ResultHelper.Send();
}
</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="12913" FP="A" P="0" N="value1"/><CP ID="12914" FP="X" P="0" N="result1"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="1808" N="2000B_2430" T="JScript"><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">monetaryAmount = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;SVD02_2430_MonetaryAmt_2000B&quot;);
monetarySumAmount = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;SVD02_2430_MonetarySumAmt_2000B&quot;);
if (monetarySumAmount == &quot;&quot;) {
monetarySumAmount = 0;
}
if (monetaryAmount != &quot;&quot;) {
var total = parseFloat(monetaryAmount) + parseFloat(monetarySumAmount);
// Check if original monetaryAmount string contains a decimal point
if (monetaryAmount.indexOf('.') !== -1) {
// Input had decimals, so format total with two decimals
var formattedTotal = total.toFixed(2);
} else {
// Input had no decimals, format total as integer
var formattedTotal = total.toFixed(0);
}
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0, formattedTotal);
}
</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="12932" FP="_AP" N="a"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="12933" FP="A" P="0" N="value1"/><CP ID="12931" FP="X" P="0" N="result1"/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="1810" T="ChangeVariable"><Ps C="S"><P N="variableID">180</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="12935" FP="A" N="v"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="1812" T="ChangeVariable"><Ps C="S"><P N="variableID">180</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="12938" FP="_AP" N="a"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="12937" FP="A" N="v"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="1814" T="ChangeVariable"><Ps C="S"><P N="variableID">173</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="12941" FP="_AP" N="a"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/><CP ID="12940" FP="A" N="v"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="1816" T="ChangeVariable"><Ps C="S"><P N="variableID">182</P></Ps><CPs><CP ID="12943" FP="A" N="v"><Ps C="R"><P N="RV">true</P></Properties/></ConnectionPoints/><F ID="1817" N="AMT_2430_2000B" T="JScript"><Ps C="S"><P N="Parameters/ec_Script">amt02_2430_2000B = ec_VariableHelper.GetVariable(&quot;RPL_AMT_02_2000B&quot;);

}
if (amt02_2430_2000B != &quot;&quot;) {
var total = parseFloat(amt02_2430_2000B) + parseFloat(sumAmt02_2430_2000B);
// Check if original amt02_2430_2000B string contains a decimal point
if (amt02_2430_2000B.indexOf('.') !== -1) {
// Input had decimals, so format total with two decimals
var formattedTotal = total.toFixed(2);
} else {
// Input had no decimals, format total as integer (no decimals)
var formattedTotal = total.toFixed(0);
}
ec_ResultHelper.ReportResultByIndex(0, formattedTotal);
}

}
